**IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** [_**Cruz: Merrick Garland the ‘Most Partisan,’ ‘Most Political’ Attorney General in U.S. History:**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) "Monday on FNC’s “Hannity,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) criticized Attorney General Merrick Garland for his quest to indict former President Donald Trump. The Texas Republican lawmaker called him the most partisan and political attorney general in U.S. history. “[T]he deep state waged war against Donald Trump, during the four years Trump was president, the deep state tried to do everything they could to destroy his presidency,” he said. “Now, those partisans are back in the open. They are brazen. They are running the Biden Justice..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Ted Cruz Explains How He Tanked Biden’s Nominees:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"Texas Republican Sen. Ted Cruz outlined his efforts to tank President Joe Biden’s nominees as the ranking member of the Senate Commerce Committee, in an exclusive interview with the Daily Caller. Cruz, mentioned that in the first five months of 2023, three non-judicial Biden nominees have been defeated in the Senate, after failing to make it past the Senate Commerce Committee. The Texas senator said he and his team worked behind the scenes to get every Republican on the committee unified in opposition to the three nominees who came before..." ** **[Ted Cruz Pushes To Keep AM Radio In Cars, Saying Automakers Want To Kill Off Right-Wing Talk:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, is backing a federal bill that would require automakers to offer free AM radio access in new cars. Further, he argues that his proposal would stop big businesses from conspiring to silence conservative talk show hosts. No stranger to ginning up outlandish conspiracy theories, Cruz made the claim during a recent episode of his podcast _The Verdict with Ted Cruz_. "I think there's a reason big car companies were open to taking down AM radio, which is AM radio is where a lot of talk radio is..." ** **[Ted Cruz TORCHES Leftist Group for Demonizing Moms for](http://trk.tedcruz._IPVoRm4ne5gj7EA)**[ **Liberty** :](http://trk.tedcruz.) "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, slammed the Southern Poverty Law Center, focusing on the SPLC’s decision to place parental rights groups like Moms for Liberty on a “hate map” alongside chapters of the Ku Klux Klan. “The Southern Poverty Law Center is going on offense and they’ve decided to target Moms for Liberty,” Cruz said on his podcast Wednesday. “Let me say Moms for Liberty, they are phenomenal women—they are moms who are standing up for their kids.” The SPLC released its annual “Year in Hate and Extremism” on Tuesday, plotting 523..." ** [**Senator Ted Cruz - America’s Most Israeli Politician:**](http://trk.tedcruz._hgFSYMPKbtFQ) "Earlier this year, Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas was called to testify before the Senate’s Judiciary Committee. Ted Cruz, a member of the committee, was there to greet him. Cruz: Good morning, Secretary Mayorkas. Mayorkas: Good morning. Cruz: Is there a crisis at our southern border? Mayorkas: There’s a very significant challenge ... Cruz: That’s a yes or no question. Is there a crisis? Mayorkas, looking a bit like a man who’d just returned home to find his significant other mid-tryst with a paramour, tilted his head and adjusted his..." **

| | | Peter,

I’m on a mission to support leaders across America who embody the American spirit, but I can’t get it done alone. I want YOU on my team, and here’s why you have to get on board:

---
* **We’re on a mission to make sure America will NEVER be a socialist country.**
* **The woke agenda of major corporations, the mainstream media, and the Democrat party is holding us back. If America is going to succeed, we need to focus on our shared values, not what separates us. **
* **The Left is ashamed to be America. We’ll never be. America is the greatest nation on Earth, and we can’t take it for granted. **

Our mission is getting off the ground, and we’ve made incredible headway. _But we can’t take it to the next level without you._

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m on a mission to support leaders across America who embody the American spirit, but I can’t get it done alone. I want YOU on my team, and here’s why you have to get on board: We’re on a mission to make sure America will NEVER be a socialist country. The woke agenda of major corporations, the mainstream media, and the Democrat party is holding us back. If America is going to succeed, we need to focus on our shared values, not what separates us. The Left is ashamed to be America. We’ll never be. America is the greatest nation on Earth, and we can’t take it for granted. Our mission is getting off the ground, and we’ve made incredible headway. But we can’t take it to the next level without you. You’re one of the top patriots in your community, which is why we’re reaching out to you today. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | It's time to get our nation back on track, and the only way to make real change is at the grassroots level. We must start electing strong and decisive leaders who will prioritize serving the American people, NOT special interests. The challenges we face as a nation require us to come together and support candidates who will fight for freedom, uphold the Constitution, and protect our way of life. ** Together, we can turn the tide and bring about the change our country deserves. -CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. name: American Update
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TPQW6YSGvKOdzxn5odxKgA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6f2KzsvyxOaHpdyQZyISDw&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rsGFtNRD9pfkBpo1iEQEw&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKGcHphoI94TBbxBPo%2bH7Q&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rsGFtNRD9pfkBpo1iEQEw&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P40Zj1seJ9aHXt1%2fNz7Prw&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Update

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Abortion is at risk in Virginia, and our chance to safeguard reproductive health for women in the state is coming up in this state senate primary, next Tuesday.
body:
June 20th primary
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbaf41bf-e07a-4cad-a8be-eee718b5e535/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Will we let Republicans keep criminalizing abortion in states around the country?? **_Sure, we've had great victories in Michigan & Minnesota. _Yet, recently, as The Guardian pointed out:
> _Nebraska's state legislature passed a 12-week ban.., days after another 12-week ban cleared its final hurdle in North Carolina._
Recently South Carolina was added to this list with an even more cruel six-week ban. _We must stop them from adding Virginia to that list!_ [**We have only a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, as _one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice. But, we can replace him in 8 days _****_with progressive champion, Laschrecse Aird!_ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9f3b9f5-4442-4914-9acf-cbf5bd088d1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Aird has specifically labeled her campaign "Roe not Joe" _(as in Morrissey)**. She has the support of every female VA State Senate Democrat, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger and many male VA State House & State Senate members. _Again, we have **only 8 days until an election **that may **determine whether millions of VA women retain their right to choose, or a "Democrat" joins Gov. Youngkin and a GOP State House to pass a full ban.**_ [**_Will you please join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," campaign by giving Lashrecse Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so she can replace Morrissey as a critical vote to protect abortion rights in Virginia?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T840b32f4-9706-4186-a4f7-f1a635b4d08c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for all women in Virginia and around the country. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T001eee96-ebab-40dc-8319-5ba2a31763d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18967?t=1001&akid=3305%2E346206%2ED_qym8 ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18967?t=1002&akid=3305%2E346206%2ED_qym8 ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230612-3305-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3305_346206_D_qym8&akid=3305%2E346206%2ED_qym8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3305%2E346206%2ED_qym8

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkkpbhi2dd97fb2pugcso74rnv9uvr2ls008mbg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z020aslg16ol08j0oct45mn8cljp9a6li40k6g90_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsjgr961uj0s1qf79furm5f23e6o4idi4jjetusg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z38b6nli5cs3h98mqnnbi76c6pghm8do7kennspg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcsjd7so963hl85ats5hspau94o5sp9ha2460u1g_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z39617821dttp25154rbe4h34mvovcjoobn6sin0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbr25gm758ncovh8fu99c5kmhn1sra45d7cfimi8_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zla5va320bvmngtb0q2nko46ss2b4042otq354j0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)**.

---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4lbo5ls46qu0vucjpvcvmr6r65ju6dfb93ksf8_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi64o36cjj649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zicgji29me9fc63fqqq80u555i3naaq2jvftf6so_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgsketaafd5r814kv78hef630f3aoma3vdi9cv1g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0sdim9o34cpjm49fg)

subject: TRUMP INDICTED - Here is what you can do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You may be sitting at home wishing that you could do something.

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING:_TRUMP INDICTED _**
Yesterday was a dark day in the United States.

It is unconscionable for President Joe Biden to INDICT the leading candidate opposing him as he himself kept classified documents for DECADES.

I and House Republicans are standing with President Trump over the ABUSE OF POWER that the Biden DOJ has unleashed.
**Every American who believes in the rule of law should stand with President Trump against this grave injustice.**
You may be sitting at home wishing that you could do something. I understand the feeling - but I am also here to tell you that there IS something that you can do.

We need every patriot reading this message to GO ON THE RECORD to defend the ideals that make this country great. _**[Take 2 minutes to add your name to stand with House Republicans to END the witch hunts against President Trump.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70786%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RaLUGKIbFq1MqDAKVMxRcQ&sysid=1 "Take 2 minutes to add your

subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdu62s03j02n6ipjfvfb6idagcoqdpk9ek9ejhg0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsovv8hfni015aj2ocrg07ndnbdhk9md6l6ded0g_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqhjut2luq6v4palmr7cqa2j750gfkt3lpvun3jg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jlpdk8tspsu3remktdd0f11ijn02hu0alsl030_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2iuf463s4mceu5jr95sk16h561l29dnsg9em9d0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zibabartrsur7h97huled4t2r0rjtti5c6d5ljag_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie0p36cth2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Be Brave, Do Something - Upcoming Events
body:
Our Republic Requires Good People to Do Something! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=2557fa330c)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
_**The team of 2WINCT will curate and amplify events worthy of your attention and participation. Our Republic requires good people to be brave and do something - Dominic Rapini, Board Chair**_
**Tuesday, June 13 (this Tuesday), 7 p.m:**
**"Liberty Scorecards for Connecticut Legislators?"**
Kimberly Fiorello has connected with citizens in New Hampshire who have been keeping liberty scorecards for nearly 20 years. This will be a how-to session on organizing here in CT. This will require a committed group of volunteers to track bills, but it can be -- and is being – done with positive effect to our north.
| [Register for Liberty Scorecards](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=99fe20e8b8&e=8763c56857)
---

**Thursday, June 22, 5 p.m.:****"Grassroots Leadership Academy:**
**How to Sell Freedom without Starting a Fight."**
Lester is from the Grassroots Leadership Academy. He and his associate Meghan Norton will lead a 90-minute interactive training session on how to CIVILLY share principles and the causes of liberty and freedom with family, neighbors, and community. Here is the link to register:
|
---
| [Register for Grass Roots Academy](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=0e1ac6a2bf&e=8763c56857)
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.
###
| | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=cfac09b522&e=8763c56857)| [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=24591ef6ae&e=8763c56857)
---|---
| | |
---
_Copyright (C) 2023 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved._
You have signed up to be a support of mine.

Our mailing address is:
Dominic For CT4 Mariners WayBranford, CT 06405-4481
[Add us to your address book](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=145161cc05)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=145161cc05&e=8763c56857&c=2557fa330c) or [unsubscribe](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=145161cc05&e=8763c56857&c=2557fa330c)

It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?" | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" | "ORDER NOW" We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. Thank you, Mark, National Republican Membership Office | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
For four years I stood loyally by Donald Trump's side as we made great progress implementing conservative reforms

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Mike Pence.

For four years I stood loyally by Donald Trump's side as we made great progress implementing conservative reforms. Unfortunately, on January 6th Donald Trump put himself over his country and the Constitution. In a business full of phonies, grifters, liars and cheaters I have faithfully executed the pledge I took, and I have no regrets.

I realize that standing for a core set of principals will invite attacks, but I will never apologize for standing strong, doing what is right and protecting our Constitution.
---
| | | [DEFEND OUR CONSTITUTION](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqvbbi5sig886ipl73r958i8uakq9t9e8uar6jg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie4pj1c1h2bs)
---
Friend, America is facing difficult times. Our politics are divided unlike ever before and the radical left has weaponized the media and the government against anyone who speaks out against their radical agenda.

It is time to end the chaos, end the lies and end this divisive culture that is taking over our nation. It is time to turn the page. I'm running to put God and the Constitution back to the forefront. Will you join me?
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8uv22svammmh4mrpuj1n6fi6eih6h5uaf3p62hg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie4pj1c1h2bs)
---
| | | [RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmdiedv5et5cpp9p79v6k3uenni848tpvnmda88_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie4pj1c1h2bs)
---
Join our movement to return to normalcy in America. With your help, we can bring back the classical conservative values that made this nation thrive.

It's time to turn the page, Friend. Let's get to work.
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqedvog8d1kurcgo0qlevgbccb3mt9akrcvin9dg_rp22sh2s8i66o73clie4pj1c1h2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Mike Pence
---

name: Kristin Cooper
subject: Can I get your help with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
a birthday surprise for Roy
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64702586/410966151/823540626?refcode=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmRmZDJhYS0yOTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhpYEFauhF2u5lYBwbdXL80VpUrjowheAy0sOLDyhmA=&emci=31dfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter! If we haven’t met yet, I’m Kristin — Roy’s wife and the proud First Lady of North Carolina. I’m hoping to get your help with something... Roy’s birthday is _tomorrow_ , so I worked with his team to put together an e-card that you can sign (**[just click here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64702588/410966153/-598918284?refcode=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmRmZDJhYS0yOTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhpYEFauhF2u5lYBwbdXL80VpUrjowheAy0sOLDyhmA=&emci=31dfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)**). I know it would mean so much to Roy to hear from supporters like you. He deeply values having the people who share our values and priorities with him as he works to make North Carolina a better place for all of us. **[So please, Peter, take a moment to add your name to our e-card for Roy — and add a message, too — before his birthday tomorrow!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64702590/410966155/-598918284?refcode=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmRmZDJhYS0yOTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhpYEFauhF2u5lYBwbdXL80VpUrjowheAy0sOLDyhmA=&emci=31dfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64702593/410966158/-598918284?refcode=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmRmZDJhYS0yOTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhpYEFauhF2u5lYBwbdXL80VpUrjowheAy0sOLDyhmA=&emci=31dfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3bdfd2aa-2909-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176) Thank you so much! Before you read on, will you chip in $25 or any amount to help Texas Democrats get rid of the pathetic insurrectionist grifter known as Senator Ted Cruz? [] [] We knew it!! In this newly obtained recording, Cruz brags that he had talked 11 of his fellow Senators into OBJECTING to certification of the election. The Fox anchor asks: “Is there any chance you can overturn this?” Cruz responds: “I hope so.” Ted Cruz is unfit to serve. He’s beatable in 2024, and we’re raising funds to support his opponent. Will you help? Chip in any amount now to help defeat Ted Cruz. [] [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] If we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our democracy is incredibly fragile. If our shared values are going to be protected, we MUST ensure Ted Cruz is defeated next year. Please chip in $15 or any amount now to help kick Cruz to the curb. [] Thank you, The Real Texas PAC [] Paid for by The Real Texas PAC, www.therealtexaspac.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next month, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

body:

Can you give $2?

We'll keep this short, Friend,

The FIRST Republican Presidential Debate is in August,
and as it stands, Doug Burgum has NOT yet qualified to
participate.

To get the ball rolling, he reached out to every
supporter to ask for a $2 donation - unlike all the other
campaigns that are asking for $1. Really, all we need - just $2
for the chance to earn your support on the stage.

Please donate $2 or more RIGHT AWAY to help us qualify
for the first Republican Presidential Debate. >>

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

For more information, scroll down to see Our Team's

Thank you,

Team Doug

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Burgum

Friend,

It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican
Presidential Debate is coming up soon.

Unlike the other candidates - Ron DeSantis, Larry Elder,
Nikki Haley, Asa Hutchinson, Vivek Ramaswamy, Tim Scott, and
Donald Trump, who have all had weeks, if not months, to
professionally fundraise - we are JUST getting this grassroots
movement started.

Now, this isn't a bad thing; however, it does make it
THAT much more difficult to qualify for the first debate. We
don't want our race to be over before it even starts, so we're
asking you to join the team with a generous donation of just $2
to our campaign, Doug Burgum for America.

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

Every other campaign is asking for $1, yet we can do
better together. If every patriot reading this email donates just
$2, we'll be well on our way to making it on the debate stage in
Milwaukee in August. No candidate will work harder to earn your
support, which is why we are counting on folks like you to get us
to the debate stage so we can share our vision with America.

Please donate $2 or more RIGHT AWAY to help us qualify
for the first Republican Presidential Debate. >>

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

Our team is going to send around a list with the names of
each supporter who gave $2 or more by the end of the day. We
would be eternally grateful to see YOUR NAME on the list, Friend.

With gratitude,

Team Burgum

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Remembering the victims of Pulse
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot stand for LGBTQ+ hatred
#

Friends -
Seven years ago today, we woke up to the horrifying news of the mass shooting at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando, Florida.
This nightclub should have been a safe haven for LGBTQ+ individuals to gather during Pride Month, but instead their night turned into a scene of terror.
At the time, Pulse was the deadliest mass shooting in our nation’s history. We remember the 49 lives lost with murals and memorials. And in the face of continued violence and bigotry against the LGBTQ+ community, we must call out hate when we see it and work to disarm it.
As we honor Pride Month this June, I hope you will join me in standing with LGBTQ+ people across our nation. LGBTQ+ rights have remained under attack for years. Right now, extremist politicians have made the transgender community one of their top targets, stoking fear and encouraging violence. We cannot stand for this hatred.
We must work towards a future where hate-filled individuals can no longer access firearms and harm our nation’s most vulnerable populations. I hope you will continue to stand with me in this vital fight.
In solidarity,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE TO GIFFORDS PAC](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230612-1-15&t=1&akid=5948%2E3935704%2E2D3szk)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5948%2E3935704%2E2D3szk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
**The Human Rights Campaign (HRC) has declared a state of emergency for LGBTQ+ people in the United States.**

[**Join Derek Marshall and sign the petition to demand that Congress protect freedoms for all of us and pass the Equality Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64705661/410978130/-335826093?source=2023EqualityAct_DM&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230608_03%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJmMTIyNy0yZjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yv913vj43YzLd0AX51-qrjdp66gXepbVr4r5qGbRF-o=&emci=2cf2cebe-3b06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=712f1227-2f09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
More than 525 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced and more than 70 signed into law by Republican majorities so far in 2023.

In response, The Human Rights Campaign (HRC), the nation’s largest organization devoted to LGBTQ+ rights, declared an emergency for the first time in their 43 year history.

**The United States doesn’t currently have federal laws that specifically protect the LGBTQ+ community from discrimination and protect their civil rights. That’s why we need Congress to pass the Equality Act.

[Congress must protect the human rights of everyone. Sign the petition and demand that they pass the Equality Act NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64705662/410978131/-335826093?source=2023EqualityAct_DM&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230608_03%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJmMTIyNy0yZjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yv913vj43YzLd0AX51-qrjdp66gXepbVr4r5qGbRF-o=&emci=2cf2cebe-3b06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=712f1227-2f09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

It’s Pride Month, and families of LGBTQ+ Americans should be celebrating, but some are looking for ways to escape their home states where the rights and even the existence of their LGBTQ+ family members are under attack. They would rather mourn their home than their LGBTQ+ loved one.

Derek Marshall, an openly gay progressive Democrat, understands first hand the dangers and discrimination the LGBTQ+ community faces, and he will fight against hateful state sanctioned discrimination.

**Growing inequality despite growing social acceptance makes it clear that Congress must act to expand protections for our LGBTQ+ brothers and sisters.

[Add your name to tell Congress they must guarantee freedoms to all and pass the Equality Act!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64705663/410978132/-335826093?source=2023EqualityAct_DM&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230608_03%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJmMTIyNy0yZjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yv913vj43YzLd0AX51-qrjdp66gXepbVr4r5qGbRF-o=&emci=2cf2cebe-3b06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=712f1227-2f09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Love will always win,
Derek Marshall for Congress

body:

---
Friend,
---
We have some bad news for you – **one of the largest liberal mega-donors in Wisconsin just bought up 18 radio stations across the state.**
---
This purchase will result in the silencing of Fox News programming and it's being replaced with Left-wing propaganda.
---
_This looks very reminiscent of when billionaire George Soros bought up radio stations in multiple states last year to silence conservatives and BUY Democrat wins._
---
_Now, with Wisconsin as the top battleground state for 2024, Democrats are clearly following the Soros playbook to try to BUY this election._
---

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Remembering the victims of the Pulse nightclub shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
Today we commemorate lives lost, and take action to ensure that history will not repeat itself

Peter - This month, as we celebrate Pride, we also remember the 49 lives cut short in the horrific Pulse nightclub shooting seven years ago today. This act of violence targeting the LGBTQ+ community was fueled by the hateful rhetoric of GOP extremists that continues to threaten Americans today.

The last time I was in Orlando, I visited the memorial at Pulse nightclub and I was moved by the resilience and unity I witnessed there in the face of bigotry.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709295/410991789/682131866?refcode=EM_PET_230612Pulse_DBW_5_photo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI3ZDk0NjAtMzcwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XkwHPGOoixfHFRMyN0ZlWtAF6b9i29rVmti4z35pZxg=&emci=5d5f2f3c-e206-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=427d9460-3709-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

I’m running for Congress to stand against intolerance and hate and to advocate for gun safety – because every American deserves the chance to thrive and live free from fear of violence. Unfortunately, the interaction between discrimination and prejudice towards the LGBTQ+ community and gun violence is deadly: LGBTQ+ people are twice as likely to be victims of gun violence as their cisgender and straight peers.

June is both Pride Month and National Gun Violence Awareness Month. At a time when trans rights are under attack across the country, we must have leaders committed to both defending LGBTQ+ rights and ending gun violence.

As a trauma surgeon, I’ve told too many mothers and fathers that their children had died due to gun violence. No parent should ever have to hear those words. That’s why I’m committed to advocating for meaningful gun safety reform as a representative in Congress.

Last week, I sent you a petition asking you to stand with me in demanding action from our leaders. We need to pass comprehensive gun safety legislation to prevent another massacre like the one at Pulse nightclub. Today we commemorate lives lost, and take action to ensure that history will not repeat itself.

[If you haven’t already signed, will you please take a moment to add your name to our petition calling on leaders in Washington to act to prevent gun violence today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709296/410991790/682131866?refcode=EM_PET_230612Pulse_DBW_5_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI3ZDk0NjAtMzcwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XkwHPGOoixfHFRMyN0ZlWtAF6b9i29rVmti4z35pZxg=&emci=5d5f2f3c-e206-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=427d9460-3709-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709297/410991791/682131866?refcode=EM_PET_230612Pulse_DBW_5_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI3ZDk0NjAtMzcwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XkwHPGOoixfHFRMyN0ZlWtAF6b9i29rVmti4z35pZxg=&emci=5d5f2f3c-e206-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=427d9460-3709-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana—it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way.

We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. **That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families.**

The attacks will be nasty, brutal, and downright deceitful. And all of our hard work will amount to a hill of beans if we don’t have the resources to fight back. I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana—it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way. We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = I appreciate your support so much—especially now. Early investments make all the difference, so thank you in advance. Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Fight for Progress PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | ---|--- = = Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. name: Team Greta
subject: Why we're supporting Greta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Here are a few important reasons why we’re standing with Greta:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709589/410993117/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230612SWOnboard3_TG_8_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgzMmQyYzctMzgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9m2FbnLFNuLM6mwjxjn1-zCPyXY4ox8Tj8J1FF8L-0=) Hey folks, it’s Team Greta here – we’re the people standing with Greta Kemp Martin in her campaign to become Mississippi’s next Attorney General. Here are a few important reasons why:
* As the daughter of a nurse and a police officer born and raised in Mississippi, Greta knows our state’s values firsthand because she lives them herself. As our Attorney General, she’ll fight to protect working families and curb the influence of special interests.

* Greta has spent her entire career sticking up for Mississippians and fighting for the disenfranchised as a trial lawyer and disability rights advocate. She has the experience and compassion needed to be the people’s lawyer as Mississippi’s Attorney General.

* Our current Attorney General has been too distracted with bolstering her image on the national stage to address the rampant corruption that has spiraled out of control here at home. Fitch is out of touch with what Mississippi needs, and it’s time for us to send her packing.

[Greta is the only choice for Attorney General to reign in Mississippi’s corruption and defend the interests of everyday Mississippians, not corporations or the mega-wealthy. However, her opponent has deep pockets, and we’re relying on grassroots support from people like you to help us win this race. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you’re able today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709590/410993118/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230612SWOnboard3_TG_8_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgzMmQyYzctMzgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9m2FbnLFNuLM6mwjxjn1-zCPyXY4ox8Tj8J1FF8L-0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64709591/410993119/-456841951?refcode=EM_FR_230612SWOnboard3_TG_8_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgzMmQyYzctMzgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9m2FbnLFNuLM6mwjxjn1-zCPyXY4ox8Tj8J1FF8L-0=)**

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. | | Peter, The Biden administration has done nothing to prevent or prepare for an upsurge of border crossings and now our borders remain wide open for cartel drug smuggling and illegal immigration. We've got to do something to stop the drugs and crime pouring into our country, devastating communities struggling with widespread fentanyl addiction. name: Greta for AG
subject: Do you have just two spare minutes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter – Leadership is about service. That’s why Greta’s campaign to become Mississippi Attorney General centers around people and families, and creating a Mississippi that uplifts each and every one of our incredible citizens.

For far too long, Mississippi has been under the leadership of an AG that is more focused on giving handouts to her wealthy buddies, instead of ensuring we have a state that works for everyone from Tishomingo County to Jackson.

If we’re going to bring real change to the Attorney General’s office, then we need to bring the focus back to you. And the best way to do that is for you to tell Greta exactly what’s top of mind for you and your family.

We need as many supporters as possible to take our issues survey so Greta knows what to focus on to help create a better future for Mississippi families. Can you make your voice heard by taking our survey today?

TAKE THE SURVEY: https://secure.ngpvan.com/o5DqIxBqOUeJa4XTFjCffw2?refcode=EM_PET_230612FranzOnboard2_TG_6_PT

Thank you for making your voice heard,
Greta for AG

P.S. – Help us spread the word! Forward this email to any friends and family so they can share their thoughts in our survey.

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_PET_230612FranzOnboard2_TG_6_bioboxPT&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/c7O9Ucx9VUa_ajDO2m2OGQ2?unsubscribedata=xUGl8uwwtj%2BRtuaWlwxGCe3DV3hXob9Q29E078CQdp%2BZqaRPZ6NunmRUGYHNkwTQtMKVpz4KMFDLEmsyii9kDCa2M5EC0kXTQaKZ4UD1rLtUJ5K11s0UI5oujgGlyBdn79vDd22ZndtBgJAa%2BgX%2BdBUQuKtt8Hz7zK74UYb0%2FCdpC%2ByKjbRxZ3bmyJFRSdtI%2Fuiciqi3VSIaql2k5CemcPO8lE5JQy1SZAzRU7yZGWLD78WNRSWKfRB3blPIOvixTpqmOeNh2dstwnWDQTeP%2FNfveXuOxPJeaVrYQZpOW%2FU4iPe1ax1aU0II8HHgT0wYj9fadVI5UfZvNe7Gd0g22KLgixbQ1icardbr6uJqLPh93CZncPT8ozPQH8Bxt61Lfl9mJILbykqmgqXS0wzKGLC9oT%2BVyR4Exnh3KTlvGDy%2FwTmIoU1i9hlKWJMhzmhL .

| | No Increase in Taxes & A Balanced Budget!

| |
---
| | |
---
| | Mission 6 for the 6th is about you! It's my new contract with the 6th District - A Contract with America! Small Business owners are the backbone of our country. If you trust me with your financial support and vote, you can count on me to work with my colleagues on the Hill to balance the budget, never raise taxes on small business owners, and provide you with every bit of support to help you be innovative, sustainable, and prosperous. If you trust me with your financial support and vote, you can count on me to work with my colleagues on the Hill to balance the budget, never raise taxes on small business owners, and provide you with every bit of support to help you be innovative, sustainable, and prosperous. Learn more about me and the mission: PS - We haven't had a balanced budget since the Clinton Administration! | | | | | | Share on social | | | This email was created with Wix. | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Peter, it's Sen. Scott
subject: It’s out of control, do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Crime in this country is out of control, and we have Democrats to blame.

Across America, Democrat governors and mayors are signing bills to let criminals roam free without consequences while families worry for their safety.
_It’s almost like the radical Left loves criminals because they think they can get their vote._
Peter, it’s time for America to stop prioritizing criminals and put families first.
**American cities MUST get tough on crime, and it’s up to US to hold liberal politicians accountable.[Stand with me now and DEMAND America starts holding criminals accountable. ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7d9500ad394b48968d1748bd5cce8e59&_e=7DjRo-3GYMj1_1lNZIlpnczsr5amNbpgzlAf6vuR4Jw2wNpAB6UBFpxRn2AyCqqOO6Glg3rGK0Bp5Hu_K0gEpMjMbiYuiVRQ-Rv_JOcOtbEHmfUytxizWwdboX2b1pqa5FmcBTk9G5MUj8nccbWWVWys2Zt52PXl8owTsvm9dn99HcWUu-KPHHmjyFtbcS7NkwczzRRBcWS9UYptZ9eweRW4jBw-IgLx_ZfNEWSmmbLQMmJ20lcNnzWak9q5IPw-DPa6HpKWU98uto6thpG5g1v-mKVqe9n_SpAeZt_A2AzAYX53O1r1e_EaqtKyBQnHxnzHK2t8NTHZe-_xee8wBR2jOiIdLrX2rBDZ-EsttQuMY76UKtzXaqHBPrGVb85l)**

The ONLY WAY to keep Americans safe from hardened criminals is to uphold the rule of law and put criminals behind bars.

It’s time to get serious about crime, and that means prioritizing families over socialist, pro-criminal politics.
[**Stand with me today and get criminals OFF of our streets!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7d9500ad394b48968d1748bd5cce8e59&_e=7DjRo-3GYMj1_1lNZIlpnczsr5amNbpgzlAf6vuR4Jw2wNpAB6UBFpxRn2AyCqqOO6Glg3rGK0Bp5Hu_K0gEpMjMbiYuiVRQ-Rv_JOcOtbEHmfUytxizWwdboX2b1pqa5FmcBTk9G5MUj8nccbWWVWys2Zt52PXl8owTsvm9dn99HcWUu-KPHHmjyFtbcS7NkwczzRRBcWS9UYptZ9eweaEgTR0K-j6ifsQlP7F5ody5YAxbpK7L6dGVfZBn8rpdvwSglOND_Pp8epINMCme7lVfrAgUwBrCnT9THNNVCLazVTU_RkTfDtKA1iD3D0WrNnvucJbG6L8mO9n0AB-sA1AIQR7PpAwhNgu_N9FDmtTnPh_1XqREkziG32pXljZz)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmd5o3rfbo4r5v52pvcdgujkedfofs5jebfcojk8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg60p76c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbrql0rog8vqm6hv9dl85nk0dq47j7i2hg7t16pg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg60p76c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zre4sknifg8al4jkrhkfkkjuhm6lhpc62ja6et5g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg60p76c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: So thankful that I can count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
One last donation before the primary
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friend I'm so thankful for you. I hate to keep asking for money.
BUT we need about $7,000 before Wednesday

---
|
---
| |
---

Friend On Saturday, "Republican" Delegate Carrie Coyner, who voted against the Tebow bill, had a young teenager who was wearing a Delegate Carrie Coyner shirt knock on the door of our home asking for us to support Glen Sturtevant. She's upset because I called her out for voting against the Tebow bill. This is a bill that allows homeschooled students whose families are paying taxes to play high school sports.
He informed us that he wasn't old enough to vote but was getting paid $15 an hour to knock doors in our neighborhood.
Friends, the RINOS want to take me out. But we can't let them.
We're now having to combat the RINOS who are paying kids $15 an hour to door knock houses to take out a sitting Republican senator who has the most conservative voting record in the Virginia Senate.
If that upsets you, then please donate again to my campaign so I can quickly respond to their last ditch efforts.
Thank you for doing your part so I can continue to serve you.
For God and country,
---

name: Signature Needed
subject: Support LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team -- This Pride Month, we’re so grateful for all the progress our Democratic Senate and the Biden-Harris administration have made toward equality! From advancing LGBTQ+ anti‐discrimination protections to codifying equal marriage, we’ve made HUGE steps forward.

**But Republicans across the country have introduced nearly _500_ anti‐LGBTQ+ bills in 2023 alone, and they aren’t stopping any time soon.**

We need to STAND UP for equality this Pride Month, and that’s why we’ve launched a _massive_ petition to show the GOP that Democrats stand steadfast against hate. **Please, we're falling short of our _must-hit_ 50,000 signature goal:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14156?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230612-SignatureNeeded-LGBTQrightsshort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230612-SignatureNeeded-LGBTQrightsshort-Pros-sl1&akid=11015%2E9716520%2EbBzMH_)
[**Add your name before the midnight deadline to stand up for LGBTQ+ rights this Pride Month >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14156?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230612-SignatureNeeded-LGBTQrightsshort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230612-SignatureNeeded-LGBTQrightsshort-Pros-sl1&akid=11015%2E9716520%2EbBzMH_)

clean_body: | | | Team -- This Pride Month, we’re so grateful for all the progress our Democratic Senate and the Biden-Harris administration have made toward equality! From advancing LGBTQ+ anti‐discrimination protections to codifying equal marriage, we’ve made HUGE steps forward. But Republicans across the country have introduced nearly 500 anti‐LGBTQ+ bills in 2023 alone, and they aren’t stopping any time soon. We need to STAND UP for equality this Pride Month, and that’s why we’ve launched a massive petition to show the GOP that Democrats stand steadfast against hate. Please, we're falling short of our must-hit 50,000 signature goal: | | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: 👋 To all of Ilhan's supporters → please don't scroll away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)

👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters -
Please don't click away or scroll past this. This isn't the first time we've mentioned this month's official FEC fundraising deadline, so we'll get right to the point: **[We're asking you today to make a $3 contribution to help us defend this seat and keep Ilhan in Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=2&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)**

As you probably already know, Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the same way a lot of her colleagues in Washington do.
She doesn't rely on shady super PACs or corporate special interests to run for office — the ONLY way we run this movement is from lots and lots of people contributing what they can.

If everyone reading this email chipped in $3, we'd CRUSH our June fundraising goals and be able to fund a winning campaign all the way through 2024.
But the honest truth is that not everyone gives. That's why we’re relying on people like you who understand just how important it is to keep Ilhan in Congress to chip in today.

In this campaign, we’re going toe-to-toe against the far right and untold millions of outside dark money. They're going to stoke fear, division, and pour a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric against Ilhan and our movement into Minnesota this campaign cycle. We NEED to be ready for attacks to come and be prepared for everything they'll throw our way.

Building the kind of grassroots campaign we need to win takes a LOT of resources, but less than 1% of supporters who read this email will donate — which is why it's especially important that YOU contribute if you can. What do you say?
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3, $10, or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan Omar and our people-powered campaign today? It's so important that we're all in this fight together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=3&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-june23.ytybxp&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=22&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-june23.I1c0iW&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=23&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
[Donate $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-june23.r1AXNE&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=24&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-june23.5PZPCx&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=25&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-june23.iTxEfp&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=26&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230612-1-t1&t=27&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)

As always, thank you for EVERYTHING that you do.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=30&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=237_791427_69NG82&akid=237%2E791427%2E69NG82)**.
Ilhan for Congress

subject: Chris Christie: Great News, Great Start
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
Chris Christie: Great News, Great Start | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/97783a9a6b04/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13549253?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1f6de98f11&e=d0a9afa930)
|
---
**Chris Christie: Great News, Great Start!
** We’ve been amazed at the tremendous response to Governor Christie’s [declaration of candidacy](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=5b8af3c821&e=d0a9afa930) last Tuesday.
In less than a week the Governor has received favorable attention across much of the cable, broadcast and print national media.
As one of Chris’ strongest supporters I wanted to share this great news with you.
I realize you’re busy and you may not have seen much of the coverage, so I listed below items of interest:

**The Wall Street Journal:** “[Chris Christie Enters GOP Presidential Race as Chief Trump Antagonist](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=09ccfa0ea5&e=d0a9afa930)”
* Here is what one of the nation’s leading newspapers said: “A gifted retail politician and debater who served as a U.S. attorney in New Jersey before being governor... Christie became critical of Trump after he lost the 2020 election and refused to concede.” Read the full story [here.](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=40c3d31f12&e=d0a9afa930)

**Fox & Friends:**
* While on Fox & Friends, Governor Christie pitched his case to voters across the country as to why he should be the next president.

[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1a71fa5e81&e=d0a9afa930)
**CNN:**
* Governor Christie also joined Jake Tapper where he discussed a number of topics, ranging from the war in Ukraine to the importance of character among those in public service.

[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=37d5af565a&e=d0a9afa930)
*********
It’s been a great start for the Governor’s campaign, but it’s just the beginning.
As you may be aware, to get Chris on the debate stage with Donald Trump the RNC requires every candidate to demonstrate support from [40,000 donors](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d2c775ee7f&e=d0a9afa930) by August.
While President Trump has been soliciting donors for seven years for his presidential campaigns, Chris is just [starting this effort](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f9cb680962&e=d0a9afa930).
I am asking you to help spread the word about why we need Chris on the debate stage to be the Republican truth teller—that’s the only way to defeat Joe Biden in 2024.
Thank you for all your past support.
We’ll do our best to keep you informed how the campaign is moving forward.
Best wishes,
Bill Palatucci[Chairman, Tell It Like It Is PAC](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d761c6d7c7&e=d0a9afa930)

P.S. If the Governor is going to defeat Donald Trump and take on Joe Biden next November, he needs [donations as low as $1](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=86d5a35b7b&e=d0a9afa930) to get him on the debate stage. Please ask your friends – who care about the direction of the Republican Party and who wins the presidency in 2024, to help [here.](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=9b591e6398&e=d0a9afa930)

| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3d56fed41d&e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f5b8b8e98d&e=d0a9afa930)| [](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3352244c5f&e=d0a9afa930)| [](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=4062202608&e=d0a9afa930)

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=280cf962b7b64709848bbaa0c934b1fa&_e=ZS1WZZ0yvelNYi4CYSls8id5gL6sfY4DjltukE1Azr_-Uf5HS6mWZEykxGB9FGOm0xOnAXLNgKdLTjmwATuqN73bRZn6vXlJlAvkbXCKjGIPbgQa7Z9VW9eqAKCNFgDuclFFc1H1BlABNx29qUVlIecTdtrIgGGRSeiqsGchSnUzSlcPxIgyWl7O4F31aO7EesDDtPVNMJuyTDyUuWJQNHUx0RJOfIJ7JaIVEOOPqqI6k-SNR6pbk-GSFO2Z4CK9kdzlzZNRC4bqo2NNSv9Lh_puhSWazDhSZ5YhT4fi9EWW8ltXMN-tbYozMxNh0CL14YEDIKHdaagDEym6SrUgxQ%3D%3D)

| | After speaking to so many students of my alma mater, I realized that there is a larger group that needs to hear this message. This generation of young people is under assault by the enemy, but I believe God is calling up this generation in a way we've never seen. I believe this is the generation that rejects the lies that are deep and pervasive. So in a break from the norm, my Substack this week is a letter to the Class of 2023 and future generations. God Bless,Sean
---
---
|
---
_**To the 2023 Graduates of America**_ By Sean Feucht From the day you were born, your parents, grandparents, and loved ones have looked forward to this moment. This is a joyous occasion, and it marks a great accomplishment in your lives. In fact, this accomplishment is all the more impressive because of what you’ve had to go through to get here. Three years ago, the entire country shut down because of COVID. Your schools closed. Your classes moved online. You were separated from your friends. The propaganda of fear spread all around you leading to brutal lockdowns that empowered power-drunk politicians. Depression skyrocketed. Drug and alcohol use exploded. Suicides rose sharply among your very own age group. But you kept going. You did not quit. You did the work. You stayed the course. And now, you’ve finished the job. And that is why we celebrate today. **[FINISH READING ON SUBSTACK → https://seanfeucht.substack.com/p/to-the-2023-graduates-of-america](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=280cf962b7b64709848bbaa0c934b1fa&_e=ZS1WZZ0yvelNYi4CYSls8id5gL6sfY4DjltukE1Azr_-Uf5HS6mWZEykxGB9FGOm0xOnAXLNgKdLTjmwATuqN73bRZn6vXlJlAvkbXCKjGIPbgQa7Z9VW9eqAKCNFgDuclFFc1H1BlABNx29qUVlIecTdtrIgGGRSeiqsGchSnUzSlcPxIgyWl7O4F31aO7EamoxZ1B2Zw1jhG0ZsJQl7FX9CM_NuTV-IMN_R3BTycBDzdi_qwYn-oufOpCIImCBXAvsX-gSi_1-0ItxBQHfvwzzhDs5dczLRmUYRpu8kJkYurIAT5KzVa2zAlX3bfjXpxtF4lWIlCL9ctvB9JfpdQ%3D%3D)[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=280cf962b7b64709848bbaa0c934b1fa&_e=ZS1WZZ0yvelNYi4CYSls8id5gL6sfY4DjltukE1Azr_yLG5L79XGps0aPJl53Y-KLvhUMl99lmZBAW2MJC15dppxihACwt1mfjOBhZks62YhBwsqYqUfpIQ-vCrLMfCnNMUPNrOBaQ5ndCn2o33yVXOpYwr4RjH7ldTZjcaSbK2CyY8VILrHtAhNIatdpEMXyi97NyPJf15O0yl3DCmYhQU6MZ_APbhiD1DehahsirWeePbJmGyjk_6mXsVm1_iwO5ByoGiN1zjs7Hw-tq7GMIoROxWm_EitymuxPPXxj8_44EsK-eNeaV0v4sd9BMwrgU9pDZXWUd3xejyo2X2M5plFtliVmckBh4tk5fBu2lY%3D)**

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: "Pride Month"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/1937d4ab32c9eed5/29e25898265f232ec3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, The month of June has been co-opted by the Left, designated as “Pride Month.” But what's worse is the radical hijacking of the religious symbol - the rainbow - and the radical Left's evil quest to groom children. In Genesis, the Bible explains the rainbow is a symbol representing the covenant - a promise - from God to never flood the earth again. It is a symbol of redemption and new life. **The rainbow represents a covenant, not a sin.** The sin is not the children, but those telling them they need to change to become part of their inclusive rainbow. Their identity is already secured. They are already one of a kind. **🙏** One promise I can make to voters is that **I will always stand up to protect children.** Over the last three years, politicians like Tim Kaine and Joe Biden have **waged an outright war on parental rights** by:
---
* Allowing Drag Queen story hours in school libraries
* Shutting down schools during COVID
* Pushing woke ideology in our schools
* Advocating for boys to be able to use girls bathrooms
* Letting biological males compete in women’s sports
* Kicking parents out of the classroom

---
As a father of four, **I could no longer sit on the sidelines** while Tim Kaine continues to allow this type of tyranny to take effect.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/1937d4ab32c9eed5/dd7603b886e427b2c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
**Woke ideology plagues America** in far too many schools. Parents have a **right to take action** to shield their child from this type of indoctrination. Parental rights mean that **we, as parents, can’t sit back & tolerate cultural wokeism**, or the hijacking of our kids’ innocence. **Parents can, and must fight back.** [Take a stand for parents all across America by helping us flip this seat from BLUE to RED.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/1937d4ab32c9eed5/63a53cb56424d4f7c3d6b838967d376c/42903)

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, The month of June has been co-opted by the Left, designated as “Pride Month.” But what's worse is the radical hijacking of the religious symbol - the rainbow - and the radical Left's evil quest to groom children. In Genesis, the Bible explains the rainbow is a symbol representing the covenant - a promise - from God to never flood the earth again. It is a symbol of redemption and new life. The rainbow represents a covenant, not a sin. The sin is not the children, but those telling them they need to change to become part of their inclusive rainbow. Their identity is already secured. They are already one of a kind. 🙏 One promise I can make to voters is that I will always stand up to protect children. Over the last three years, politicians like Tim Kaine and Joe Biden have waged an outright war on parental rights by: Allowing Drag Queen story hours in school libraries Shutting down schools during COVID Pushing woke ideology in our schools Advocating for boys to be able to use girls bathrooms Letting biological males compete in women’s sports Kicking parents out of the classroom As a father of four, I could no longer sit on the sidelines while Tim Kaine continues to allow this type of tyranny to take effect. Woke ideology plagues America in far too many schools. Parents have a right to take action to shield their child from this type of indoctrination. Parental rights mean that we, as parents, can’t sit back & tolerate cultural wokeism, or the hijacking of our kids’ innocence. Parents can, and must fight back. Parents all over Virginia & America are stepping up to make a difference in their communities. We are building a movement to restore parents’ rights in the classroom. For Freedom, Scott Parkinson Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) P.S. Please forward this to ten parents that will join you in standing with me to fight to protect our kids against groomers. Click here >> FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Parkinson for Senate | |

body:
Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
