| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e2129bf-2f20-41d2-a5bc-40b86b43e7d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Letter 6/12/23_** _So much has been going on that at The Blue Amp Channel we opened a mailbag to answer a bevy of questions from whether could get rid of the Supreme Court to whether Mark Meadows had flipped on Trump and if Trump could be President if he won (God help us) but was in prison. The first two parts are below:_ 🔥 Mailbag 1: Including How To Change MAGA Minds, Can We (& Should We) Have Term Limits & Could Trump President From Prison? WATCH! [bit.ly/43WLQ71](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fdb3b72-56b8-4706-8cf3-c296ce40aa47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 🔥 Mailbag 2: Including Can We Just Get Rid Of The SCOTUS & What The Dept Of Education Can Do--If Anything--About Book Bans, etc. WATCH: [bit.ly/3qyjfXj](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5726ff81-6642-4b01-9896-0a426c83ea64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 👍🔥**Blue Amp Action's expanding![S](https://default.salsalabs.org/T479c96c3-c5cb-4abd-bf94-d918fb68c7f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[upport our work with a donation to continue providing you with the best community possible](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97733212-255f-45f4-a75a-b32af01207de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!** ******************* **👍 ****👍 ****Have you [v](https://default.salsalabs.org/T008fea93-bfad-483a-998f-3a7302b10a62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**isited our sponsor, Dissent Pins?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79055313-0310-42ce-82e6-e03efe9a15c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**Need a **["Mazel Tough" t-shirt or "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie?" pin?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18f9ff5e-4671-4963-947a-2fa4f7784459/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ** **You can find it all & more [at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d22752b-5b97-4353-b40a-8d1bf73072d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!** ******************* **_One more video here you'll find interesting!_** 🔥 The One 100% Predictable Thing About Chris Christie's Attack On Trump (w/ appearance by Ayman M of MSNBC). WATCH! [bit.ly/3NfQOGB](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5997a34c-5403-4fbb-8128-122cdc310f41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading and watching! Cliff PS: 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! | | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d7c0d7d-10db-41b0-bbe6-b5eb9918ff33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: sign the petition: Protect Abortion Rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=135%2E52803%2E29ys2W)

| | Abortion rights are under attack, and anti-choice extremists are amplifying their efforts to strip people of essential health care all across the country. Whether it’s limiting access to contraception or pushing outright, no-exceptions bans, the attacks won’t stop until we show the GOP that there are political consequences for their extremism. Angela Alsobrooks has made protecting abortion access a focal point of her campaign for U.S. Senate. **[Will you stand with Angela in supporting reproductive rights by signing our petition demanding that access to safe and legal abortion be protected?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230612_EN_AbortionPetition_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=7&akid=135%2E52803%2E29ys2W)** | | | [Sign the petition >>](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230612_EN_AbortionPetition_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=8&akid=135%2E52803%2E29ys2W)
---
While abortion services are accessible in Maryland, the same cannot be said for entire regions of the country.
Some states have specific restrictions like waiting periods or bans after a certain number of weeks, but more than a dozen states have outright bans.
It’s up to us to show anti-choice extremists that we’ll never stop fighting for reproductive rights.
**[Can you add your voice to our petition calling for abortion rights to be protected at the federal level?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230612_EN_AbortionPetition_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=9&akid=135%2E52803%2E29ys2W)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXISRP3o7xVhN_eVfrR1c4Fn8e_8FEtvs3ncYuAudODxEbLnXU9wSbPaJ_PeOewy_MC-TivKgIBM5Rll71MUD7jWGkYUAeJIzi0g2WhcuOVDHRWMfEnd2gOFkEhgVZ3dLrS2S2yCLNwoNRQv-SIXPA0a) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXK1Cc8RjZmeT2jj9Dv4G0fnSTmPG3dbYva4GU7hZUsiduPo9KcYs72R6VZwLH2I0i9zrWPUOEEcVWqkcFxYLLDWRQ16CJcil4zc5FgQysjHfgmhAIeROSTH3LbMfRfieg4-Whez_ZgLyfvs1bBQMBGq)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXJVE3dPSZJF1E_b54ET8fqZSIctAuGrJBhQJx1VQTjDiR1aMtZAsRj5baGE_bQsqXmgCEXLKWS30Quz1JXcHkciWoWIF2OZCszc-0H8qU0EIqbbqAbpC_HoYXqH-z7OyPZZ7Ct-c-DH4KKN0IKa9-dx)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXJ268cbvN40f9hBfb0yWGemkOq8rudhn2-6nGeHt5MB7n5u8xNXkOdDb2U9ELhKY0zPYfBAZE7LjGUoBCVxlTbeGbfvSol-zpJV0TKkodGUDBkH9d7For0XrbpiAppi1-Om2mojQm9IEdkSCsGh53uu) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXKFduaks6CMHjyQysLEmfnMEBpxxeMONykggr0VJhl98sONVn83OALiHhpaiBvK4ihbXBFkjDbOWaKq0uJ-JLXdD724IUIS_9U-XdKsjxQsi8VoAeh6fgfZ12JYc4Pd-ub-L5HUwJ5XXEW5xqaU6sC3)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ccea47914934fe0b9a27a61dbae29ee&_e=xc1nXbiO6rqG-UwcLLpJHmYR0_eMSK2GHLrrmZORBxtgnoxSRd3Cy_RruFPEPkI2QV6YvmREDSfZcZyBtRkDrbGHg6-fy4BOHoJejZJ7vzFsZmq-eIQwZlUkUHmreB7XhpW2zmNXBZ8sweyA0HImckyeo-BX2mPDyNGIiUy5X0V-SF5vJkSDdqPvM2bKR3EXvuc3275C3IXPUr5SFv15ALB80DmCI1IZz-PtK85WBTrcMLShiHXXJ55AAXDBDXxfvBly6a9HlK4mwGUiaUr2rER9kZIZyIXm1fuzwV2kTXI0KG1yvhvnL941SgSBH1MA26ebTO6UXMKZqCDHm8hMEZS1E4_AQpPQ_saclUfgRmRBsfrf8aWQacllEhF9i77FN_jk3GgV5TykpixpTWRQa9EdX09EX3ZAAxMjFL7wnw1LllKW2KY7q-NmmqlGRk7x) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The next big test for our campaign is coming.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s absolutely critical that we stay on track.
#
Peter,
Lucas launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th because Missouri can’t afford to send another fraud or coward to the U.S. Senate.
**As a 13-year Marine veteran, Lucas knows what it means to serve our country.** And as a Missourian who watched his own community be stripped for parts by massive corporations and corrupt elites like Hawley, he’s ready to fight back.
Our campaign is on a mission to give power back to everyday, working people — and Lucas is committed to building it the right way, with no money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives.
That’s why we need your help today: **Our next major FEC deadline is just around the corner, and we’re setting a mid-month goal of raising 7,000 donations by midnight on June 15 to help us stay on track.**
So now, we’re asking you to chip in $10 to make it happen.
**[Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you think is best right now to help our campaign stay on target to hit our next end-of-quarter goal ahead of our June FEC deadline? If we keep up this record-breaking momentum, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34027?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34028?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34027?refcode=em20230612-3254&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3254%2E614464%2ELWaRyG)

body:
Andy needs your support to ensure he has the resources to win re-election. Peter, did you see this? Republican polling firm Cygnal released its latest poll for the Kentucky governor's race... and it’s tight: **Governor Andy Beshear → 46.8%
Daniel Cameron → 46.7%** _**It doesn't get much closer than that.**_

And with Mitch McConnell in Daniel Cameron's corner and dark-money groups backing his campaign to defeat Andy, we need your help.

Our 30-day post-primary reporting deadline is coming up, so we’ll keep this brief — **here's a link where you can support Andy ahead of this important deadline if you’re able. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june-23?_link&personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64713269/411007202/907170691?refcode=em23_230612_dl2_fnd_gq_nopn___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230612_dl2_fnd_gq_nopn___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=198e9d8e-4209-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOThlOWQ4ZS00MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-HrZKbrVierfS8p7y0IalRO7OlbRC5aV7unWHmIBak=)**

Peter, Cameron’s allies are hoping to turn the governor's race into a national show to distract voters from the incredible job Andy is doing in Kentucky and the record progress his administration has made. Andy's opponent knows that if they spend enough money, they could rewrite the narrative and muffle our message and vision for Kentucky.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7v2nns2rqbfo3uv24dq82vjqpsjpdvbd3rtp6ro_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6cor2cth2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuq1plcom2jn2gpk4qd7o3720q40uv3pprvu1v3o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6cor2cth2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkjpdr2fiianuah4tekkesfo3540b8147j88bcoo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6cor2cth2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9voq351futhhm129iqke6uj6uja0q0jcm4orpo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6cor2cth2bs)
---

---

There’s a lot on the line in 2024. From a woman’s right to choose to our fundamental right to vote.

Pennsylvanians deserve an Attorney General ready and willing to take on tough fights and powerful special interests to guarantee every Pennsylvanians’ rights are protected.

You deserve an Attorney General with a proven record of taking on predatory student loan lenders, scammers, greedy pharmaceutical companies, corrupt politicians and government bureaucracies—and delivering results for all Pennsylvanians.

**I promise as your Attorney General, I’ll be that fighter for you.** [**Take a moment to watch my launch video and, if you’re ready to join our fight for Pennsylvanians’ rights, click here to pitch in a few dollars to put our campaign on the path to victory →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64713649/411008354/-414306994?refcode=email_061223_launchvid_t2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhZGRlOS00MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzzEiq0clqwWx_UmHXvJA3qqZ2rTgTW_iZXjAoYuVqQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64713650/411008361/-414306994?refcode=email_061223_launchvid_t2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhZGRlOS00MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzzEiq0clqwWx_UmHXvJA3qqZ2rTgTW_iZXjAoYuVqQ=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64713651/411008362/-414306994?refcode=email_061223_launchvid_t2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhZGRlOS00MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzzEiq0clqwWx_UmHXvJA3qqZ2rTgTW_iZXjAoYuVqQ=)

Here’s the deal team, I'm no stranger to tough fights.

As your former two-term Auditor General, I stood up for sexual assault survivors by taking on police bureaucracy to reduce the backlog in untested rape kits, leading to a 90% drop in the number of untested kits and an increase in the number of criminals being brought to justice.

I fought for more money in our classrooms by calling out corruption in our education system and cracking down on wasteful spending.

I demanded accountability for pharmaceutical companies that jack up seniors’ prescription drug prices and helped fuel the opioid epidemic.

I’ve taken on many powerful special interests in my time — and I’ve won.

Pennsylvanians deserve elected leaders who stand for fairness and integrity — leaders who will fight for your rights. But you also deserve someone who can get the job done and deliver results. That is the kind of Attorney General I’ll be for you.

[**I’m hoping you will support me in this race to become Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General by making a donation today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64713652/411008363/-414306994?refcode=email_061223_launchvid_t2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhZGRlOS00MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzzEiq0clqwWx_UmHXvJA3qqZ2rTgTW_iZXjAoYuVqQ=)

clean_body: Team, There’s a lot on the line in 2024. From a woman’s right to choose to our fundamental right to vote. Pennsylvanians deserve an Attorney General ready and willing to take on tough fights and powerful special interests to guarantee every Pennsylvanians’ rights are protected. You deserve an Attorney General with a proven record of taking on predatory student loan lenders, scammers, greedy pharmaceutical companies, corrupt politicians and government bureaucracies—and delivering results for all Pennsylvanians. I promise as your Attorney General, I’ll be that fighter for you. = = | | = Here’s the deal team, I'm no stranger to tough fights. As your former two-term Auditor General, I stood up for sexual assault survivors by taking on police bureaucracy to reduce the backlog in untested rape kits, leading to a 90% drop in the number of untested kits and an increase in the number of criminals being brought to justice. I fought for more money in our classrooms by calling out corruption in our education system and cracking down on wasteful spending. I demanded accountability for pharmaceutical companies that jack up seniors’ prescription drug prices and helped fuel the opioid epidemic. I’ve taken on many powerful special interests in my time — and I’ve won. Pennsylvanians deserve elected leaders who stand for fairness and integrity — leaders who will fight for your rights. But you also deserve someone who can get the job done and deliver results. name: Mike Pence
subject: I kept my Oath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
For four years I stood loyally by Donald Trump's side

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Mike Pence.

For four years I stood loyally by Donald Trump's side as we made great progress implementing conservative reforms. Unfortunately, on January 6th Donald Trump put himself over his country and the Constitution. In a business full of phonies, grifters, liars and cheaters I have faithfully executed the pledge I took, and I have no regrets.

I realize that standing for a core set of principals will invite attacks, but I will never apologize for standing strong, doing what is right and protecting our Constitution.
---
| | | [DEFEND OUR CONSTITUTION](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0019ead97ba5488684a89c7ab2313822&_e=oge5ki78ku2YA1eQ_aEFlUEOyxXrXaI6j1uLempSX2uP-973USHkXmK7VnIJWjdkG0vp06o6ZbiE-7titDr1pXHjeGJi-h0qnCqTH6nzlgVDktcwLBiEMe5XPORJPYPotSNypBainTg1g37SZiLv2z6OEW4gY3QsiqkTaHJF30TUEmRNpJrD40ivgYGLc_zB9eSKMuBW7aOKVj57Vyz5s-YWM0n9KYcjQhACm2EaQ7zj4ciysqvFCMFHK3w88rBELI_McgiI6fBi9Kq7TFAIvEA6SxAGx9uOhlgpOq1FXBlrKzANLJ7hmS3o5LVZBiUV-R4xkPNK28668nc9Db6qiQv4jE2TsOzCpyURBX6gxip4ikfAEJ9BG2Q2yTVmNg1lYaQSZhV4EQAY-1N25SdBwAT7PxDIi4bq5ZXzgeD8kItOj_Qg6AI5GsimPc8DxarZmhHWStC41Lp7YpFkXd8crA%3D%3D)

Friend, America is facing difficult times. Our politics are divided unlike ever before and the radical left has weaponized the media and the government against anyone who speaks out against their radical agenda.

It is time to end the chaos, end the lies and end this divisive culture that is taking over our nation. It is time to turn the page. I'm running to put God and the Constitution back to the forefront. Will you join me?

name: Colin Allred
subject: why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64714197/411010644/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2702-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MmJlNzNmLTQzMDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MIzWmgqS8a9DYHchUL3rugixVaGTQsDtOA03xK0whKY=) Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.

1\. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.

2\. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.
3\. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4sBflIwGVjFthVwLdSZ0267apOSKRJUysDqrd8wwqVX_Tziq_M5qNUQ9SzQ3_M_SOGHIDqLIy7_QRwBsNTuU-TfH8f-4Bz3p2GADkvhVFXm02sNfmYxL2SDZ2bFU-o3CW_d5uldLdYKL2dtmUdWxey1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4ulHIFGgE7S9Jvy36XSM4dj0buNApf2P42qvID9pg-nFlWiVHvAnHoLZUnGi-pitm6oix585McosQGPrC1Dzl1IGyPuH_C_uCWLPckvzbpDWQ5h_ACWPSRo3HTBz5g07prOOZCrcEDsL3n1CCVLChDM)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4sFntDdS56pv-S8ncZrFdp4SUUBDHr6RZ9g60j4FKac_twg0n7Y3EHha-xhY0dsm1tuGFK1Rdce2oc3egG7OhyV0ucrpPLg_c9yR3dV8A3vmPFCQsnA2_KL3218JbCq_B41HR1mb-oFhrMkBGMpOQu8)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4vPlUB6BV7X6GhWQM4-tmwnrYpMfamUOlh0hITxHAfNkyqI0MBIh_Jb0eJJ0t_snzKvlxmnsdmZuM0p1WeLQUaLGzZzvrbanxtyTPcr7q5578o2vUNuZeU85X-03tuMJCfXBzabOGnKAwRIbYZuBs3s) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4vYfhQaM5sA97LcQbkVAVta-Jys7dj1PkhkEWu4tqDR3piBi9iSQqchUaUAcYuIUUDdXqRKIHSg0f-jDlw1XrYM74VUt1TppTk9wTJnmEK1NzkIRi77QGsIg5vJvuq8-AH0ZgLG-eBuv4iVUs39xjBV)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42a1663a4b1c4eaab4e18f1f2d71e0a0&_e=UsljXsDWK_2baEQQexZF10xqmAZYaaPwfiQNTSfBQ1bq6za7wtqhw1enlIV6nkZaRK9qdBYxPLsDFiVm5iud5kkNNqJQZBafI0grQQYhMWVd18qWyBiyamEHuQDfRipq1wdTr8WGCRGH45PHEG3D3nKnWe0wTDQu15ZrplJzCKB05wKMSSaMIaEuPz7TB1AzSiVDzdf72SuYE96pEPjPQgxJyRTJYMwO8AOyAzTuun9N_K2Pu3ATMORwqAMXY9nmPkff2xnTilPOno9mMHswpYgqJSKXss2qzM41Hxi-Z4uUYaQZsFe_wHIwS9GY_BAUUiqWfZpvJFh-12WE8t-GVsWatMTB7V2bWmdoW3d95MSdPQaQJLJJ4RGfAKss-IjuNhxuHIe9bvvKxMC6Bqj8ULTk-JLTTHoyz71UJuUUNGSHJ4wmnl8lC6pcWgMiR6oy) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

subject: Trump's other properties must be searched for classified documents ASAP (sign the petition)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: Search Trump’s other Properties ASAP >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e0881b4-06eb-4161-b3c4-45da17a72606/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86abe86f-cc2d-40e3-86b8-7acc322ac674/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | With the jaw-dropping details of Trump's indictment now public, we know how profoundly dangerous Trump's mishandling of those documents at Mar-a-Lago was. He didn't just take them, he took top secret ones from property to property, putting our national security at grave risk. [**Which is why his other properties need to be searched as soon as possible.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T033d70dc-da08-4384-9008-98d6ee99e90f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) What else is he hiding? What other top secret war plans is he showing to random visitors? What else is he leaving completely unsecured next to toilets? (Reading material, anyone?) We need to get those documents back, and we need to do so ASAP. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump's other properties be searched NOW. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf27d2ee1-5bac-4e9a-80b3-e80a57b11228/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Contribute $25 or more and we’ll send you a free “Tax the Rich” pin as a thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Your support would have a major impact on the future of this campaign and this plan. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64731622/411050986/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14I_PIN_C_20230612_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjAxM2FlMS02NjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTTIKPUUW1_EJ9-daaH5kduiYMvEST4S4p-DvICOaCs=&emci=43e572f4-5b09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8f013ae1-6609-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
After the debt ceiling debate last month, where Republicans did everything they could to cut funding for critical programs that working families rely on, Elizabeth is more committed than ever to one of her core plans: WE MUST TAX THE RICH. By getting the wealthy and well-connected to pay a fair share, we can build a future for all of our kids. But we don’t get what we don’t fight for — and it’s time to raise our voices. [**To make our message loud and clear, we’re giving away free “Tax the Rich” pins to everyone who makes a contribution of $25 or more to support our movement. body:

| |

| | | **BREAKING:_TRUMP INDICTED _**
Yesterday was a dark day in the United States.

It is unconscionable for President Joe Biden to INDICT the leading candidate opposing him as he himself kept classified documents for DECADES.

I and House Republicans are standing with President Trump over the ABUSE OF POWER that the Biden DOJ has unleashed.
**Every American who believes in the rule of law should stand with President Trump against this grave injustice.**
You may be sitting at home wishing that you could do something. I understand the feeling - but I am also here to tell you that there IS something that you can do.

We need every patriot reading this message to GO ON THE RECORD to defend the ideals that make this country great. _**[Take 2 minutes to add your name to stand with House Republicans to END the witch hunts against President Trump.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f5a385e471c24e9d8151c2b1c669a566&_e=E-DxXJiK5A8ze2T-WWn9dPZOYgW8CzqLHjjMPodmJbUSWrwnvBixuk0BByKAZ_a6G52oWXECJV7kh19JC6VTbLozKTjIrEBj2wJM2HHsv60lvlbTJiu-z_KtNAhjTs7ffA7S9lRTzTimVdOexn6u_P5B4_VBu5sfhQ3dlTjsxUA1LxIsxMwDYgusKuCQVTRzTJ6sTsKtFQx2hpqyjWDxG4oHd2yfyYhj0IeQmNQmfsbZPWAROL3gkJ39n_8NZfUm2XDj1wTw5snqrGCk9zrUDBbHetT657ZiWzv6hKSVYXIVlx-HBxtAEKfrCbWqWCCPceb8em3A1L1D_s2FRsf3bD3B69K9CaOFadVsGt9BTNkeST8q4EE6RbmbOGxNudDjBNAqj-FN568KG_-cRIzk4kkNcUNPUrlCPg8RRm55vLg2nso9hiRqqEpTZUrQuebXmpN0zuevlWi5t12rhLI7jXVcQ7Xdmg4KJs6lyO6sStk%3D "Take 2 minutes to add your name to stand with House Republicans to END the witch hunts against President Trump.")**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: Decline is NOT inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
A social agenda has no place within our armed forces... | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7533a36d2d&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend, I'm running for President because I don't believe the decline of our country is inevitable. I believe it's a choice that stands before us. **We have it in our power to choose a better path—a path that's going to lead to the revival of this country and a restoration of American Greatness.**
---
| | [STAND UP FOR AMERICA—JOIN THE FIGHT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f638eb20e1&e=84ee529f47)
---
I believe in this American Greatness, FNAME. I’ve spent my life fighting for it. Long before I was elected governor, I served our nation in Iraq as a JAG officer in support of SEAL Team 1. Having seen what the attacks of September 11th did to our country, I felt a responsibility to do my part to help at a time of struggle. _**So I served**_. Friend, the sense of satisfaction I got knowing that I was wearing the cloth of my country, serving alongside so many honorable patriots, and fighting for something bigger than myself was a satisfaction that money just can't buy. Today, our country has lost its sense of national pride.
* Instead of strengthening our military recruiting efforts and building a military for the future...
* Instead of securing our border and holding Mexican drug cartels accountable for the irrevocable harm they’ve done to our citizens...
* And instead of reigning in out-of-control economic and fiscal policy that have left us on the brink of bankruptcy...

...**the Left has been too busy distracting our nation with the woke Olympics.** I find this unacceptable. _**I am ready to keep my campaign promises, restore an energetic executive to the White House, and get the job done**_. I recently took my message directly to the people of Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, and I will continue to spread the message each and every day until we’ve won...until we’ve righted this ship...until we’ve achieved our Great American Comeback.
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=43e9e87487&e=84ee529f47)
---
We are at a critical juncture. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. I need your help, friend. This cannot stand. [**Will you fight with me?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ed202b3559&e=84ee529f47 "Will you fight with me?")
---
| | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=48e68b6e27&e=84ee529f47)
---

In Freedom,

---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=486fe2f808&e=84ee529f47)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=97e912e32c&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: The Flyover
subject: Just Real News; No Bull SH**
body:
No Clickbait – No woke Agenda – No Wasting Time

| [No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8lj3iufalt3teg3if2071o66q89d1ks9o95i1d8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg66o35c3h2bs)

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdb8jkj4kp9kiv8lmfq69t4u2eabiradqcrag3t8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg66o35c3h2bs)
**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu1dbd70ogs2fegmjrlqtuj6gd2ehs0muo8om5k0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg66o35c3h2bs)

Instead of being a Fake News victim — sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlg2t9hcpnc21scitnbap5500idj4gcpafvvv6ag_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg66o35c3h2bs). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

* | _The chance to join for free is a limited time offer and once we're out of spots it may not be offered again. We are 100% committed to delivering TRUE news that is easy to read & timely, but we can't keep it free forever. Get your spot now before we run out of room!_
---|---

[Easy to read - Breaking News - Relevant Stories - Direct To You](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zknp1or7ta8k0nohqm7ph220b7jrviofv8i5vs7g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg66o35c3h2bs)

>> | News with just FACTS - Direct to your inbox.
---|---

| In an effort to bring you the best candidates running for the Mississippi legislature, we have continued to evaluate and research those seeking office. Today, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus is recommending and endorsing two additional candidates. These two men have a proven record as fighters for conservative values and principles. When elected, we know they will continue to fight for you and defend your values and principles.Please research and learn more about these patriots, give them your support and help them win this election on August 8.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Are you ready to fight like hell?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Friend, We are facing an unprecedented, historic moment for democracy. What’s more, MAGA extremists aren’t backing down from their efforts to roll back progress we have made together against all odds. There are so many moments from the last few years where it has felt like everything was on the line. When the Supreme Court voted to turn back the clock and overturn _Roe v. Wade,_ a right afforded to Americans for nearly 50 years was stripped away. It horrified me to think that my daughters would have fewer rights than I did. So, while other states were restricting access and passing hateful laws,**I vowed to fight like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms. You showed up in record numbers to fight like hell, too. And we won. ** For years, the collective power of your support and commitment to action has transformed countless lives in Michigan and across the country. But there’s more work to do. While others engaged in the business of bigotry, we’ve been fighting in Michigan to do things differently. We repealed the 1931 law banning abortion, expanded LGBTQ+ rights, signed gun safety laws, repealed the retirement tax, and boosted the Working Families Tax Credit. And we’re not stopping there. This is a moment when our fight must stretch beyond Michigan and reach the entire country. **That’s why I’m proud to announce that we’re launching Fight Like Hell PAC — to bring our fight for fundamental freedoms nationwide. ** **[I hope you’ll join me in this fight: If you’re ready to fight like hell with me — will you chip in right now to support our movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64716520/411017063/-802841213?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230612_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzViNDQ4ZGItNDgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mUffm0wsyMWA9VoIyS18POzfXYMS7Dxhw6dHCDtA4SM=)** | | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64716521/411017065/-802841213?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230612_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzViNDQ4ZGItNDgwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mUffm0wsyMWA9VoIyS18POzfXYMS7Dxhw6dHCDtA4SM=)
---
Our vision is simple: We’re going to elect leaders who will fight like hell to defend working people and protect our fundamental rights — _no matter how loud the opposition is_.
We’ll focus the next two years on supporting President Biden and Vice President Harris’ re-election campaign and helping Democrats that fight like hell to flip the House and defend the Senate, ensuring that _our_ voice is heard in Washington.
We know that MAGA extremists aren’t just dead set on undermining the progress we’ve made in Michigan. They want to roll back progress in all 50 states. We cannot let them undo everything we’ve accomplished together.
**That’s why we have to fight like hell**.
**[So, if you’re with me, please chip in to join our movement today. name: BREAKING: President Trump Indicted (via NRSC)
subject: This can’t continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

subject: Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison...”

| |

---
| | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump 's new federal indictment:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvmt1huo16dpchsvskmcpld1fk6kfvkvde78rgg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eoj4c3h2bs "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment:")**_

**" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want."**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znogrknc11fr4ngoevggmp8a7cn6hrp0clcqgj8o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eoj4c3h2bs "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6agg1fknvqrj6ftsfrkm23jv1h132gdng147s5o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eoj4c3h2bs "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjh6jpgs1pgkui7rrojlhlak5fp4sofq8q5mdse8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eob0c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z26qhg91rp34r29n2dv9jrp098642veqc30qfs00_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eob0c3h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zskk1m1o47t544i0e8cu38sp8qaii4gcjetclpc0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdg6eob0c3h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Alabama Republicans rigged the maps. This is what happened:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Redistricting ruling suggests SCOTUS “wrongly gave Republicans control of the House”
| **Legal scholar: Redistricting ruling suggests SCOTUS “wrongly gave Republicans control of the House”** Team, this is huge. In a surprise ruling, the Supreme Court voted in favor of voting rights, striking down a redrawn congressional map that deliberately marginalized the power of Black voters in Alabama. **Here are two things we know:**
1. This ruling will impact similar cases across the country, including in Louisiana, Georgia, and possibly even Texas — forcing states to redraw their unfair maps.

2. These changes will empower voters of color and _help Democrats retake the House majority across the country_.

It's clear that unfair maps have played an enormous role in silencing the voices of the many for the interests of the few. That's why Ohio Democrats are fighting back, **and we can't do it without your support, team.**

Ohio will once again be drawing new maps this year after politicians snuck through Republican-rigged maps last cycle. We need to be ready to fight with everything we have to make sure Ohioans are fairly represented at the statehouse and in Congress.

**[We refuse to let Republicans win by rigging the maps in their favor. Will you chip in $5 or more today to help fund our grassroots efforts to take back the House majority in 2024? clean_body: Redistricting ruling suggests SCOTUS “wrongly gave Republicans control of the House” | Legal scholar: Redistricting ruling suggests SCOTUS “wrongly gave Republicans control of the House” Team, this is huge. In a surprise ruling, the Supreme Court voted in favor of voting rights, striking down a redrawn congressional map that deliberately marginalized the power of Black voters in Alabama. Here are two things we know: 1. This ruling will impact similar cases across the country, including in Louisiana, Georgia, and possibly even Texas — forcing states to redraw their unfair maps. 2. These changes will empower voters of color and help Democrats retake the House majority across the country. It's clear that unfair maps have played an enormous role in silencing the voices of the many for the interests of the few. That's why Ohio Democrats are fighting back, and we can't do it without your support, team. Ohio will once again be drawing new maps this year after politicians snuck through Republican-rigged maps last cycle. We need to be ready to fight with everything we have to make sure Ohioans are fairly represented at the statehouse and in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. subject: How to choose the right candidate

Every year there is an election. President? US Senator? Congressman? Sometimes its Governor, Lt. Governor, State Representative or local mayor or aldermen. There are a lot of decisions you must make, and every election seems to be "the most important of our lifetime."

---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/how-to-choose-the-right-candidate?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..nyZjFfm-ai5melhesjJVN0htec_5SBEPACePmoSHFx4?)

[](https://substack.cc/redirect/8e44c675-0747-4e56-b118-ebac031ccee7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Photo by [visuals](https://substack.cc/redirect/016e2067-5060-4240-b77c-4e45fad72089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.cc/redirect/a8cfb362-be32-4fb0-b5fc-8ee0a53e3db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Every year there is an election. President? US Senator? Congressman? Sometimes its Governor, Lt. Governor, State Representative or local mayor or aldermen. There are a lot of decisions you must make, and every election seems to be "the most important of our lifetime."
Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTE2ODM1MTA5LCJzIjoxNTI2NzgxLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjg2NTk0MTg1LCJleHAiOjE2ODkxODYxODUsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.gnLvGEu7T_8-zZVXe2fldYaGXHNf-hLgr-hn98qZ_tg?)
So how do you choose? How do you decide for whom to vote?
Since I've been in politics, I've learned some of the common ways election decisions are made and most are not the right way to choose an elected official.
As the election approaches, we see more yard signs, we hear radio and TV ads and get cards delivered to our mailbox. None of these really tell you much about the candidate because each candidate works on three or four points they feel will connect with the majority of their voters. These points are generally written to allow the prospective voter to "interpret" the meaning to suit their beliefs.
Unfortunately, most elections come down to name ID. The candidate with the greatest name ID wins. I've also learned that where a candidate's name is placed on the ballot makes a big difference in some elections. The name Adams, will be listed before the other candidates with names like Smith or Zolkalski so the candidate with the last name Adams gets the advantage if it's a close race.
So, all of this begs the question: **How should you choose a candidate?**
If you are a political junky you may want to begin researching candidates on your own. Listen to political speeches and ask questions. You will need to ask specific questions of the candidates, record answers, and compare each candidate to your values and ideas. But unless you devote a large amount of time and energy to this pursuit you will never get a good picture of all the candidates.
But it's not impossible to be an informed voter.
Probably the single most important way to become an informed voter is to seek organizations that promote the ideals and policies that fit your views.
As a conservative, who is pro-life, pro-second amendment, and one who believes our lives are better served by a limited government, I seek organizations who promote those ideals.
**How to choose an organization**
Be careful with single issue organizations. Take their endorsement with a grain of salt. Politicians lie to these organizations. I know of several times when a candidate convinced a state organization he was on their side, but within minutes of being elected reversed his position. Don't forget, Politicians Lie! Watch what they do, how they vote, not just what they say.
The NRA is probably the largest single-issue organization that endorses candidates in the nation, but politicians have learned how to manipulate their endorsement. The NRA has endorsed politicians who claim to support second amendment rights but fight to limit gun rights in other ways. I'm not saying an NRA endorsement is useless, but it is not a guarantee the candidate will be good for our state or nation.
Also, some organizations use endorsements as ways to get their bills passed. Empower Mississippi used to be an organization that only endorsed strong liberty minded candidates but have recently changed their strategy. Now we find them promoting incumbents who vote for their specific bill but support many other issues that are contrary to the conservative people of Mississippi. Senator Kevin Blackwell has fought against tax cuts, voted for tax increases and opposed legislation to make healthcare more affordable and available (because he owns a healthcare facility). He was called a "champion" by Empower Mississippi because he supported one of their bills. Rep. Shanda Yates, one of the most "woke" liberal members of the Mississippi legislature, was crowned by Empower Mississippi with a "Rise Award" because of one issue. Again, I'm not saying these organizations are useless but the endorsements of organizations like these should be considered carefully.
**Here are some of the organizations I trust:**
**The Mississippi Freedom Caucus**
The [Mississippi Freedom Caucus](https://substack.cc/redirect/bff81054-2379-4a61-bc9a-cd62c0fe0c9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) requires candidates they endorse to complete a lengthy questionnaire and an interview. Each candidate is discussed among the caucus members and the steering committee. The answers of each candidate are researched and compared to the stated values and principles of the Freedom Caucus. Also, if the candidate has served in any elected position in the past, their voting record and history in that position is researched. No candidate is endorsed unless they meet the strict standards of the caucus and can show the caucus proof that once elected, they will not betray their beliefs and principles.
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus also tracks every vote made by the Mississippi legislature and grades every bill. On the Caucus' bill tracker every bill is rated RED - YELLOW - GREEN. This research is available to you so you can do your own personal research at [www.FreedomVotes.ms](https://substack.cc/redirect/6f7a63b1-82ca-43d7-8402-5e4d3babe539?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If your candidate has voted for bills that have been scored RED they are voting against your liberty and freedom.
**Restore-Liberty**
Restore Liberty is a national organization that has a Mississippi chapter. Restore Liberty does extensive research on candidates and has one of the strictest endorsement qualifications in the state. They will also revoke endorsements if a candidate is elected and betrays their principles. To find out who they have endorsed in Mississippi go to: [https://restore-liberty.org/endorsements/mississippi-endorsements/](https://substack.cc/redirect/4d4c724a-0ead-4066-819c-2b967585207d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**American Conservative Union**
The American Conservative Union (ACU) produces a scorecard of state and federal legislators. Check out how your legislator scored. [http://ratings.conservative.org/people?state=MS](https://substack.cc/redirect/82a08cff-4a87-4595-a9f0-1307a02ef2f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Unfortunately, people tend to complain about politicians except their own. Incumbents generally get re-elected because people just vote for who they know. Don't vote for friends, church members, co-workers, just because you know them.
The decisions that are going to be made by those you elect shape the future of our nation, our state, and our communities. These decisions are too important to simply vote for someone who is a friend.
This is not about friendship, its about saving our country by advancing conservative principles.
Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
