clean_body: Every year there is an election. President? US Senator? Congressman? Sometimes its Governor, Lt. Governor, State Representative or local mayor or aldermen. There are a lot of decisions you must make, and every election seems to be "the most important of our lifetime." | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Jun 12 | | | | | | | | | | by on Every year there is an election. President? US Senator? Congressman? Sometimes its Governor, Lt. Governor, State Representative or local mayor or aldermen. There are a lot of decisions you must make, and every election seems to be "the most important of our lifetime." Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? So how do you choose? How do you decide for whom to vote? Since I've been in politics, I've learned some of the common ways election decisions are made and most are not the right way to choose an elected official. As the election approaches, we see more yard signs, we hear radio and TV ads and get cards delivered to our mailbox. None of these really tell you much about the candidate because each candidate works on three or four points they feel will connect with the majority of their voters. These points are generally written to allow the prospective voter to "interpret" the meaning to suit their beliefs. Unfortunately, most elections come down to name ID. The candidate with the greatest name ID wins. I've also learned that where a candidate's name is placed on the ballot makes a big difference in some elections. The name Adams, will be listed before the other candidates with names like Smith or Zolkalski so the candidate with the last name Adams gets the advantage if it's a close race. So, all of this begs the question: How should you choose a candidate? If you are a political junky you may want to begin researching candidates on your own. Listen to political speeches and ask questions. You will need to ask specific questions of the candidates, record answers, and compare each candidate to your values and ideas. But unless you devote a large amount of time and energy to this pursuit you will never get a good picture of all the candidates. But it's not impossible to be an informed voter. Probably the single most important way to become an informed voter is to seek organizations that promote the ideals and policies that fit your views. As a conservative, who is pro-life, pro-second amendment, and one who believes our lives are better served by a limited government, I seek organizations who promote those ideals. How to choose an organization Be careful with single issue organizations. Take their endorsement with a grain of salt. Politicians lie to these organizations. I know of several times when a candidate convinced a state organization he was on their side, but within minutes of being elected reversed his position. Don't forget, Politicians Lie! Watch what they do, how they vote, not just what they say. The NRA is probably the largest single-issue organization that endorses candidates in the nation, but politicians have learned how to manipulate their endorsement. The NRA has endorsed politicians who claim to support second amendment rights but fight to limit gun rights in other ways. I'm not saying an NRA endorsement is useless, but it is not a guarantee the candidate will be good for our state or nation. Also, some organizations use endorsements as ways to get their bills passed. Empower Mississippi used to be an organization that only endorsed strong liberty minded candidates but have recently changed their strategy. Now we find them promoting incumbents who vote for their specific bill but support many other issues that are contrary to the conservative people of Mississippi. Senator Kevin Blackwell has fought against tax cuts, voted for tax increases and opposed legislation to make healthcare more affordable and available (because he owns a healthcare facility). He was called a "champion" by Empower Mississippi because he supported one of their bills. Rep. Shanda Yates, one of the most "woke" liberal members of the Mississippi legislature, was crowned by Empower Mississippi with a "Rise Award" because of one issue. Again, I'm not saying these organizations are useless but the endorsements of organizations like these should be considered carefully. Here are some of the organizations I trust: The Mississippi Freedom Caucus The requires candidates they endorse to complete a lengthy questionnaire and an interview. Each candidate is discussed among the caucus members and the steering committee. The answers of each candidate are researched and compared to the stated values and principles of the Freedom Caucus. Also, if the candidate has served in any elected position in the past, their voting record and history in that position is researched. No candidate is endorsed unless they meet the strict standards of the caucus and can show the caucus proof that once elected, they will not betray their beliefs and principles. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus also tracks every vote made by the Mississippi legislature and grades every bill. On the Caucus' bill tracker every bill is rated RED - YELLOW - GREEN. This research is available to you so you can do your own personal research at . If your candidate has voted for bills that have been scored RED they are voting against your liberty and freedom. Restore-Liberty Restore Liberty is a national organization that has a Mississippi chapter. Restore Liberty does extensive research on candidates and has one of the strictest endorsement qualifications in the state. They will also revoke endorsements if a candidate is elected and betrays their principles. To find out who they have endorsed in Mississippi go to: American Conservative Union The American Conservative Union (ACU) produces a scorecard of state and federal legislators. Check out how your legislator scored. Unfortunately, people tend to complain about politicians except their own. Incumbents generally get re-elected because people just vote for who they know. Don't vote for friends, church members, co-workers, just because you know them. The decisions that are going to be made by those you elect shape the future of our nation, our state, and our communities. These decisions are too important to simply vote for someone who is a friend. This is not about friendship, its about saving our country by advancing conservative principles. Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi ? | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

name: Mike Pushkin
subject: WV GOP DEFENDS TRUMP AFTER INDICTMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Friend,
After his seven-count indictment last week under the Espionage Act for obstruction of justice, destruction and falsification of records, and conspiracy and false statements, national Republican leaders like former National Security Advisor John Bolton and former Attorney General Bill Barr came out hard against their former boss. Bolton said, " Donald Trump should immediately withdraw as a candidate for President . Criminal Charges are piling up around him. If Trump truly stood for America First policies, he would support the rule of law instead of continually flouting it.”
Bill Barr said, Trump was no “victim of a witch hunt," and he was “shocked by the degree of sensitivity at these documents and how many there were.” Barr ominously concluded the former President “is toast.”
Meanwhile, West Virginia Republicans have been tripping all over themselves to see how far they can go in their defense of Trump. It’s as if Governor Justice and his fellow WV GOP leaders are trying to prove that Trump was right when he infamously said, “I could stand in the middle of Fifth Avenue and shoot somebody, and I wouldn’t lose any voters.”
That’s what we’re up against in West Virginia. There is virtually no crime too serious or no statement so egregious that West Virginia Republican leadership wont rush to Trump's support. For them, the rule of law means nothing and allegiance to Trump means everything. When uncritical allegiance to a politician is more important than our laws and constitution we are clearly living in dangerous times .
Please help the West Virginia Democratic Party fight back with a contribution today. It’s critical that we elect more Democrats to state government to stand up to the ultra MAGA loyalists who put Trump first and West Virginia last!

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c6d0f642a3040b980e278600f1801b2&_e=sDneuAbHAw0MPPvFJn1P1vqFi6n2AecnNTk0hOTOfbUetv5DNhd36c-nFKDM04Rq-rolH5lmepskCkBczOFm1ZdyKHba7HvVtvQPyWZgoxft2iIcx1oV3aNBhwWH30rZCxYScF7Wwyk8wHD3Q8JT0yWmI7d_1dvcZHDhgSqo44auca7in37iT6WmTpW9bIThFQ9P4A0cSrOnk6QJTLpfnWCyGamXx_7mQiwx6ux75x8PPqrnjKVVPth_UMp6V7ey) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c6d0f642a3040b980e278600f1801b2&_e=sDneuAbHAw0MPPvFJn1P1vqFi6n2AecnNTk0hOTOfbUetv5DNhd36c-nFKDM04Rq-rolH5lmepskCkBczOFm1ZdyKHba7HvVtvQPyWZgoxdh3EurYbtjUJHM21p8hTteGclkobRVynuwsJEepz3bJqhD7_wDBTcHwOVHd_xCrKSTY_bfddnKIjTUO8EmiN8ONB46h3Tkenzk1ybFIH82l71FOvCjCLmIhmRzA23OMlHbOXkb1LDEnEJxI7tSxHu7) Regards, Maria Bonaventura

clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..." What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scotty=20Moore=20for=20Florida?=
subject: Scotty Moore to Run for Florida House of Representatives District 35!
disclaimer_text: Paid For and Approved by Scotty Moore, Republican, for State Representative, District 35
body:
Florida. First. Patriot. runs to Keep. Florida. Free. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/scottymooreforcongress/keepfloridafree?e=5e611ce1ba)
---
[](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=7f5e068f52&e=5e611ce1ba)
# SCOTTY MOORE ANNOUNCES RUN FOR FLORIDA HOUSE DISTRICT 35
### ORLANDO - On Monday, June 10th, Republican Scotty Moore announced his intenton to seek the Florida House of Representatives, District 35 seat. The seat is currently held by State Representative Fred Hawkins. Hawkins recently announced he will resign from that seat to pursue a state government position. There will likely be a special election in upcoming months.
“Ester and I are honored to announce that I am seeking the position to serve our community and state as Republican candidate for Florida House District 35,” Moore began. “We cannot allow the woke, radical agenda that the Democrats ascribe to and push to gain any foothold in Florida. We must protect and continue to enhance the conservative policies being put forward by the State Legislature and Governor Ron DeSantis’ bold leadership. I believe it is essential we: Keep. Florida. Free. Moore ran for United States Congress in 2022, becoming the Republican nominee by winning a multi-candidate primary with 61% of the votes cast.
[](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=a8268ecd8a&e=5e611ce1ba)
For over 20 years, Scotty worked at the largest Christian mission organization in the world, Campus Crusade for Christ; now known as Cru.
Throughout his career, Scotty has made it his mission to help people know Jesus and help transform their lives. He has the unique ability to connect with anyone, anywhere, anytime - leveraging his highly dynamic and energetic personality to win people over. He excels in casting vision, telling stories and developing lasting relationships that produce next-level results.
Scotty has coached people to reach their dream weight, assisted struggling marriages, coached individuals in their leadership and personal development and helped struggling businesses steady the ship and set a course for the future. He has traveled extensively and lived in Brazil for 6 years where he married his wife and learned to speak Portuguese on the streets of Brazil.
He strongly believes not all leaders are alike and that we need patriots who will courageously defend the Constitution, promote conservative principles that honor God and KEEP. FLORIDA. FREE.
Scotty holds a B.A. in Communication and has been married to Ester for 20 years. They have two daughters.

clean_body: Florida. First. Patriot. runs to Keep. Florida. Free. | | | | | SCOTTY MOORE ANNOUNCES RUN FOR FLORIDA HOUSE DISTRICT 35 ORLANDO - On Monday, June 10th, Republican Scotty Moore announced his intenton to seek the Florida House of Representatives, District 35 seat. The seat is currently held by State Representative Fred Hawkins. Hawkins recently announced he will resign from that seat to pursue a state government position. There will likely be a special election in upcoming months. “Ester and I are honored to announce that I am seeking the position to serve our community and state as Republican candidate for Florida House District 35,” Moore began. “We cannot allow the woke, radical agenda that the Democrats ascribe to and push to gain any foothold in Florida. We must protect and continue to enhance the conservative policies being put forward by the State Legislature and Governor Ron DeSantis’ bold leadership. I believe it is essential we: Keep. Florida. Free. Moore ran for United States Congress in 2022, becoming the Republican nominee by winning a multi-candidate primary with 61% of the votes cast. For over 20 years, Scotty worked at the largest Christian mission organization in the world, Campus Crusade for Christ; now known as Cru. Throughout his career, Scotty has made it his mission to help people know Jesus and help transform their lives. He has the unique ability to connect with anyone, anywhere, anytime - leveraging his highly dynamic and energetic personality to win people over. He excels in casting vision, telling stories and developing lasting relationships that produce next-level results. Scotty has coached people to reach their dream weight, assisted struggling marriages, coached individuals in their leadership and personal development and helped struggling businesses steady the ship and set a course for the future. He has traveled extensively and lived in Brazil for 6 years where he married his wife and learned to speak Portuguese on the streets of Brazil. He strongly believes not all leaders are alike and that we need patriots who will courageously defend the Constitution, promote conservative principles that honor God and KEEP. FLORIDA. FREE. Scotty holds a B.A. in Communication and has been married to Ester for 20 years. They have two daughters. | | | | | | ---|---|--- | [Political Advertisement Paid For and Approved by Scotty Moore, Republican, for State Representative, District 35.]() 838 River Boat CircleOrlando, FL 32828 | | | Want to change how you receive these emails or feel you received this email by mistake? Friend,
In roughly 24 hours, I will be **ARRAIGNED** in federal court despite having committed _no crime_ whatsoever.
The price to save our country is high in Crooked Joe’s America: vicious attacks, endless witch hunts, and politically charged indictments and arrests.
_**But if this is the cost to see our mission through to the end, to restore our free Republic, and to revive the greatest country in the history of the world, then it’s a price I’m willing to pay.**_
You see, Biden, the radical Democrats, and the Deep State all believed that after Soros’ hand-picked _state_ prosecutor failed to break us, that this _federal_ indictment would finally bring our movement to its knees.
The truth is, I could walk into the courthouse tomorrow, throw in the towel, denounce our mission to save America, and end our 2024 campaign, and magically, the charges would disappear.
**But rest assured, Friend, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny!**
Which is why despite their vicious attacks, our campaign to Make America Great Again carries on all the same.
_**And when these sick and twisted radicals see that even tomorrow’s events will NOT break our movement, then in that very moment, they’ll know they’ve already LOST.**_
No matter what happens tomorrow, our resolve to SAVE AMERICA has never been stronger!

clean_body: The price to save our country is high, but it’s a price I’m willing to pay. | | | Friend, In roughly 24 hours, I will be ARRAIGNED in federal court despite having committed no crime whatsoever. The price to save our country is high in Crooked Joe’s America: vicious attacks, endless witch hunts, and politically charged indictments and arrests. But if this is the cost to see our mission through to the end, to restore our free Republic, and to revive the greatest country in the history of the world, then it’s a price I’m willing to pay. You see, Biden, the radical Democrats, and the Deep State all believed that after Soros’ hand-picked state prosecutor failed to break us, that this federal indictment would finally bring our movement to its knees. The truth is, I could walk into the courthouse tomorrow, throw in the towel, denounce our mission to save America, and end our 2024 campaign, and magically, the charges would disappear. But rest assured, Friend, I will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny! Which is why despite their vicious attacks, our campaign to Make America Great Again carries on all the same. And when these sick and twisted radicals see that even tomorrow’s events will NOT break our movement, then in that very moment, they’ll know they’ve already LOST. No matter what happens tomorrow, our resolve to SAVE AMERICA has never been stronger! | Thank you, God bless you, and God bless America, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Konnech Twitter thread and our Petition for Congressional hearings.
body:
We will not quit. | | | | | |
---
| | **Connect with us on Locals or Onward - tonight, 6/12 @ 7p et**
---
Hi Friend!
Last week we launched a new informational website to address growing concerns over foreign involvement in U.S. elections.
[**www.stopccpelectionfraud.com**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10d132dd5f&e=ad8cba7e98)
The website contains research from [**open.ink**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4f5915935a&e=ad8cba7e98) along with a **petition and contact information for elected officials.** Our goal is to have Congressional Hearings on this matter to fully expose, address, and resolve subversions to our election process before the 2024 election season. There is no time to waste - these are critical issues of national security.
The effort started off with a comprehensive Twitter thread from an independent researcher. He broke the story into a series of tweets. [ **Here’s the full thread.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8256cb696e&e=ad8cba7e98) These tweets are being seen by millions of Americans, and it’s just one of many messaging layers.
We are also providing updated briefings to key congressional leaders. Letters were sent prior to the incarceration of Gregg Phillips and myself in the hopes that they would take action. At that time, they did not engage.
Now, with news breaking daily revealing past and present orchestrations of election interference including the unprecedented indictment of a former president and leading Republican party nominee, it is clearer than ever that the American people must force their elected representatives to lead, follow, or get out of the way.
We will not quit.
This is one of several fronts that True the Vote is pressing forward on. The workload is overwhelming - but our Republic is worth it.
What can you do?
Right now, you can[ **click the link to sign the petition on the Stop CCP Election Fraud website.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8296c34f99&e=ad8cba7e98)**** It’s a small thing that everyone can do - and it does make a difference.
This evening at 7p et, you can join me on one of these platforms to catch up on all the latest.
[**Catherine Engelbrecht Community on LOCALS**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10bbf30b65&e=ad8cba7e98)
[**ONWARD.SOCIAL**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5f390de9bd&e=ad8cba7e98)
If you can’t join us live, no worries, the podcast will be taped and posted on both platforms.
**And immediately after the podcast we are all headed over to the Patriot Games channel at 9p et for a time of prayer in advance of President Trump’s arraignment on Tuesday, June 13th.**
[**You can join the prayer time by clicking here at 9p et**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6354b68bf5&e=ad8cba7e98)****
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a9b57e8748&e=ad8cba7e98)

Ever onward-
PS - We are excited about the future, but we need support to make it a reality. [**If you can donate, or better yet, become a recurring donor, please do.** ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fe5a332693&e=ad8cba7e98) The battles are bigger than ever.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1db487d050&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=fcab1d6639) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=fcab1d6639).
|

body:
VA-10 shifted right by 11 points in 2022, and it's guaranteed to be a top Republican target in 2024

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727674/411032537/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230612MM_MM_HQ_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTY2YzBkMy01NjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xm-nzI5ldjbiwpS6-KBlx78orxg8n-CjQAm2LIrLCWU=)

Look, here's why our mid-month fundraising deadline this week is critical:
* Jennifer just faced her closest race yet, as her district shifted eleven points to the right from 2020 to 2022.
* VA-10 is going to be a top Republican target again, and they'll be working to beat us to the punch in early field, digital, and TV communications.
* **We won't keep pace with the GOP if we fail to meet our fundraising benchmarks — and we need to raise $5,828 more by our deadline on Thursday.**

**[It's going to take a team effort to reach our goal this week, but we'll be in a good position if 30 more supporters pitch in by this time tomorrow. ---
Jennifer's pitch is simple: she's successfully worked to deliver jobs and economic relief to Northern Virginia, and helped pass historic legislation to revitalize our infrastructure, improve access to public transportation and broadband, lower the cost of prescription drugs, invest in climate protection and clean energy, and protect Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security from Republican budget cuts.

But that message will be lost in the shuffle if the GOP starts outspending us. And if we fall short of our fundraising goals, we risk giving them an opening.

So we're counting on you. It's because of supporters like you that Jennifer's won tough races in the past – and we'll need that same groundswell of grassroots energy this time around.

clean_body: VA-10 shifted right by 11 points in 2022, and it's guaranteed to be a top Republican target in 2024 = Look, here's why our mid-month fundraising deadline this week is critical: Jennifer just faced her closest race yet, as her district shifted eleven points to the right from 2020 to 2022. VA-10 is going to be a top Republican target again, and they'll be working to beat us to the punch in early field, digital, and TV communications. We won't keep pace with the GOP if we fail to meet our fundraising benchmarks — and we need to raise $5,828 more by our deadline on Thursday. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Jennifer's pitch is simple: she's successfully worked to deliver jobs and economic relief to Northern Virginia, and helped pass historic legislation to revitalize our infrastructure, improve access to public transportation and broadband, lower the cost of prescription drugs, invest in climate protection and clean energy, and protect Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security from Republican budget cuts. But that message will be lost in the shuffle if the GOP starts outspending us. And if we fall short of our fundraising goals, we risk giving them an opening. So we're counting on you. It's because of supporters like you that Jennifer's won tough races in the past – and we'll need that same groundswell of grassroots energy this time around. = Thank you! Team Wexton Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. subject: The stakes in Virginia are higher than ever:
body:
Youngkin has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time. Could you imagine what Republicans would be capable of if they gain full control of the state this year? | | |

| | Virginia’s Republican governor, Glenn Youngkin, raised a record-breaking nearly **$2.7 million** in the first quarter of the year. **That’s a staggering amount of money in a key state.** Even worse, Youngkin has promised to use this massive war chest to dump money into efforts to tear down our Democratic candidates. name: Cori Bush
subject: I want to introduce you to Transformations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The very same people who organize and lead within mass movements in communities across the country are often left out of the narrative. | |
---
Peter, Today marks seven years since the Pulse Nightclub massacre took the lives of 49 thriving community members. It happened in Orlando, Florida during "Latin Night," but it could’ve happened anywhere. Many who died that night were queer and trans people of color -- the very same people who organize and lead within mass movements in communities nationwide, but are often left out of the narrative. Seven years since Pulse and yet still in Missouri and across our country, transgender people are under attack. Hate crimes and hateful policies are on the rise as right-wing extremists continue in their attempts to erase trans people. **This year alone, there have already been more than 400 bills targeting the LGBTQ+ community.** In Missouri, just last week, our Republican governor signed a bill banning gender-affirming care for minors and even some adults. **Black and brown LGBTQ+ people deserve safety and care, not danger and hate.** Until everyone has the freedom to unapologetically express themselves without the threat of violence, none of us are free. **That’s why today, I want to introduce you to Transformations** , a Midwest-based organization run by trans women of color focused on capacity building and leadership development among trans communities of color in Missouri and neighboring communities in Kansas and Northwest Arkansas. Transformations seeks to address the complex web of intersectional systems of power and oppression facing trans women of color, including colorism, anti-Blackness, immigration status, sexism, and trans misogyny that are faced both in mainstream society as well as specifically within majority white, queer community spaces. **This powerful organization is innovative and brave in their vision to create safer, thriving communities for trans women of color.** [**On this day, the day of remembrance for the victims of the Pulse massacre, I ask you to join me in stepping up and providing Transformations with the support and resources they need to keep delivering safety, courage, and leadership for our trans siblings and families as they fight to stay alive and thrive now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfhtxOic7ZNJAEOuZHds3SzH96EHJGZe14aO5BaUwgH0-LySeM0Ewv0zPWAfpPK5ZHvgL73lRFipJufS_M-et7_QgMLiUThqE33427N07hdvVkn4ngeDbILVTycuEzzWaft5BxmXLmVFOfJ6tlMNUt2CuJHsM5A2ko4DK_j4s4ttND0oRsFcs9EiI7zmE23LOywoUyaScUZrdqC8owmNCPvxctuPILMC6uws8aNL1ZctWa7_g0bZAAp_X_TzL7AOW5Ihfh3ghJk-JqtQY96buhDw5ezLbyutiBwXy-3cL3qqZ5ZCzbIRBvh5MgMWphkfJfB1K6v_LkQjpj8XUzKC2f/3wz/9vhULs9STpKU7uP8ePW22w/h0/3N2oB1UlSuhq39MG5ZbMq0QjfowP6QpAkEvpfqqdIFM) Last year Transformations hosted their first “Liberation Camp” to grow power for trans BIPOC leaders and two dozen trans people of color participated. Their yearly “The Dolls are Thriving” virtual summit engaged more than 260 attendees in 2022, primarily trans women of color, in leadership, advocacy and mentorship.
They provided more than $7,000 in direct funding to trans youth so they could afford necessary expenses related to their safety and well-being, such as moving costs, paying for gender affirming care and medical bills, covering meals and groceries and purchasing gender affirming supplies and clothing to help keep themselves safer.
**Transformations’ work with our communities towards our collective liberation is powerful and necessary. And it’s all done on a shoestring budget.**
[**As we remember the victims of the Pulse Nightclub massacre, let’s invest in organizations doing critical grassroots work that uplifts our trans siblings. Join me in supporting Transformations and help create a safer future for LGBTQ+ people and for us all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfhtxOic7ZNJAEOuZHds3SzH96EHJGZe14aO5BaUwgHySXcyWqNIebfNmoSfxgT2diwggmyGouxCadPHnK4qiUyA3a86ndjHw6dFolYgZs93JKVanLGrFRSkuQvuMzjVyGT1xxS_RcREa8FchpZAbTKM1NOIeVgYmgmbB9DS0DVQXKzzQkxAYUI9lhgA6IuNycsERgmo8KyUzsLpNJiuue_m2M2V-zWJwfGAd1iw5wp9iDAM1-8u_1uw_HWokvhAW2gGnwPxx4WCsfyvZCQ1NGGVXFTvUiUCgVt2Eg_vlyqkaEie-8fO3nip2jgJdqlTDPWBwKh9Qtw6pquybnuOCg/3wz/9vhULs9STpKU7uP8ePW22w/h3/e1c1J3iIVQHvWI-3Qk8GalARLVa_Db56zRf2inIopq0)****

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I heard a lot of “hell, no.”
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727925/411033626/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyYzYwOC01ODA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NM2MvkXEknX6U_xi6wDZwMoce2dAl5wTpyHvRHj_bRY=)
Peter,

When I first wanted to talk about climate change on the weather forecast, convincing my bosses at the TV station wasn't easy. **In fact, I heard a lot of “hell, no” from management.**

At the time -- well over a decade ago -- climate change was even more politicized than it is now. Most Republicans denied its existence entirely. That’s why the station’s leadership thought we would lose viewership if we discussed how climate change affects the weather.

But once we started talking about it, the opposite happened. Our audience actually grew because we were willing to broach a topic other stations were still shying away from.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727926/411033627/-665437442?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyYzYwOC01ODA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NM2MvkXEknX6U_xi6wDZwMoce2dAl5wTpyHvRHj_bRY=)
_I was one of the first TV meteorologists to talk about climate change on our broadcast._
Today, I’m proud to bring my climate communication skills to Washington as the first meteorologist in Congress since 1979. Yes, the topic is still politically polarized, but now most of the debate is around how to fix the problem and help folks affected by it rather than arguing whether or not it exists.

**Still, we have work to do. This week’s historically bad air quality due to wildfire smoke reminded us of the real consequences of climate change. And Republicans were quick to remind us that they have no interest in moving on this issue!**

**[By helping me win re-election, you’d be ensuring IL-17 is represented by a trusted communicator on this critical issue. So I have to ask – will you chip in a $3 contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727927/411033628/-665437442?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyYzYwOC01ODA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NM2MvkXEknX6U_xi6wDZwMoce2dAl5wTpyHvRHj_bRY=)**
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727928/411033629/-665437442?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyYzYwOC01ODA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NM2MvkXEknX6U_xi6wDZwMoce2dAl5wTpyHvRHj_bRY=)
---

I’m grateful for your support, Peter.

– Eric

P.S. – One more thing: In case you missed it, I recently discussed my experience talking about climate change on TV (and more) with E&E News. **[You can read the full article here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64727929/411033630/-1842978031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyYzYwOC01ODA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NM2MvkXEknX6U_xi6wDZwMoce2dAl5wTpyHvRHj_bRY=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, When I first wanted to talk about climate change on the weather forecast, convincing my bosses at the TV station wasn't easy. In fact, I heard a lot of “hell, no” from management. At the time -- well over a decade ago -- climate change was even more politicized than it is now. Most Republicans denied its existence entirely. That’s why the station’s leadership thought we would lose viewership if we discussed how climate change affects the weather. But once we started talking about it, the opposite happened. Our audience actually grew because we were willing to broach a topic other stations were still shying away from. = I was one of the first TV meteorologists to talk about climate change on our broadcast. Today, I’m proud to bring my climate communication skills to Washington as the first meteorologist in Congress since 1979. Yes, the topic is still politically polarized, but now most of the debate is around how to fix the problem and help folks affected by it rather than arguing whether or not it exists. Still, we have work to do. This week’s historically bad air quality due to wildfire smoke reminded us of the real consequences of climate change. And Republicans were quick to remind us that they have no interest in moving on this issue! = | = I’m grateful for your support, Peter. – Eric P.S. – One more thing: In case you missed it, I recently discussed my experience talking about climate change on TV (and more) with E&E News. = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18968?t=1001&akid=3306%2E346206%2Ep-vxJR ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18968?t=1002&akid=3306%2E346206%2Ep-vxJR ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230612-3306-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3306_346206_p-vxJR&akid=3306%2E346206%2Ep-vxJR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3306%2E346206%2Ep-vxJR

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: The future of the GOP has never been darker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
United Rural Democrats [https://can2-prod.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/data/000/670/558/original/logo.png]
Peter — the GOP has shown its true colors this week.

With the GOP's 2024 presidential candidate field largely finalized, we have a clear view as to what the future of the Republican Party looks like.

It's never been more disappointing.

From former President Donald Trump and former Vice President Mike Pence, to Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie, the Republican Party now clearly represents a truly dangerous vision for the future of our country.

The GOP isn't giving voters much of a choice. Every Republican candidate will send this country down a path where our democracy, rights, environment, health care, reproductive health, education, and job security are threatened.

URD is on a mission to present voters with a different choice. One where Democratic candidates who understand the need for progress in this country and who come from rural districts with American values can run for office, win, and set every community up for success.

We need your help to set America on the right path, Peter. Will you chip in $5 or more to elect Democrats and prevent the GOP from a win in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail?refcode=230612_urd_gopupdate_l1]

Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=230612_urd_gopupdate _el1]

Thank you for protecting America.

- United Rural Democrats
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| In the past few weeks, MAGA Republicans have gone after me with full force — culminating in Representative Anna Paulina Luna introducing a congressional resolution to censure me and fine me $16 million.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2492%2E5257348%2EJPdALO)
Derek — In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to chip into my campaign for the U.S. Senate as Trump and MAGA Republicans ramp up their attacks against me.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2492%2E5257348%2EJPdALO)** But first, I want to explain their latest scheming.
In the past few weeks, MAGA Republicans have gone after me with full force — culminating in Representative Anna Paulina Luna introducing a congressional resolution to censure me and fine me _$16 million._
It’s a defamatory grab bag of Fox talking points, but the bottom line is they want payback for my leading Trump’s first impeachment. And as insane as it sounds, the Republicans could pass it, Derek. After all, it only requires Republican votes and evidently has the support of Kevin McCarthy — who desperately wants to stop me from getting elected to the Senate.
You see, for the past several years, I’ve been leading the effort to hold Republicans accountable.
I’m one of only four members of Congress in history to lead a presidential impeachment trial.
I secured the first bipartisan vote in a Senate trial to convict and remove a president.
**The GOP will clearly stop at nothing to defend their leader, Donald Trump. And that means going after me in every way possible — even trying to bankrupt me.**
But their attacks are about more than one member — if successful, they hope to stop others from standing up to Trump and their malignant efforts on his behalf. It would have a real chilling effect on accountability.
**[Now, I need your help to fight back against these GOP efforts to cripple opposition to their autocratic aims. Can you pitch in $3 or any amount to my campaign so I can keep up the fight to hold Donald Trump and Republicans accountable?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ijd0au&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2492%2E5257348%2EJPdALO)**

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: The Socialists Want to Sink Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
I’ll never throw in the towel | | | Fellow conservative, I’ve grown up in Florida my whole life. Born to parents who were exiled from Cuba, as a child I was reminded of the horrors of socialism told to me through gut-wrenching stories. The starvation, oppression, and unregulated authoritarianism - something out of a nightmare. As a Representative from Florida, I continue to hear from my Cuban constituents who share the same story.
---
**_They all agree: socialism is truly the greatest evil against humanity_**.
---
It makes me SICK when I hear radical-left Dems tout the **_exact same policies_** that have devastated the lives of millions!
And now they’re targeting me because I’m a Republican Cuban who REFUSES to worship their broken narrative.

body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c8baab04c30473681ce262a12066815&_e=NPsRvlNedzFecA9v6y7ZdUaBswhxA0CYvOmR5EOxkRSxcQuBvfg--20hRC-5hzi3FezvEScJb1RWAZD5pbU_5EygPD05a4kjIWZ2H2YMEkLPcukBRQSGF2Vav7bCceWYeSKBsjJxD6y15LvIgpUmW0yyOMDUndtWsew0nHJqgDLg95oHg10Azt_f6W1u7eMO6EiE3y2XSKwvY64npDBdtwjnx5p7k5uEpB8yPyYHZoEL4T--2HqYkIwXm7lZn4Bai6Z0bhHKnngnimoPQCt6PWRhtriSikHKBVh28-Ofh-lDNYQCJ1ZpSberExTmSYCgPPfkmFJ5a49MIlKimHwAY9nGM4uTqR-nUbjkFuBkK5jEya-KG1FAfjPy20fC6IlIs2-m61IN4_zzOT3OPmLrhWPHmLF_0f7UxXby3eb3AZM%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. body:
Can you believe we're already halfway through 2023?

| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=70e92a6cd70e4806a906c88ae9f32b76&_e=qz2yq_XfU3hchKMhZAUDzV9DukkeNSMStSql50yP_8NXPfdKIXRnUbeBg3imKPuUMMd-FTFFkbXrMEt5baQiGluBbCKd37cErjFK2eKdNrj07IQkg0ItM_330mh2Jlvjc5Pq7DChG88HKCL-F43U-dk-9hGH5n1o0NtQXfn2zQ5_sY5ibwoGG4suSvLw3ieHQAUlAYxK5tVI8K0gB9EEk7rCCOQYBe4CgprPFNK1X20qWEdiqXQd-TKevxT12vGfRtmDGgCFe4QkgkylOX-kwMJINYE8eQ-6wlFNcVuVgUp3mPyI7EIjkSdUyvb1IWOI)

Friend,

We are six months into 2023, so we have only six more months before the election year, and only two more End of Quarter Deadlines for 2023.

This year is flying by, and House Republicans have already made tremendous progress in the majority thus far. **In just six months, they have:**
* Fought back against China.
* Lowered energy costs.
* Defunded the IRS.
* Protected the unborn.
* Ended proxy voting.

The list goes on, and they're just getting started. | [ **DONATE $6 FOR 6 MORE MONTHS** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=70e92a6cd70e4806a906c88ae9f32b76&_e=qz2yq_XfU3hchKMhZAUDzV9DukkeNSMStSql50yP_8NXPfdKIXRnUbeBg3imKPuUMMd-FTFFkbXrMEt5baQiGluBbCKd37cErjFK2eKdNrj07IQkg0ItM_330mh2JlvjdR9ccUyIyotpFRabHCekcKbjvHsq_4P7uQTv_kRmdDEP9GmcyODeQs_64PbPP-ee3vL2HshoT2pSPOd-JSFnRz38fQ-3tKq59kuAcRx7cRG-hVmUtJUV1RsK1nyNdjvhYTOIyhpFvRyzC-2qfn-oqbCZQbVT3LgPfEIbp6HWIOdeWNy8sUFkdsSsZzY4xhbC)

name: Asa Hutchinson
subject: Should Trump Drop Out?
body:
I am polling my top supporters...

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ViqhH1mALEQCVrpG24NoYA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmaf7jP0UgYjI2MzQwYTk1ODlmOTBhYjJlZTQ1NzYxM2QwN2QwNTREnmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9nb3Atbm9taW5hdGlvbi1zdXJ2ZXk_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249U2hvdWxkJTIwVHJ1bXAlMjBEcm9wJTIwT3V0JTIwU3VydmV5VwVzcGNldUIKZHTjeYdk60ndA1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAU-8~)
---
| | Friend,
Can I ask you a quick question? **Do you think Trump should drop out of the race and let another Republican take on Joe Biden?**
Our country cannot afford another 4 years of Joe Biden. I believe that if we have a rematch between Joe Biden and Donald Trump in 2024 we will get the same results as 2020. It's time the Republican Party move on from Donald Trump.

**The Republican Party needs to be focused on conservative policies not personalities. **At the end of the day, the policies are what impact our family, community, and country.

That's why in light of the serious criminal allegations against him, I believe Donald Trump should step aside for the good of the country. He can still aid the Republican Party and help us pass conservative legislation. **But he should do it from the sidelines.**

But I want to know what you think. My campaign is polling our top supporters on this issue. **As a grassroots campaign, your input is critical to our internal ******strategy.****

**** Do you think Trump should drop out of the race and let another Republican take on Joe Biden?****

[****_Please take our official campaign survey!_****](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ViqhH1mALEQCVrpG24NoYA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmaf7jP0UgYjI2MzQwYTk1ODlmOTBhYjJlZTQ1NzYxM2QwN2QwNTREnmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9nb3Atbm9taW5hdGlvbi1zdXJ2ZXk_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249U2hvdWxkJTIwVHJ1bXAlMjBEcm9wJTIwT3V0JTIwU3VydmV5VwVzcGNldUIKZHTjeYdk60ndA1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAU-8~)
---
| [Take the Survey!](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ViqhH1mALEQCVrpG24NoYA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmaf7jP0UgYjI2MzQwYTk1ODlmOTBhYjJlZTQ1NzYxM2QwN2QwNTREnmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9nb3Atbm9taW5hdGlvbi1zdXJ2ZXk_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249U2hvdWxkJTIwVHJ1bXAlMjBEcm9wJTIwT3V0JTIwU3VydmV5VwVzcGNldUIKZHTjeYdk60ndA1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAU-8~ "Take the Survey!")

Warm regards,

Asa Hutchinson

clean_body: I am polling my top supporters... | | | | | ~ | | Friend, Can I ask you a quick question? Do you think Trump should drop out of the race and let another Republican take on Joe Biden? Our country cannot afford another 4 years of Joe Biden. I believe that if we have a rematch between Joe Biden and Donald Trump in 2024 we will get the same results as 2020. It's time the Republican Party move on from Donald Trump. The Republican Party needs to be focused on conservative policies not personalities. At the end of the day, the policies are what impact our family, community, and country. That's why in light of the serious criminal allegations against him, I believe Donald Trump should step aside for the good of the country. He can still aid the Republican Party and help us pass conservative legislation. But he should do it from the sidelines. But I want to know what you think. My campaign is polling our top supporters on this issue. As a grassroots campaign, your input is critical to our internal **strategy. Do you think Trump should drop out of the race and let another Republican take on Joe Biden?** ~ | ~ "Take the Survey!" Please let me know your honest opinion. Together, we can bring out the best in America! subject: Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison...”

| |

---
| | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=twqRVNQIUxPX6Wb%2bvg%2b7cw&sysid=1 "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s
new federal indictment:")**_

**“President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison ... They don’t want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want.”**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That’s why they’re indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They’re throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That’s one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZhNj4vz71oZNF7IdoFLxmQ&sysid=1 "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition
demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

Look:

It won’t be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It’ll take numbers.

We’ll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don’t represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668293%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N6jwqjejSzIe6DpeivXsUA&sysid=1 "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition
demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

We’ll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

body:
| | |

**$20.91.**
**[That’s the average gift that my campaign receives online from grassroots donors like Ramon R. and Charlene M. through email, and that’s the amount I’m about to ask you to donate today. Here’s why:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64729112/411040602/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20.91&refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFhM2Q2OC01YzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5wRVahO8aV5Xp3PqSuH2NpPDghOhRtgDoiLeaVEI1tQ=)**
Ever since I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker _ever_ to be elected as New York's attorney general, I have fought tirelessly to bring a voice to the voiceless and put agency back in the hands of the people. And I'll be honest, Peter, my work has made me a _lot _of enemies.
After generations of politicians catering almost exclusively to the powerful and corrupt, my fight for progress, justice, and accountability was a cold shock to the most powerful forces in our nation – **and now, they're attempting to undermine me at _every _turn.**
Thanks to the grassroots support of people like Mary J. who donated $250, Arthur W. who donated $50, and Sheila H. and José G. who both donated $5, I have been able to withstand their attacks so far. But, as their attacks grow more pointed, I'm counting on _you_ to provide me with the resources I need to continue my fight.
**That's why – with a **_record-number_**of anti-LGBTQ+ bills being enacted across the nation, the reproductive rights of **_millions_** still at stake, and the gun violence epidemic continuing to claim lives – I'm asking you to invest in our fight for progress.**
**[Can I count on you to donate $20.91 – the average online gift my campaign receives – to help power my fight for progress through the second half of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64729113/411040603/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20.91&refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGFhM2Q2OC01YzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5wRVahO8aV5Xp3PqSuH2NpPDghOhRtgDoiLeaVEI1tQ=)**

body:

Friend, Kirsten is relentless in her fight for progress.
In the last session of Congress, she passed legislation to crack down on dangerous gun trafficking, defend survivors of sexual assault and harassment, expand benefits for veterans, and more. Now, she's fighting to restore reproductive rights across the country, establish a national paid family leave program and defend Social Security benefits for millions.
**But New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades _. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting Kirsten's seat!_**
With our narrow Senate majority at stake in New York, Kirsten will only win if strong Democrats like you invest in her grassroots campaign. _[So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to stop another red wave in New York and save our Senate majority? clean_body: Every day, the impacts of climate change are evident – heat waves, droughts, floods, and wildfires are causing severe damage to vulnerable communities. | | | | Carbon dioxide levels in atmosphere mark a near-record surge \- The Washington Post | = The current amount of carbon dioxide generated by burning fossil fuels into the atmosphere is 50 percent higher than it was before the industrial era, a new scientific study shows. Every day, the impacts of climate change are evident – heat waves, droughts, floods, and wildfires are causing severe damage to vulnerable communities. We need our elected officials to cut ties with the fossil fuel industry and take action to protect our planet from the catastrophic consequences of climate change. It’s up to us to hold them accountable and show our grassroots support. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to holding the fossil fuel industry accountable for their lies, electing climate champions who are unafraid to take climate action, and replacing fossil fuel allies in elected office. But we cannot do it without your support. = | = Let’s fight to protect our planet together, JanePAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Can you give us a minute to explain why?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64729539/411043123/-1307701025?amount=5&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk1NjMzYS01ZTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9XbiA1p55gj58aPFngFQ6Fm_et9V8EYllwrW0bNaRU=) We’re only **three** days away from our first two primaries of the summer, to re-elect Justin Jones and Justin Pearson as full members of the General Assembly. So we need to be ready to fight back. body:
| Republicans are going all in to flip this seat red.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=401%2E35263%2EdxQ_Bn)
Peter, After a recent poll showed Tammy in a _statistical tie_ with a potential opponent, Republicans are going _all in_ to flip this seat red. To fend off the wave of attacks that will soon be targeted at Tammy, we’ve set a $15,000 goal for our Poll Response Fund before Thursday at midnight. **[Will you rush a donation right now to help us defend Tammy and this toss up Senate seat?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=401%2E35263%2EdxQ_Bn)** Look, Wisconsin elections are historically determined by a very close margin. This poll only confirms that this election could be Tammy’s most competitive yet. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies will soon be blanketing Wisconsin’s airwaves with attack ads. Tammy won’t back down against the tens of millions that will be spent to defeat her — but she needs your support too. **To protect Tammy’s seat and our Senate majority, we need to be able to defend Tammy against any attacks. That’s where you come in, Peter.** **[So please, if you’re able, can you make a donation of any amount to our Poll Response Fund?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=401%2E35263%2EdxQ_Bn)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jun23.ORXv9s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=401%2E35263%2EdxQ_Bn)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: First Results: WSRP Presidential Preference Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Support your candidate - add your vote to our poll!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

clean_body: Support your candidate - add your vote to our poll! Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Here’s why June is a critical month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEBBIE WASSERMAN SCHULTZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| It's Debbie. A lot has happened in the House over the last few weeks.

→ Kevin McCarthy announced that he wants to launch a committee to investigate cutting Social Security and Medicare—a move that would devastate our seniors.
→ Jim Jordan is continuing his plan to weaponize the government to go after Democrats and more progressive voices.
→ The GOP attempted to hold the economy hostage, a battle that finally ended after weeks of grandstanding.

At the end of this month, potential far-right candidates, pollsters, pundits, and voters are going to be looking at the Federal Election Commission’s (FEC) public filings to see if their extremism is having an impact.

**We need to have a strong report to show their constant attacks aren’t working._[Will you donate $10 to push back against right-wing extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730211/411045634/1021093006?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWS_20230612_FR_1.1_WL_candidate_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84NzYwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI1ZjlkYi02MTA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sA8ZBtzc4VDi_XRc862L0CJfkcKoZPJHcoEafGzezI=)_**

It’s simple: standing together now will enable us to win next year. _And with only five seats needed to flip the House, we can win._

With this deadline being public, it’s important we rise up to meet the challenge. We need to make it clear that we are organized and mobilized.

Taking climate action before it's too late, passing federal protections for reproductive rights, making healthcare more accessible nationwide, and expanding voting rights for all... everything is hanging in the balance unless we win in 2024 so we can tackle these issues.

clean_body: | It's Debbie. A lot has happened in the House over the last few weeks. → Kevin McCarthy announced that he wants to launch a committee to investigate cutting Social Security and Medicare—a move that would devastate our seniors. → Jim Jordan is continuing his plan to weaponize the government to go after Democrats and more progressive voices. → The GOP attempted to hold the economy hostage, a battle that finally ended after weeks of grandstanding. At the end of this month, potential far-right candidates, pollsters, pundits, and voters are going to be looking at the Federal Election Commission’s (FEC) public filings to see if their extremism is having an impact. We need to have a strong report to show their constant attacks aren’t working.= | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = It’s simple: standing together now will enable us to win next year. And with only five seats needed to flip the House, we can win. With this deadline being public, it’s important we rise up to meet the challenge. We need to make it clear that we are organized and mobilized. Taking climate action before it's too late, passing federal protections for reproductive rights, making healthcare more accessible nationwide, and expanding voting rights for all... everything is hanging in the balance unless we win in 2024 so we can tackle these issues. = Your support wins elections. Thank you for standing with me. Debbie * | = | = Click here to from Debbie Wasserman Schultz's email list. **Make your formal endorsement now!**
_Deadline: 11:59 p.m. on 6/12/23_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64730351/411046264/-2080415300?sourceid=1050192&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFlOTJhZC02MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjEuxk_X4bKZVTE0oX1JgEB-3Hvohlv-rGvf02vxS7o=&emci=3bff3314-5009-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f71e92ad-6209-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is one of the strongest pro-choice advocates in the Senate.

She's been fighting for reproductive freedom for years — and in a post-_Roe v. Wade_ country, she's calling on her fellow senators to abolish the filibuster and restore abortion access in all 50 states. _We couldn't agree more!_

**EMILYs List is proud to endorse Sen. Warren — and now we're counting on you! Can Sen. Warren count on your personal endorsement, Peter? Sign on now:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64730352/411046266/-2080415300?sourceid=1050192&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFlOTJhZC02MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjEuxk_X4bKZVTE0oX1JgEB-3Hvohlv-rGvf02vxS7o=&emci=3bff3314-5009-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f71e92ad-6209-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) There's so much at stake in 2024 — Senate Republicans are trying to pass a national abortion ban, which Donald Trump would likely sign into law as president. We desperately need to reelect Democratic pro-choice women who will be outspoken advocates for our rights. We know we can count on Sen. Warren to be just that.

That's why the EMILYs List team jumped at the opportunity to support Sen. Warren's reelection campaign,**and we want to add your personal endorsement**. **Peter, we're running out of time to reach our goal of 10,000 endorsements. Before our deadline at midnight tonight, will you formally endorse Sen. Warren? Add your name:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64730353/411046267/-2080415300?sourceid=1050192&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFlOTJhZC02MjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjEuxk_X4bKZVTE0oX1JgEB-3Hvohlv-rGvf02vxS7o=&emci=3bff3314-5009-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f71e92ad-6209-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thanks for supporting pro-choice champions,
