name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this is how I was raised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730437/411046612/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY4MTI2NTYtNjMwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7XYwD2mP_dwvJREB8rexPXZ0ZLO-LgLKKteeSkG-AjM=)
---
Peter, it's Kirsten. Since I started a life of public service, I've been focused on achieving progress for families everywhere — and I've been looking ahead to the future. But there would be no future without a past, so I want to take a moment to share my family's story and tell you why I'm in this fight. I grew up in Albany, New York. Back then, it was still uncommon for a mother to have a career of her own. But my mom was a lawyer — _one of just three women in her law school's graduating class._ And my grandmother, Polly, was a political powerhouse in her own right, fiercely committed to Democratic campaigning and organizing. **These strong, independent women raised me to believe in myself, to be bold and to always fight for my community.** When I was making the decision to run for Congress, they were the first people to believe in me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730438/411046613/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY4MTI2NTYtNjMwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7XYwD2mP_dwvJREB8rexPXZ0ZLO-LgLKKteeSkG-AjM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730439/411046614/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY4MTI2NTYtNjMwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7XYwD2mP_dwvJREB8rexPXZ0ZLO-LgLKKteeSkG-AjM=) That first campaign wasn't easy — Republicans outnumbered Democrats two to one in my district. But I knew my community, and my grandmother raised me on the bread and butter of campaigning. **I was confident that if I ran an honest campaign that spoke to the issues families really cared about, I could flip this district blue.** I ran on bringing transparency to Washington, on ethics reform, on ending the Iraq War, and making health care affordable and accessible for all. I knocked countless doors, made endless phone calls and put in the elbow grease it takes to win these tough races. And when the polls closed, we came out on top. After I was sworn into office, I got to work delivering on the promises I made to voters. And two years later, I won reelection by 25 points. As New York Democrats head into a critical election year in 2024, I'm leaning on those same lessons again. **You see, last year, we lost four congressional seats to GOP challengers — enough to give Republicans control of the House._And now the GOP is targeting my seat to flip the Senate, too._** As the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket this year, I'm working overtime to retake these House seats and defend my seat to keep our Senate majority. **But on that very first campaign, I learned that you can't do anything alone.** **That's why I'm asking:[_Please, will you make a donation today — split between my campaign and HER Time — to help me defend my seat, save our Senate majority and lead New York to a bright future? I'm counting on grassroots people like you to stand with me in this fight, Peter._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730440/411046615/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY4MTI2NTYtNjMwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7XYwD2mP_dwvJREB8rexPXZ0ZLO-LgLKKteeSkG-AjM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64730441/411046616/-2030493197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY4MTI2NTYtNjMwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7XYwD2mP_dwvJREB8rexPXZ0ZLO-LgLKKteeSkG-AjM=)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Decline is NOT inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I believe in American Greatness. Do you?

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e43976d16d3444ea16b5fe2cb888dca&_e=QBD7EwDBaxS9-goEyimSZvXemC0nMyF4E14pQLbLLrFZaeuowUqZe3vZ7HB5Pmp6D5VsOPJRxhbSTZpfug2d_UlL9ke1VYKuzoouSHmyAUpVpM7aiR6NPzY2nhPAOSI4I9e1Ukp-FN4sr-1s-caqxzFI-ZdwQy4Bb-mAu7lpL_9-GpqcLJuSSef1--0u2x6uhZfIx_pC0PDt_7YHlb_jmu-BYRP-tR87D3jGW6oT2n6PgmZVsu2FaXnDvCbYcdC52CrWZ7hJLW-7-imcC73HekWnyehQSGitZzV59NxN9M9b0ba2vfjyqNKosXZBx_76ul9EB3wfz8h4HhyPBN3WHyzlULwoTG9gyx54G8o7GwHaBYka3LZzRYe0ZP70FPovMDfCGt1qkNvitH53vSD6qzWIsTUBeeO6KkmNsbSDMEQ5bbyQuCBcVBzE7vhcDvrc)
---
Friend, I'm running for President because I don't believe the decline of our country is inevitable. I believe it's a choice that stands before us. **We have it in our power to choose a better path --a path that's going to lead to the revival of this country and a restoration of American Greatness.**
---
| | [STAND UP FOR AMERICA--JOIN THE FIGHT](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e43976d16d3444ea16b5fe2cb888dca&_e=QBD7EwDBaxS9-goEyimSZvXemC0nMyF4E14pQLbLLrFZaeuowUqZe3vZ7HB5Pmp6D5VsOPJRxhbSTZpfug2d_UlL9ke1VYKuzoouSHmyAUpVpM7aiR6NPzY2nhPAOSI4I9e1Ukp-FN4sr-1s-caqxzFI-ZdwQy4Bb-mAu7lpL_9-GpqcLJuSSef1--0u2x6uhZfIx_pC0PDt_7YHlb_jmu-BYRP-tR87D3jGW6oT2n6PgmZVsu2FaXnDvCbYcdC52CrWZ7hJLW-7-imcC73HejPI6iBWJ2Udilbe_-iGHr_LkP0PLbWK38a3ZMHRZS6EV7YAdmQdOGeA4eOflwJS5JvVPya41iXWf4lWNKnF6RscO08dLGnIQIbZzcRu59TONDPtr_bWduKHAsyYuEMz9n8XlrX3AP_gvyoGzPhpa4GgO5DygrZniL1C5gZahbNl)
---
I believe in this American Greatness, Friend. I've spent my life fighting for it. Long before I was elected governor, I served our nation in Iraq as a JAG officer in support of SEAL Team 1. Having seen what the attacks of September 11th did to our country, I felt a responsibility to do my part to help at a time of struggle. _**So I served**_. Friend, the sense of satisfaction I got knowing that I was wearing the cloth of my country, serving alongside so many honorable patriots, and fighting for something bigger than myself was a satisfaction that money just can't buy. Today, our country has lost its sense of national pride.
* Instead of strengthening our military recruiting efforts and building a military for the future...
* Instead of securing our border and holding Mexican drug cartels accountable for the irrevocable harm they've done to our citizens...
* And instead of reigning in out-of-control economic and fiscal policy that have left us on the brink of bankruptcy...

...**the Left has been too busy distracting our nation with the woke Olympics.** I find this unacceptable. _**I am ready to keep my campaign promises, restore an energetic executive to the White House, and get the job done**_. I recently took my message directly to the people of Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, and I will continue to spread the message each and every day until we've won...until we've righted this ship...until we've achieved our Great American Comeback.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e43976d16d3444ea16b5fe2cb888dca&_e=QBD7EwDBaxS9-goEyimSZvXemC0nMyF4E14pQLbLLrFZaeuowUqZe3vZ7HB5Pmp6D5VsOPJRxhbSTZpfug2d_UlL9ke1VYKuzoouSHmyAUpVpM7aiR6NPzY2nhPAOSI4I9e1Ukp-FN4sr-1s-caqxzFI-ZdwQy4Bb-mAu7lpL_9-GpqcLJuSSef1--0u2x6uhZfIx_pC0PDt_7YHlb_jmu-BYRP-tR87D3jGW6oT2n6PgmZVsu2FaXnDvCbYcdC52CrWZ7hJLW-7-imcC73Heq1QPC2Hdr1qXH-6AcR9IGY2Fq9_IKvlJlZBbmaslNt6KXaYDnP5eHng3dBwUwp2GeELCy-7umOMX1xXv6vV5Nnace1Z2qCi-_PsrOmtzuSDVcgRJ-eUAR6kj_R_AbDkHo0dYHE0MGRAZ5x9pxijSDVb6Zlz0TqqfLROZIs0d0lX)
---
We are at a critical juncture, Friend. I've said it before and I'll say it again: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. I need your help, Friend. This cannot stand. **[Will you fight with me?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e43976d16d3444ea16b5fe2cb888dca&_e=QBD7EwDBaxS9-goEyimSZvXemC0nMyF4E14pQLbLLrFZaeuowUqZe3vZ7HB5Pmp6D5VsOPJRxhbSTZpfug2d_UlL9ke1VYKuzoouSHmyAUpVpM7aiR6NPzY2nhPAOSI4I9e1Ukp-FN4sr-1s-caqxzFI-ZdwQy4Bb-mAu7lpL_9-GpqcLJuSSef1--0u2x6uhZfIx_pC0PDt_7YHlb_jmu-BYRP-tR87D3jGW6oT2n6PgmZVsu2FaXnDvCbYcdC52CrWZ7hJLW-7-imcC73HepKOhsvLcVFeOPZ-pHj4Htz8-dUejz4-eVxUqlxFKth45S-cYks5DHV0iv6xAPK-7krzFLcw3MK6NS4Sjt_XItwJLYNwaTN3J60Y_5J5m4aZIg9g3vvhRsFmic4VL811_idhSenMN-zgyL75tUgfVFRD38S3KAALAzshwoRnV4gt "Will you fight with me?") **

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e43976d16d3444ea16b5fe2cb888dca&_e=QBD7EwDBaxS9-goEyimSZvXemC0nMyF4E14pQLbLLrFZaeuowUqZe3vZ7HB5Pmp6D5VsOPJRxhbSTZpfug2d_UlL9ke1VYKuzoouSHmyAUpVpM7aiR6NPzY2nhPAOSI4I9e1Ukp-FN4sr-1s-caqxzFI-ZdwQy4Bb-mAu7lpL_9-GpqcLJuSSef1--0u2x6uhZfIx_pC0PDt_7YHlb_jmu-BYRP-tR87D3jGW6oT2n6PgmZVsu2FaXnDvCbYcdC52CrWZ7hJLW-7-imcC73HerfWxiQogJDxL5BCmraeIWXTJEhU0_qgX6_4ALLqA_vB5ICOzLAPBgbBew8WV6D5pIf-kPmReZeqdzQRQtbSUBE-wS3R3oQwWa1Kjsk2oHRjBAUZjWhl7FykBvfzQE3M7iMlECSayfAVzTfCo47PZsyd3TdxtioXjU3Fze2QLJcv)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: Defenseless bear cubs need you today
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED:**_**STOP ruthless trophy hunters from slaughtering innocent grizzly bears and cubs by demanding Endangered Species Act protections NOW!**_[**Sign the petition >> **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The bloody carcass of a mangled grizzly bear was recently discovered in Wyoming just 14 miles outside of Yellowstone --**and it likely suffered a horrific, violent death. ** Grizzly bears are one of the most iconic native mammals in North America, but outside of Alaska, their numbers have dropped to **_only**2%**_ of their historic population,** with _**fewer than 2,000**_ grizzlies remaining in the lower 48 states today. Ever since the Trump administration removed critical bear protections in 2016, cruel trophy hunters have been **LEGALLY murdering** helpless grizzlies and bear cubs in droves and driving these treasured animals _**closer to EXTINCTION. **_ And right now, far-right lawmakers like Rep. Lauren Boebert are doubling down on harmful Trump-era policies by aggressively attempting to**roll back life-saving Endangered Species Act (ESA) grizzly protections even further.** If they succeed in their anti-bear agenda, it will give brutal hunters a **LICENSE TO INDISCRIMINATELY KILL** innocent grizzlies --_**and we could soon lose this threatened species forever.**_ [**Defenseless grizzlies are counting on us to be their voice, and we can’t let them down Friend. Will you take action now to protect these beloved bears from being massacred by brutal trophy hunters?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**It’s no secret that corrupt politicians are in bed with the hunting lobby and other Big Polluters, Friend.**_ So unfortunately, this is not the first time the GOP has made a united effort to **dismantle ESA protections** for vulnerable wildlife. In fact, federal judges have already TWICE rejected attempts to strip away ESA protections in Wyoming, the state where this most recent gruesome grizzly death occurred.
And while the GOP remains relentless in their attacks against the ESA, trophy hunters are already _**MERCILESSLY SLAUGHTERING**_ harmless grizzly bears using some of the most cruel and inhumane practices imaginable -- _**including blowing up harmless mama bears and cubs asleep in their dens! **_
**Innocent grizzlies cannot afford another moment of inaction, Friend.** _Are you willing to roll over and hand the fate of these beloved animals to the GOP and hunting lobbyists?_[**Or will you step up right now to STOP the senseless killing of these precious animals? Add your name now to SAVE precious grizzly bears from being wiped out forever >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818978?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1818977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting grizzly bears and the planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Joe Kent
subject: She Wants to Ban Your Gas Stove (While Keeping Her Own)
body:
**Dear Friend,**
**My opponent, far-left Democrat Marie Perez, just voted against TWO bills that would prohibit the federal government from regulating and banning gas stoves. She claims to be a moderate representing working-class Americans, and yet she is voting in lockstep with Democrats and their Green New Deal Climate Agenda.**
**If you believe we need to send Republicans who will fight the Left 's radical agenda and protect gas stoves, please help me get to Washington by contributing to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw/1XBbeFyddp7763763763vLRpyCtw).**
**Marie Perez, like the rest of the Democratic party, is all in on the left-wing agenda to control every aspect of your life, including what kind of stove you use. **
**My opponent in this race is not only a radical - she is also a hypocrite. Marie Perez owns a gas stove, but she doesn 't want you or your family to own one: **
**[Marie Gluesenkamp Perez on Twitter](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/059eRmjHPLVkbv1ffLs4Qw/1XBbeFyddp7763763763vLRpyCtw)**
**In the next election, you have the chance to replace her with a Republican who will fight for working-class Americans. I will work to protect gas stoves and our freedoms from government overreach.**
**Already, Perez has outraised me by more than 3-to-1. Please help me close the gap by donating today at[https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw/1XBbeFyddp7763763763vLRpyCtw).**
**Respectfully,**
**Joe Kent**
**PS - Turn your anger about Marie attacking gas stoves into action: help me win so I can protect our freedoms by donating today at[https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw/1XBbeFyddp7763763763vLRpyCtw).**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cd031f2e0b945e18c6ca94603400e8c&_e=8O56FE-qKPMzk1_nAVqpVhqv29-iEL7GuvIkM5lrR_ILutkmSRz4mUDDrUk7jDrnYs2R6cH0lU89HksLVyNxl0_hVO3mZ9iaGdQP9vF9V5_3KI4fgkK0YBzMMrRNiGGHhh6z59mNG0eorWuwjzQg6Cav0SAzI2ll-yTwLrazlJzHLXj-fzkYKlPm7J1phiCsDVEseChmiUVoJr7NUX7buAtKep_JxQOTiAIK2x3VEWcp5CzLNmPcEDgnMJDUKC46) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5cd031f2e0b945e18c6ca94603400e8c&_e=8O56FE-qKPMzk1_nAVqpVhqv29-iEL7GuvIkM5lrR_ILutkmSRz4mUDDrUk7jDrnYs2R6cH0lU89HksLVyNxl0_hVO3mZ9iaGdQP9vF9V59ROQ1imwS_Eyol_JmA6wu2zkKoVob1z9j19MBDyGKrBBbR_D49DvhX9RJpfS-Dlxvu7AGaqScwqCNOj0D4370taxcJcUCA3EncbvVCC9GE2J-e8m97Vk5wejp05ATv_yxraKnyxnKjkpHpFn_BUivB) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..." What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Sen. Jeb Bradley & Rep. Sherman Packard: A budget that puts NH families first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC

| Friend, ICYMI, please take a look at Senate President Jeb Bradley and Speaker of the House Sherm Packard's latest Op-Ed about the budget below. - NH Senate Republicans

---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Sen. Jeb Bradley & Rep. Sherman Packard: A budget that puts NH families first June 11, 2023 THROUGHOUT this legislative session, our overriding priority has been to put New Hampshire families first. And we kept that goal in mind as we worked on the state’s two-year budget. We’re proud to have passed a budget that empowers families and meets our state’s needs. Any responsible budget needs to control spending and keep taxes low in order to help our economy continue to grow. This budget preserves the New Hampshire Advantage, protecting the cuts to business and Rooms and Meals Taxes and accelerating repeal of the Interest and Dividends Tax on retirement income, which helps our seniors. Most importantly, we accomplished this without a sales tax, a capital gains tax, or any new taxes or tax increases. We also want to help cities and towns lower the local property tax burden, so the budget sends a record $245 million in Rooms and Meals Revenue Sharing back to communities, providing $40 million for municipal clean water projects, and an additional $20 million for local highway and bridge construction. This budget includes a student-centered education funding formula that focuses state aid more precisely on the towns, and students, with the greatest financial need. Towns with the highest percentage of low-income families will receive the largest increases. In total, the budget increases state education aid by $169 million over the next two years, which will provide additional property tax relief. In fact, state per-pupil education assistance will increase by 31% over the next decade. We are increasing state aid to the University System of New Hampshire by 12% and to the Community College System of New Hampshire by 18% to help ensure a tuition freeze for New Hampshire students. This budget promotes the health and well-being of our state, extending the successful Granite Advantage Health Care Program (Medicaid Expansion) for seven years. This program leverages federal Medicaid dollars to help working adults access affordable health insurance. By lowering emergency room visits and uncompensated care, we’re lowering costs across New Hampshire’s health care sector. We also increase Medicaid reimbursement rates by $134 million, which is matched by federal funds and will ensure access to quality health care services including community mental health centers, Choices for Independent Living, long-term care services, and nursing homes. Our family-first budget tackles the state’s mental health and substance abuse crisis, dedicating $5 million for crisis stabilization services, $2 million for the Recovery Friendly Workplace initiative, and nearly $67 million to support family resource infrastructure. It also funds a new youth development center on the campus of Hampstead Hospital. Focusing on families includes keeping them safe. We provide $800,000 for the New Hampshire Internet Crimes Against Children Task Force and $3 million for Child Advocacy Centers. Affordable housing remains a challenge for families and for our state’s economic prosperity. This budget includes an additional $25 million for the Affordable Housing Fund, $10 million for the Governor’s InvestNH program, and $5 million for a new Housing Champions program. We also send an additional $10 million back to communities for homelessness programs. For the past decade, New Hampshire Republicans have prioritized making our economy more competitive by lowering tax rates and controlling spending. This has resulted in soaring business tax revenues. Our continued economic strength has given us the ability to fund our state’s most pressing needs without raising taxes. Our state is not immune to the crushing inflation that has swept across the country in recent years. In order to help our state employees keep up with inflation, this budget includes a 12% pay raise over the next two years. We also provide a $500 stipend for retired public employees and a number of recruitment and retention incentives for state employees. We must always protect the New Hampshire Advantage, with no income, sales or capital gains taxes, an improving business tax climate, and property tax relief. This approach has yielded one of the nation’s best economies, the third lowest unemployment rate, the lowest poverty rate, and the safest state in the union. With this budget, New Hampshire will continue to prosper because we are putting families first. _Sen. Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) is Senate president. Rep. Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) is speaker of the House._

subject: [take action] Protect and expand the rights of our LGBTQ+ neighbors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
In 2020, Virginia became the 38th state to ratify the ERA, which meets the threshold for a constitutional amendment. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvsbjVioiDY6vZVy-U4RuimELRk1i0hNNj086KylY0noEqY-KT-rIyqepH4zVy6dg60bz2n4J6Ay14zXgZRtrAB_1amZ0XQqvGphfj0vUdWqb8T0pGxvmrKhKBjrJ__mGWdcA11otdsUSLFBORjDZMVdn_v2_MaO--P5PVpvzxL1zaDZ2I6f6mu48qLT2SZLNuMIV7Vg4g_Kla9_rFZ_Q0vqOx1TK7chaJbE_KxTHZRd1BDAZmmBvgtYcg6OhMQo6DsHVZQ6FPsLeMT_m8mVRtlA/3wz/S_5cFCYySUeNJRvZT160uQ/h0/OnOQ2sEmIwtJQOWvgo0k13Yn1XmLd0EM3MrOiYXhRBQ)
---
Friend, Seven years ago today, the lives of 49 of our LGBTQ+ neighbors were cut short in the Pulse Nightclub shooting in Orlando, Florida. Unfortunately, attacks on the LGBTQ+ community are on the rise, with 400 separate bills being introduced in state legislatures across the country this year attacking LGBTQ+ rights. Many policies target trans people, including attacks on gender-affirming care. **I am here to tell our LGBTQ+ family that you matter and I commit to fighting for you in Congress.** One critical step toward equal protection under the law is ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA). That’s why I’ve joined with fellow Squad members Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley in demanding Congress remove the final roadblock in ratifying the ERA―a critical tool to pushing back against discrimination based on sex or gender, including discrimination based on someone’s sexual orientation or gender identity. [**Click here to become a grassroots co-signer of the Equal Rights Amendment and demand Congress act to enshrine protections for women and LGBTQ+ people in the U.S. Constitution.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8s89jt0o9OVP4hgTTDj3AXVuQLnCtDlqL7WInM801k46w3CBZqOHjufZDA-yFST9ljrRqPongFnHlVvNDTsXB5wwcJTs2yIEccXkRmZoRI6LiJ83Cxj0Idtkpq1R7Qlgz2PjSkIxupT8D6TFmbY42Ys-3j1okbbFgfq728DTGPXmOoyIs05k_shDLep4bffxxeFWtimpsw8DPJp0wwWASJw82uqN-G_2RKQ6_DrbcLVCO1yZx69cgwKuY2jYWbDbAUE86xVPBouPGym5nyh6_hJtrb9C9h0c3Dp3FkoS3QnoV-4zxwYgm7ZQuSvCe294NJTqYn_VzRmJs1cWmmTsp5SjRWQdvTbXFwk-264f8xtoaPSukBdkNY1YLlc2Lz2lYsYMQAGuiAt7wxHSSbl3lNAh_7Rtn7_9FXgEfXdvhLobUjpYwQLCgHqqEgwl4wrtBuIDdHgs74yUeLZIPcZAvpA/3wz/S_5cFCYySUeNJRvZT160uQ/h1/_qJMsQuoTmFVu7yqgG26wGNHZcqHxfxmrSAvGZQxOd4) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8s89jt0o9OVP4hgTTDj3AXVuQLnCtDlqL7WInM801k46w3CBZqOHjufZDA-yFST9ljrRqPongFnHlVvNDTsXB5wwcJTs2yIEccXkRmZoRI6LiJ83Cxj0Idtkpq1R7Qlgz2PjSkIxupT8D6TFmbY42Ys-3j1okbbFgfq728DTGPXmOoyIs05k_shDLep4bffxxXqlx4Y99DiTm9rsKaK1e2oQbcctJ9qInpoUC4t5wvwW1f4sKVRF660shuSe-iFTFnQeCky7wwoOkT8c8DwtBgqwsvyuFU85BuKkighJtTQ9RvZ1d2qBo6Z-vJnsh78sakwWL58YQx90JyEwN5wh31lj8L5DSTZpO1W2YLcYL2v442UG4cymgFcb9fUBZUP-ePusEygm50e8cp4dk3QsQrFjt-ayfS9KGJpMB6MZry1TM8MmRTISI50j8f6c9npdk1DEBafg_RkU-tVbvIazhHw/3wz/S_5cFCYySUeNJRvZT160uQ/h2/fMW9HiI2DM9qOqvxfGDYvVpA2J-4OCTK4NlIYET-fL4)
---
In 2020, Virginia became the 38th state to ratify the ERA, which meets the threshold for a constitutional amendment. Unfortunately, when the ERA was originally passed in 1972, the legislation included a seven-year deadline for ratification.
Congress just needs to repeal that original deadline and the ERA will be enshrined in the Constitution―and become a critical tool to challenge anti-LGBTQ+ and transphobic legislation.
[**Marginalized communities―particularly Black women and LGBTQ+ people―have always been at the forefront of the fight for the Equal Rights Amendment. This Pride Month, demand Congress act to prohibit discrimination based on sex. Add your name today as a grassroots co-sponsor of the ERA.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8s89jt0o9OVP4hgTTDj3AXVuQLnCtDlqL7WInM801k46w3CBZqOHjufZDA-yFST9ljrRqPongFnHlVvNDTsXB5wwcJTs2yIEccXkRmZoRI6LiJ83Cxj0Idtkpq1R7Qlgz2PjSkIxupT8D6TFmbY42Ys-3j1okbbFgfq728DTGPXmOoyIs05k_shDLep4bffxxprOAZE5sQOmp-bChXicOPs41DWpQHJQUlIXWzjWg7kzel9KBXEAv3r5mMJGn-HQf7H2oEVO6hCDiZGdZ_SvDKZgnV4ECU35nHNIILsMxzFwVYV7hUIu2EDoL6eWM0kj_erb_ViGcL39jOPQJH1GivDsrZXN1VQnuyV2YVjZ4xZFbp7jibYF_ycX5oh3yUbvhRKYjdWU7epQ0rPV_Sp02GeRP9DlNUssPQajFUq9WhmWjWNc3et85DjsCG05UBiYTn_sQ48zBYngHC7B6wYXX5Q/3wz/S_5cFCYySUeNJRvZT160uQ/h3/rdJ2GbIm5IDpC4tVwql-Ki_R3ND7FFRcYcxdB2EZbmQ)
I will never stop fighting for the rights of all of us. I’m grateful to have you by my side.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: In 2020, Virginia became the 38th state to ratify the ERA, which meets the threshold for a constitutional amendment. | | | Friend, Seven years ago today, the lives of 49 of our LGBTQ+ neighbors were cut short in the Pulse Nightclub shooting in Orlando, Florida. Unfortunately, attacks on the LGBTQ+ community are on the rise, with 400 separate bills being introduced in state legislatures across the country this year attacking LGBTQ+ rights. Many policies target trans people, including attacks on gender-affirming care. I am here to tell our LGBTQ+ family that you matter and I commit to fighting for you in Congress. One critical step toward equal protection under the law is ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA). That’s why I’ve joined with fellow Squad members Cori Bush and Ayanna Pressley in demanding Congress remove the final roadblock in ratifying the ERA―a critical tool to pushing back against discrimination based on sex or gender, including discrimination based on someone’s sexual orientation or gender identity. | In 2020, Virginia became the 38th state to ratify the ERA, which meets the threshold for a constitutional amendment. Unfortunately, when the ERA was originally passed in 1972, the legislation included a seven-year deadline for ratification. Congress just needs to repeal that original deadline and the ERA will be enshrined in the Constitution―and become a critical tool to challenge anti-LGBTQ+ and transphobic legislation. I will never stop fighting for the rights of all of us. I’m grateful to have you by my side. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhs5ldboeufsbh97q6lsgshl6d49b6r44ufrkeio_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvi26389eu25ghgbalrl0qfnt2b40i9mis1sudu0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj0mnaprhhv7rd9a4kuutsratnojes10qina1q38_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpa0d94vbdjq53jcni09uu4cl7bjslspvrbrf980_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmb2hv6gpt3eq1htaggnogn0c2dsi1pii05v7jfg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuanh9pvoom4g72dh8160vm7373lk70iog9fpgkg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znegedkfaqotvqcgtlmjccjpevccet5d2v7f0dlg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z01ugqt9tdcmvl0f8t0j523glgskmrdoeb4aab4o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcr8o68j4egggbfjgroq5vffu82e60nns0e3amc0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoghm8ckt47c53s9k4cau638qvk6f9opoben2lro_rp22sh2s8i66o73cdi61p74c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Love is love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_060923_PrideMonth_B_act_SL3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_060923_PrideMonth_B_act_SL3]
Hi folks,
When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022, conservative justices suggested that Obergefell v. Hodges , the case that established marriage equality in the United States, could be next.
So I got to work. I pushed hard to get the Respect for Marriage Act through Congress, and in December of last year, I was proud to join President Biden as he signed the bill into law. Marriage equality became the indisputable law of the land. It was overdue recognition that love is love, no matter what.
This was a win — but there’s still so much to be done in the fight for equality and LGBTQ+ rights.
We were able to pass the Respect for Marriage Act because of Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate. We could lose that in 2024.
I’m working hard to support candidates running in key swing seats across the country. With your support, we can make sure these candidates have the resources they need to win in 2024 and keep fighting for what matters most. Can we count on you to donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_060923_PrideMonth_B_act_SL3]
Thanks,
— Michael
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Tue, Jun 6, 2023 at 11:03 AM
Subject: Pride
Friend — happy Pride Month!
Every June, we have a chance to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here at home and across the country. Colorado is better because of the diversity in it.
As we celebrate, let’s also recommit to the fight for equality.
In the last couple of years, we’ve seen an onslaught of legislation going after LGBTQ+ rights. These attacks — based in bigotry and fear — are unacceptable.
Michael has been working hard to pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity.
Legislation like this is more important than ever — and every bit of public support behind it matters.
Will you add your name to call on Congress to protect LGBTQ rights nationwide? Join us as we fight for love, acceptance, and equality this Pride Month >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060523_lgbtqrights]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060523_lgbtqrights]
Thank you, friend!
— Team Bennet

Hodges , the case that established marriage equality in the United States, could be next. So I got to work. I pushed hard to get the Respect for Marriage Act through Congress, and in December of last year, I was proud to join President Biden as he signed the bill into law. Marriage equality became the indisputable law of the land. It was overdue recognition that love is love, no matter what. This was a win — but there’s still so much to be done in the fight for equality and LGBTQ+ rights. We were able to pass the Respect for Marriage Act because of Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate. We could lose that in 2024. I’m working hard to support candidates running in key swing seats across the country. With your support, we can make sure these candidates have the resources they need to win in 2024 and keep fighting for what matters most. Can we count on you to donate now? [] Thanks, — Michael ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com> Date: Tue, Jun 6, 2023 at 11:03 AM Subject: Pride Friend — happy Pride Month! Every June, we have a chance to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here at home and across the country. Colorado is better because of the diversity in it. As we celebrate, let’s also recommit to the fight for equality. In the last couple of years, we’ve seen an onslaught of legislation going after LGBTQ+ rights. These attacks — based in bigotry and fear — are unacceptable. Michael has been working hard to pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity. Legislation like this is more important than ever — and every bit of public support behind it matters. Will you add your name to call on Congress to protect LGBTQ rights nationwide? Join us as we fight for love, acceptance, and equality this Pride Month >> [] SIGN ON NOW [] Thank you, friend! — Team Bennet DONATE NOW [] Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| Peter,

Happy Pride Month! This year it’s more important than ever to recognize and celebrate the voices and leaders in the LGBTQ+ community.

We’ve made so much progress over the years to ensure that members of the LGBTQ+ community have the same rights and opportunities as everyone else in this country. However, we must recognize that hate and discrimination still exist.

Just last year, Republican legislatures across the country passed a record number of anti-LGBTQ laws, including bans on books and classroom curriculum. Right-wing extremists will continue to pass outlandish legislation unless we take action to stop them.

**That’s why I’m a proud cosponsor of the Equality Act, which would ban discrimination based on sexual orientation.

[_I promise to always be a champion for LGBTQ+ rights in Washington, but I need your help to ensure my reelection in 2024. body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **" Amazon Loophole" could hand you $28,544 in "royalty" payouts** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06b9cef7437940e4b96240912fd42cd8&_e=eYHfsyolQJytrJeIVgCCdDbM9TxuXALkSgNrIqms2FCw7wC9vBizYiexxNSqpM_EPewBGi4yRBAJusk32XSQglXlJJNq7ka-0K2IaN8lkE9sVW50zXDmr7R-QDu8wUnCqjjFpLqQuGOyysnHPeZ_5hhzT8lnTnRg12EEYolzDvP5cQxItpsNkWwAtyFNIwz5L24pR1wRteM9LmFKio1cThjC6jfvc_5PTWjt2acMwfkxP0yljWHKrQAHBf6HcrCW) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the "Amazon secret royalty program..." And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It's available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. **[Watch short video now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06b9cef7437940e4b96240912fd42cd8&_e=eYHfsyolQJytrJeIVgCCdDbM9TxuXALkSgNrIqms2FCw7wC9vBizYiexxNSqpM_EPewBGi4yRBAJusk32XSQglXlJJNq7ka-0K2IaN8lkE_kv4VK2AfCpaYlcRQqHuNOZmf4gKNuzlvDKA2Dnhy-lcw7fOEnmSMwZCayGbx_ZwozfsuCiOVOGbRYk8Kha_cG4TTltiMd0TGLYdEXEK7fwWmvxaC0akt_C-Jr-7aLL011LEmOlaKAHijCmQ090ncy)**

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Undecided voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Poll after poll has shown millions of Californians are undecided about who they’ll support in next March’s U.S. Senate primary.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)
Derek,
Poll after poll has shown **millions of Californians are undecided about who they’ll support in next March’s U.S. Senate primary.**
Katie has won tough races before, but there are nearly 22 million registered voters in California—and about half of them haven’t made up their mind—so we have _a lot_ of work to do.
[**Can you pitch in your first donation of $5 or whatever you can afford to help us reach millions of voters across California?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230612-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI12_1_UND_20230612_V1_F&refcode2=24653_3422442_xSPsyV&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230612-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI12_1_UND_20230612_V1_F&refcode2=24653_3422442_xSPsyV&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)**
Here are just a few of the tasks your donations can help us accomplish:
* Hiring organizers up and down the state to persuade and turnout voters in their community;
* Launching digital ads to reach voters while they scroll;
* Placing TV ads in California’s REALLY expensive media markets;
* Opening field offices so we can grow our volunteer base and organizing work;
* And so much more!

Accomplishing these tasks in a state as big as California will require serious resources—and $0.00 of that has or will come from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil.
**That’s why we’re asking:[Will you pitch in your first donation of $5—or whatever you can afford—today so we can reach undecided voters across California?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230612-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI12_1_UND_20230612_V1_F&refcode2=24653_3422442_xSPsyV&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230612-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI12_1_UND_20230612_V1_F&refcode2=24653_3422442_xSPsyV&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)**
Thank you for your support.
—Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI12_1_UND_20230612_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=24653_3422442_xSPsyV&akid=24653%2E3422442%2ExSPsyV)**

name: Alex, United We Dream Action
subject: 🔥🏆✊HERE TO STAY: The fight begins today!
body:
To immigrants & allies everywhere: this Week of Action YOU have the power! | | | **⏰Peter, the time has come to fight for immigrant justice!** Last week, I gave you a sneak peek into our**“Our States, Our Power Week of Action.”** But, I can finally give you the full tea. 😏 Here’s the rundown:**We won’t wait any longer for our elected officials to give our communities what we need. 😤** We are long due for policies that help our communities thrive – but instead, all I’ve heard about lately are policy attacks that threaten our immigrant and LGBTQIA+ rights. We can’t wait for more harmful bills like Florida’s anti-immigrant SB 1718 to make their way across the nation. **These state attacks make it clear that we need to reclaim our power NOW, and we need your help to win this fight.** **Let’s put harmful policies on blast & demand the change we ****_actually_****need in our states**. From June 12-16, we’re coming together to make our voices heard during the “Our States, Our Power” Week of Action. Yes! It all starts TODAY – immigrant youth & allies across the country are waiting for **YOU** to join us! Leaders in our communities have already taken initiative to bring us together across the country – now we’re only missing you 🫶 **[🔎 Click here (or our map below) to find an event near you:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lwt14d0Ba3GUHEIzLW5BreLhHjrqiyjsGOzJ7TaHgpk8IhX901-Uuu9qZEcYN_GeUbXApKchGi--r8NxovPTD3d2RiIR2VymS2wuXozDGBZKQ98M-w2YJlHx-P1RyHwFjl0mXJH_JabtP9o_tTAC1xgV4WQeHxHp7CFVzarR4NSUbpz1UJNRCtpo6RKEKS9AQi4pAZzxMdLpF7IiI-J_w5B0MQBStvzhcfZn0s8sgqqCA/3wz/_HLO0mekTQOm-oVimQDhtQ/h0/QNFhSqFdKv4AdfGuHKMvBrYw_KwBjb-TtEk7txTWbYw)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lwt14d0Ba3GUHEIzLW5BreLhHjrqiyjsGOzJ7TaHgpk8By5-5aOCLvTURjA3cnYvFv8GZ5ufT8wnVaK-91CvfIbDqbuS7l_FqBp7WaolA0qvD3kF5zuXyOUl7UPM9LR0DArzH_YbyqGCj_vzcVzheg4PriKwm6iSr-wIPgu4s7YGQQBi9b4NQBEF4fTI7ifPFRsRnhWtI14WMQpktmK3NMV2e2N0BBhcnsHIsw3oUCnIg/3wz/_HLO0mekTQOm-oVimQDhtQ/h1/YbLDPo6EV2_UfQVHX0apNMcgc09CQ9Bsf5Kr02NRtIo) **** If in-person actions aren’t your thing, no worries! **From sending a letter to your governor in Virginia, to spreading the word about our fight @ our Text Day of Action this Wednesday, there’s BIG and small actions YOU can take to show up for our community.****_(_**_⭐ fav this email & come back throughout the week to take action & reclaim your power)_ **[✍️ WRITE TO YOUR GOVERNOR](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkWreH7b3E1yPaJCqVF24fHZTB2tKwVUjBvnW9ok1FQ9a3qWGTPsib813rS6HX7zd-CyOy3wZ6Kj0A8xLW7lCphiUQOvS83jBJTqz7GckV3j6Tgkc5ZoOKAAeOwEVy3iAQcTeWPqNWrymTdwDc5n4eLT97pEsy_prMDsxtH8HwHCdH6m2ew7L4RJ-m6TGJxpd1x9fhFY53TFeW0msaWA_5rv7_600w5_RI4E_boqrjTqLeJqYB6IAeJkU10XA0MIOhFaoLLL-ZzLnccLtfNiUIUtCOlX2ccZOlJWW7PPmpxtg/3wz/_HLO0mekTQOm-oVimQDhtQ/h2/UNb1IKij4Ov0bjBaCWg0oRiWp8rnKDgqbexrmfM8nEA)** **[📲 INVITE PEERS TO SEND A LETTER](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXXF77IupGq6J-mKMdfsmF6mLX8WnweS4H-qJHbPE0nJ9KQguiR3nELOB_BSaH1eq5X1oWShlo11I79ejgmToNY12WFZTm4WBsJGkb4XEs_H_AVB_kS-sJDa7JFqFmZ2jj81YuIn6xRU5xFyWz5qLuD8SdMc45fIq_k4fd6fhN6a8Vln4YhbgBrbNv4e_fm6TCEc3Fkz-q59qF4UCDUA2qJVDiV9NeGMYVc3vPFc1AEVBOVX4YZtEHmfht5U9T_jEdTo5PmLHGo1qUa5SuAYj41k_iMb1rG3sk9siKp3cyY7c/3wz/_HLO0mekTQOm-oVimQDhtQ/h3/6c0MmkW0kWQoW8Phyji3pmd87DgN0TJhmLOLfwPolxE)** **✊** We are **HERE TO STAY** , and no one can tell us otherwise. Let’s fight for the future we want for our communities & the policies that will allow us to get there. [Can I count you in, Peter?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lwt14d0Ba3GUHEIzLW5BreLhHjrqiyjsGOzJ7TaHgpk8N6V__CNh9Rkn96itudW8yHpzwLwtLrjRp68FZ3Az7HTvc-j7pfbTQefl-0NYG9zlWw7nibclA71DoRcjLH583zTZVduB2nMfQILhxWaSVKEjntPZWh8FyNGpq3BkgI5DZXzgmo8WxNbe7ym2xheCpdsfj-5hIgNsnSL1Gv5uSxH5F8nQOPbjPwpQwGwPKbCKg/3wz/_HLO0mekTQOm-oVimQDhtQ/h4/bMgBBmxQVStFGYLd_Zbte7l-G1Jm4b4X-YDr2ZGXFeM) In unity, Alex and the UWD Action team

name: CaucusRoom
subject: He Can't Even Respect the Flag!
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-alublt-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-j/) **So Disrespectful** Biden's administration is**[receiving backlash online over its Pride Month display at the White House](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-t/) **as many are saying it violates the U.S. Flag Code. **What's the Hold Up?** Trump is facing indictment charges for allegedly mishandling classified documents from when he was in office;**[Joe Biden-- who is guilty of the same thing-- has yet to be interviewed.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-i/)** **We Must Fight for the Children** **[So now we're "hysterical" because we want to protect children](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alublt-trhiujldw-d/).** Biden reiterated his support for transgender Americans and the broader LGBTQ+ community Thursday, calling detractors 'hysterical' and 'prejudiced.'

# Get up to speed...
---
Last week, Matt Dolan unveiled one of the boldest, most conservative budget reform packages in Ohio history. The historic bill, dubbed by advocates as “transformational in nature” balances the budget, cuts taxes, consolidates tax brackets, provides tax relief for Ohio small businesses, ushers in universal school choice, and supports Ohio law enforcement among other notable initiatives. **Americans for Prosperity** branded Dolan’s budget as “bold tax reform” and “...the best budget product yet.” **Americans for Tax Reform **call it a “game changer.” At the same time, Democrats and liberal special interest groups wasted no time in attacking the proposal. Analysts were quick to note that Matt Dolan’s proposal is “the most conservative package that will exist during Ohio’s budget process.” While more work remains to be done before final passage later this month, Dolan said: **_“I’m proud of the conservative reform initiatives in our budget. Ohioans will keep more of their hard-earned money as we build safer communities and expand opportunities for every child to maximize their potential. We must uphold our promise to those who sent us here, and act to empower people, not government.”_** In case you missed it, here’s more news coverage featuring Matt Dolan and the landmark Senate GOP budget. clean_body: | | | June 12th, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio | ICYMI: Dolan Champions Ohio Tax Cuts, Universal School Choice in Conservative Budget Plan | | Get up to speed... Last week, Matt Dolan unveiled one of the boldest, most conservative budget reform packages in Ohio history. The historic bill, dubbed by advocates as “transformational in nature” balances the budget, cuts taxes, consolidates tax brackets, provides tax relief for Ohio small businesses, ushers in universal school choice, and supports Ohio law enforcement among other notable initiatives. Americans for Prosperity branded Dolan’s budget as “bold tax reform” and “...the best budget product yet.” Americans for Tax Reform call it a “game changer.” At the same time, Democrats and liberal special interest groups wasted no time in attacking the proposal. Analysts were quick to note that Matt Dolan’s proposal is “the most conservative package that will exist during Ohio’s budget process.” While more work remains to be done before final passage later this month, Dolan said: “I’m proud of the conservative reform initiatives in our budget. Ohioans will keep more of their hard-earned money as we build safer communities and expand opportunities for every child to maximize their potential. We must uphold our promise to those who sent us here, and act to empower people, not government.” In case you missed it, here’s more news coverage featuring Matt Dolan and the landmark Senate GOP budget. : “Ohio senators want additional income tax cuts, universal school vouchers in GOP crafted budget plan” : Ohio Senate GOP seeks universal school voucher eligibility, big tax cuts in state budget plan” : “Major overhaul of public education, $1.5 billion tax cut inside Ohio Senate’s budget proposal” : “Universal school vouchers, tax cuts, $1B in local projects in Ohio Senate budget proposal” (Columbus): “Taxes, school choice focus of Ohio State budget” (Columbus): “Ohio lawmakers’ plans for state budget” (Youngstown): “Ohio senators want additional income tax cuts, universal vouchers in GOP crafted budget plan” : “Ohio Senate introduces new operating budget with focus on tax cuts, education” : “Ohio Senate budget plans tax cuts, universal school vouchers and stripping state school board powers” Learn more about Matt Dolan and his conservative record of results for Ohio at . | | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: I almost died defending the Capitol on January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230612-1-f&t=1&akid=700%2E734936%2Ez_xUDK)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb.
Mark Lamb recently declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority.
But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230612-1-f&t=2&akid=700%2E734936%2Ez_xUDK)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230612-1-f&t=3&akid=700%2E734936%2Ez_xUDK)
Mark Lamb says the insurrections were “very loving, Christian people.”
I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not.
I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you contribute to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he defeats Mark Lamb and anyone who runs against him in this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230612-1-f&t=4&akid=700%2E734936%2Ez_xUDK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

Team, Republicans are learning a tough lesson:
**FIRST:**
After years of stacking the courts with justices who the GOP believed would help implement their anti-choice agenda, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , ending a nearly 50-year precedent protecting reproductive freedom.

**THEN:
Voters _revolted_.**

Last November, the predicted “red wave” turned out to be nothing more than a trickle. And earlier this year, Wisconsin voters elected a fair-minded, pro-choice state supreme court justice by a _double-digit margin._

**AND THAT'S NOT ALL:**
_Axios_ is reporting that “Republicans have underperformed in federal, judicial, statewide and local elections across the country.”

**SO NOW:
Republicans are panicking.**

**Republicans know they can’t win by running on their extreme, anti-choice agenda – but instead of trying to persuade voters,_their plan is to make it harder for voters to make their voices heard_.**
---

**Quickly, team: Will you pitch in now to help the NDRC fight for fairness so we can protect reproductive freedom across the country?**

Wade , ending a nearly 50-year precedent protecting reproductive freedom. THEN: Voters revolted. Last November, the predicted “red wave” turned out to be nothing more than a trickle. And earlier this year, Wisconsin voters elected a fair-minded, pro-choice state supreme court justice by a double-digit margin. AND THAT'S NOT ALL: Axios is reporting that “Republicans have underperformed in federal, judicial, statewide and local elections across the country.” SO NOW: Republicans are panicking. body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8ct9ula1aNGQnayAaR_08Gx5f4JoN0QNUn1dWawi-oI3MNzS-Tfrj_dndbEFhiydmvAeO5RV0Y-9ajkEJ8HhfJy_0tSxcjgPFGFHwaoJrKSp8Rz9g7lGof3Ee-yX6KDtTxPBh3z2G9cEy5mfLTbbTxrZ29Y6gHmZVzB_v6L74FyOoaWtpIDqCtndHz7s8DG3aVv90fkkXstjXDyC-bIEtmWG1K0SV5kXSZZ7b1WirxUSjqV99PqwP3XQR5Ta35HBek7vOd1aG1xx56qdlHS9BLDjo8Fygkf-JBHTISE4EntaMnwNBMtqVL6kIpqfYHrf0blhH9QNJYk6IaAJiQ33A7sh7Qo85fhvqjE0L95XtwIIhqiC9SX78Q_TqHQnh2K3bA/3wz/m-oHFs1CQeKP9cCQESYPIg/h0/VewK66D1xgCu34R302mOBH8ZSjPCkkO2H8HNNA0fKRo) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cSVSlVcFh_bZgnQPluJzKMGO1MdvKBMFPtCSijiwAFqoch87egMKw82pLKv7-aawtVWIkpWTAMwDPKTNpQ0WrtheAMihg0ikqUmoOfpZFpZoe1QPpEpGFyVZuP0XXULzSWibZxmcucy7kB9IIqOstcnVT-bV8_qKeqnccE1B8gFzXyVxQQ97h4pQ289PFvzl5Mrd4co7eqsd6OetlOT7okuSWaB8Piz7codsgWV9mR3Pf21g5a4Aztij36ax1wT5CWPsm3yU7eDkP9XYH1bpfk-FOmhnbLVJGDlk612aw6XA_3elGycxSK_zLr2ZK1_d9yk5AZg9GYpmIlb394I9Z-zD-4be3i9xs19KhbLV_30kKMOzIC9HBtlwF93Gfzs3tkamKhJyaP1V_UBHgFGxN6lOhZ2GLCPLGn9c6c84C4LsobF_RID5wbyEEfwxxvNt_tWoalXj6OxdxtrgpNHIosVlxEQU3CW39BW_P2DOPpwWT1ACGQ6e05NS8zVKpAWatss13kiYz4LFd1dU29zuTEA/3wz/m-oHFs1CQeKP9cCQESYPIg/h1/O9fVw6liiP_kDkYLRDBSt3eC3y0el-z0GAkBvzZFZD4) Hey Peter,

I wanted you to be one of the first to know: I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate to defeat Josh Hawley.

[If you’re with me in the fight to bring real leadership back to Missouri and send Hawley packing, split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign today. Keep reading to learn why I'm running.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cSVSlVcFh_bZgnQPluJzKMGO1MdvKBMFPtCSijiwAFqoch87egMKw82pLKv7-aawtVWIkpWTAMwDPKTNpQ0WrtheAMihg0ikqUmoOfpZFpZoe1QPpEpGFyVZuP0XXULzSWibZxmcucy7kB9IIqOstcnVT-bV8_qKeqnccE1B8gFzXyVxQQ97h4pQ289PFvzl5Mrd4co7eqsd6OetlOT7okuSWaB8Piz7codsgWV9mR3Pf21g5a4Aztij36ax1wT5CIGQxF9Q8Ph96wtRzujChS2M_DtS1CSN73NYNxcpzMH1C9YPuBAvmwYHS3uEwlC7aOYOob9vrfgBUnNe5WpuY54CpMc39iiyGOLOPsgRZJL1eGCnUkOZviaA9LjsFe5kSaufnzwnGduTUyV7avaZ459xbLruXGJ2vGa3wWbLqyuvoVFuU3lq2wZJX-wgpL5fXZ8dqaYpgLzWjZ9IHvUQJar4wdly-4bY_nfjH4jHgJMpkXFsNUyCYxRkpo-DOqatCI7K9aC_XXFGBaOhpX5f-Wg/3wz/m-oHFs1CQeKP9cCQESYPIg/h2/JQJuO39pXsNKRLKbNuX-0XM8DVjf_aB-piA9XhjFuVc)

For me — this fight is personal. My dad spent 25 years as a police officer, and growing up, my family taught me I had a responsibility to make a difference when I could. In Ferguson, Missouri, that meant trying to help calm tensions between police and protesters.

I did what was natural to me: I worked to mediate between two sides who seemed at war with each other. At the time, I was a part-time judge and a professor, enforcing the law and teaching it. But Ferguson taught me I could be doing more — so I ran for Ferguson City Council and _won._

Then, when I saw a lack of leadership in the St. Louis County prosecutor's office, I took on the Democratic political establishment. In 2018, we shocked the nation when I was elected the first African American top prosecutor in the largest prosecuting attorney’s office in Missouri. With your help and support, we defeated a seven-term incumbent while taking a tough stand against violent criminals, all while bringing power closer to our community.

Now, I'm seeing that same lack of leadership I saw in St. Louis County in Washington. Public service is in my DNA, and I'm ready to fix it. That's why I need you onboard in our fight to defeat Josh Hawley in 2024:

[If you’re ready to send Hawley packing, split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign today to help us get this campaign off the ground!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cSVSlVcFh_bZgnQPluJzKMGO1MdvKBMFPtCSijiwAFqoch87egMKw82pLKv7-aawtVWIkpWTAMwDPKTNpQ0WrtheAMihg0ikqUmoOfpZFpZoe1QPpEpGFyVZuP0XXULzSWibZxmcucy7kB9IIqOstcnVT-bV8_qKeqnccE1B8gFzXyVxQQ97h4pQ289PFvzl5Mrd4co7eqsd6OetlOT7okuSWaB8Piz7codsgWV9mR3Pf21g5a4Aztij36ax1wT5CA7k3to7j49D3oWnM9B3r2hHc2iRk0kpe5cE6IMaGaDh2IFVcMWvTIWJXA4aFIHGKnlO_r7vaK3_f06NIun-kRWOg5tdkequgLlrPmSTs7TmsHsIRBQ_pJzdqfHHU4Qb9JvONMZ2b1Q2cSWsxoHiSL4cI7AY6RnCfxex0cDT2yLusZOGSXAzNclMd8-3LBrF-jmfDscCdZQTC-NFj25DqularVtHiHsrqn06RWEpyEYbL_zhYuECd9B5xvs3lKiAb4F6pGgHmMbAJXSwKcrUcHg/3wz/m-oHFs1CQeKP9cCQESYPIg/h3/rPqclgb8UTa_1xGtyKlbI9sZQfXLFBh-s84TPrwLqD4) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Wesley Bell and The Collective PAC.

Peter, since Day One in office, _Hawley’s only been focused on himself._

**We can do better.**

I know we’re going to face many challenges on the road ahead. There will be a lot of doubters who won’t believe we can win. But here’s what I believe: We have more in common than politicians like Hawley say we do, and together, we can take our state back.

[If you’re tired of politicians ignoring people like you, then this campaign is YOUR campaign. Let’s send Josh Hawley packing. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, I wanted you to be one of the first to know: I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate to defeat Josh Hawley. For me — this fight is personal. My dad spent 25 years as a police officer, and growing up, my family taught me I had a responsibility to make a difference when I could. In Ferguson, Missouri, that meant trying to help calm tensions between police and protesters. I did what was natural to me: I worked to mediate between two sides who seemed at war with each other. At the time, I was a part-time judge and a professor, enforcing the law and teaching it. But Ferguson taught me I could be doing more — so I ran for Ferguson City Council and won. Then, when I saw a lack of leadership in the St. Louis County prosecutor's office, I took on the Democratic political establishment. In 2018, we shocked the nation when I was elected the first African American top prosecutor in the largest prosecuting attorney’s office in Missouri. With your help and support, we defeated a seven-term incumbent while taking a tough stand against violent criminals, all while bringing power closer to our community. Now, I'm seeing that same lack of leadership I saw in St. Louis County in Washington. Public service is in my DNA, and I'm ready to fix it. That's why I need you onboard in our fight to defeat Josh Hawley in 2024: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Wesley Bell and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Peter, since Day One in office, Hawley’s only been focused on himself. We can do better. I know we’re going to face many challenges on the road ahead. There will be a lot of doubters who won’t believe we can win. But here’s what I believe: We have more in common than politicians like Hawley say we do, and together, we can take our state back. Together we'll make a difference, Wesley The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A shoestring budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our work to
elect progressive champions and transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out hinges on our grassroots fundraising.

We don’t take a single dime from corporate PACs, our average donation this
month is just $17.56, and right-wing PACs have already pledged to spend
millions against us this cycle.

We’re facing our mid-month fundraising deadline in just a few days and if
three supporters from 18326 each chip in $3, we’ll
reach our $35,000 fundraising goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134939?refcode=em20230612-29397&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j ]Will you be one the folks from 18326 to make a
$3 contribution right now? We’re so thankful for any amount
that you can afford to donate today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134939?refcode=em20230612-29397&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j ]Contribute $3

We’re building a solid base of progressives in Congress fighting for
Medicare for All, racial justice, and a Green New Deal — and we’re doing
it with a shoestring budget. But we need your support to keep our work
going.

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230612-29397-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29397_1203867_o1fw9j&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29397%2E1203867%2Eo1fw9j

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Kilmer HQ
subject: Did you catch Derek in The Seattle Times?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
“Congress is so strange. A man gets up to speak and says nothing. Nobody listens. Then everybody disagrees.”
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64733988/411058794/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExZWVlZjMtNmYwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eP88-VUu1pZ76j3eWCQfJe52ZFLFZVQNXW019yEJnLw=&emci=69e09457-3109-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=411eeef3-6f09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter — _The Seattle Times_ just wrote a piece covering Derek's efforts and determination to make Congress work for the people. **Have you had a chance to read it?**

Derek proudly began his chairmanship of the House Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress back in 2019 and has remained a staunch leader in bipartisan efforts to fix the broken process and facilitate across-the-aisle collaboration. The "Fix Congress" Committee proved _(through over 200 bipartisan recommendations – with numerous already implemented!)_ that Democrats and Republicans actually CAN work together.

**[Read an excerpt from _The Seattle Times_ Editorial piece below, then chip in whatever you can to support Derek's efforts to make Congress work for the American people →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64733989/411058795/1071353790?refcode=em23_230612_seattl_engg_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230612_seattl_engg_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=411eeef3-6f09-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExZWVlZjMtNmYwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eP88-VUu1pZ76j3eWCQfJe52ZFLFZVQNXW019yEJnLw=)**
* * *
* * *
**Rep. Derek Kilmer strives for constructive change in Congress**

_The Seattle Times editorial board and Kriley_
After visiting Capitol Hill, the Russian-born character actor Boris Marshalov remarked, “Congress is so strange. A man gets up to speak and says nothing. Nobody listens. Then everybody disagrees.”

That was more than 75 years ago, during the era when President Harry Truman coined the phrase “do-nothing Congress.” Even so, there was a time when this great deliberative body of ours was productive and its members felt honored to serve. Thankfully, one Washingtonian is working to make that true once more.

In 2019, U.S. Rep. Derek Kilmer, D-Gig Harbor, began chairmanship of the House Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress, or ModCom, determined to find ways to make Congress work better. Starting with ModCom itself, he insisted the 12-member committee have six Republicans and six Democrats and that all recommendations require a two-thirds vote. In these times, it sounds like self-sabotage, but ModCom has made 202 recommendations in four years, 130 of which have been implemented...
