body:
did you see our email?
| Last week we told you the HUGE news that Rep. Jamie Raskin will announce a final decision on his potential Senate run by July 4th! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-pet/?source=VPP_20230612_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=8394%2E878179%2EiEv1R2) With the clock ticking until his announcement, we expected a MASSIVE outpouring of support from top Democrats...**so we were STUNNED to see your name missing!**

We’re running out of time to encourage Democratic hero Jamie Raskin to run — _so we can only extend our petition’s deadline one LAST time._

[HURRY: Add your name to our urgent petition by MIDNIGHT to encourage Democrat Jamie Raskin to run for U.S. Senate! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-pet/?source=VPP_20230612_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=8394%2E878179%2EiEv1R2) | [**6,184 MORE SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: SIGN NOW TO ENCOURAGE JAMIE RASKIN TO RUN FOR SENATE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-pet/?source=VPP_20230612_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=8394%2E878179%2EiEv1R2)

VPP

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8394%2E878179%2EiEv1R2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8394%2E878179%2EiEv1R2).**

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Statement on Trump Indictment
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement regarding the indictment of former President Donald Trump...

| | |

clean_body: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement regarding the indictment of former President Donald Trump... | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 12, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement regarding the indictment of former President Donald Trump: This day will go down in infamy. The unprecedented and corrupt indictment of President Trump is built on sand and is brazen election interference. It is an indictment about nothing. Biden’s further transforming of the FBI and Justice Department into political enforcers in order to jail his leading political opponent could lead to the end of our constitutional republic. The indictment has followed years of prosecutorial misconduct, harassment, and abuse victimizing Trump. Not only is Trump innocent but he is a crime victim. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch recently announced that an argument will be held in the Supreme Court of Delaware on Wednesday, June 14, 2023, in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed on behalf of itself and the Daily Caller News Foundation regarding the secret deal keeping President Biden’s Senate records from being made public. ---|--- | | | | | While the Biden administration and its media allies highlight that illegal immigration has dropped considerably since the termination of a Trump-era restriction, a record number of suspected terrorists have been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico. Not surprisingly, mainstream news reports have focused on the positive effect that the expiration of a COVID-related rule known as Title 42 has had on migration. ---|--- | | | | | “Given the overwhelming evidence of anti-Trump bias disclosed in the Durham Report, it is urgent that Americans be able to find out who is again investigating Trump from the Garland Justice Department and his appointee Jack Smith,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “Special Prosecutor Jack Smith isn’t above the law, and the American people have the right to know about just who is working on his unprecedented and politicized anti-Trump investigation.” ---|--- | | | One America News Network A decade old legal case that could exonerate former President Donald Trump has been buried by legacy media. “[Special counsel] Jack Smith is terrified of the only standing legal case decision from a court concerning the Presidential Records Act,” said Chris Farrell, Director of Investigations at Judicial Watch. Just the News Conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch on Monday announced that it had filed a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against the Department of Justice over its refusal to disclose the names of staffers working with special counsel Jack Smith on his investigation of former President Donald Trump. Fox News The CIA’s “WELCO-ME” pride month initiative quickly drew criticism from Twitter users who called out the government agency for “re-branding.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

body:
I’m running for Congress because no one in Congress is talking about the issues people in my community care about.

| Peter,

I’m Sam Eppler, and I’m writing to share some big news: **I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 24th Congressional District.**

As the youngest high school principal in Dallas, I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Texans deserve a leader in Washington committed to providing quality education for every student and investing in our future.

[_**I’ll explain more about why I’m running below, but can I count on you to split a contribution between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to become a Founding Donor?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64734034/411058958/849296139?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230612-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQ4Mzk1NS03MDA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_-zOv7HPxufDJ1GClQaUIa-lPksU5Z-tEqs_y-k-Do=)

---
**I’m running for Congress because no one in Congress is talking about the issues people in my community care about.**

As a product of the public school system and a current high school principal, I’m committed to education above all else. Right now, we’re facing a crisis in our schools – our teachers are underpaid, our schools are underfunded, and our students and teachers are fearing for their lives in the wake of gun violence.

I believe that every single student across the country should have the same opportunities and the best education possible, regardless of their zip code. We must ensure that we’re investing in our future to prepare for 21st-century jobs in our rapidly changing and growing economy.

My Republican opponent, Beth Van Duyne, is more focused on protecting and re-electing her former boss, President Trump, than taking care of Texans.

[_**As a vital member of our community and someone who would be the youngest member of the Texas delegation in Congress, I understand the real issues families are facing in TX-24, and I will always put our district first. So will you split a donation between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to become Founding Donor?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64734036/411058960/849296139?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230612-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQ4Mzk1NS03MDA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_-zOv7HPxufDJ1GClQaUIa-lPksU5Z-tEqs_y-k-Do=)

subject: Stop this anti-choice Dem

body:
When reproductive rights are on the line, we can’t let anti-choice Democrats off the hook. | | | Peter — The primary election in Virginia is just over one week away — and this year, the future of reproductive rights in the Commonwealth are at stake. Anti-abortion Democrat and scandal-ridden State Senator Joe Morrissey is facing a competitive primary challenge from Lashrecse Aird — a pro-choice Black woman and former higher-ed professional who has been a fierce advocate for working families in the Virginia House of Delegates. **Virginia is the only state in the South to not pass an abortion ban in the one year since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. But with Republicans in control of the governor’s mansion and the state House of Delegates, the future of reproductive rights is in jeopardy.** Democrats only maintain a slim 22-18 majority in the State Senate, and can’t rely on Joe Morrissey, who just last year co-sponsored an unsuccessful bill with Republicans that would have banned abortion in Virginia after 20 weeks. **[When reproductive rights are on the line, we can’t let anti-choice Democrats off the hook. Will you contribute $10 now to help defeat anti-choice Democrats and replace them with progressive leaders like Laschrese Aird?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUvmS9NCS6sVwjRwVYQRJu1Ue1qJuU-EAKbDHtLC_WUUxqJGQymzcFugijuKWBxE8__1a-CG1MMBLZaPApFy47o28V1VMOKSQoLptOEX2sEU2f0TGA7BYTAIEOP2AoBQ_vesmIzdveQI5t2KcG4D94AFrrIsoetyF4Y2q_ExyeNdesV2X_chnRvFYohhpDwYr-YhRMgSAgj6S9krZtxI93VhT2W0wyreoCq60v1fBuDohyJHrNKP7QjyjoExCQYGuUm8HBN5MPXPJi7Xr6QC1B6vnH1-frorWULSXqAvuC_tggOCRg_aFO8BwyrjHB9QFJkZ517J-QJxRJtW78a8Ts-Q/3wz/5bp3eWU2Rk29uBJIyYun3A/h0/Q1VDVEzJ1-76alN6xa_8_W9sYLgxSr9MsQ5nI3iUSlE)** **[Donate](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUvmS9NCS6sVwjRwVYQRJu1Ue1qJuU-EAKbDHtLC_WUUxqJGQymzcFugijuKWBxE8_sOHc58tiXYqAtaSKXWFHmC0BbxDg0XWw1QnsJreWNY0J8PpQhEtUj7LalZ6eYHZPkNnmAf_pB0KK2XpB1yhGTe9laaV_mX_QfHrp_3WWGwVxiOM8dTtmhaG2CiIrIrrwI8EEx93Yl74JUnPkqOtNYqt2EaT0QmKJtoFmV6xvwjMajJPih8oupq62LKy23dGpXrduYA5UY76Vou-EV_s_MiLa64PhBcqh7Mjrb_mJ9uvC9vHq6hpD0o_GOlqtccT9ffP7Or_UABWfRpzVH8eWAA/3wz/5bp3eWU2Rk29uBJIyYun3A/h1/QpvN4npc21p0Jxbjf0Bg34oqt9-CoVTA6puI2V1-WNw)** The contrast between Joe Morrissey and Lashrecse Aird couldn’t be any more stark. On the one hand you have Lashrecse who has increased funding for public schools, held polluters to account, and passed criminal justice reform legislation. On the other you have anti-choice Joe Morrissey, who has a long history of corruption and predatory behavior — including a conviction for "contributing to the delinquency of a minor" who he married and who now claims he abused her.1 **Joe Morrissey simply has no business being in elected office and definitely should not be in the position to make a pivotal vote on reproductive rights in the Commonwealth.** Next Tuesday’s primary election will be the first significant election in Virginia since new districts were drawn — including 11 new State Senate districts without incumbents. **Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Younkin wants to ban abortion — and Morrissey has signaled a willingness to work with him.** With only a razor-thin majority in the Senate standing in the way of an abortion ban, it’s imperative that we defeat Joe Morrissey in the primary next Tuesday, then redouble our efforts in the general to flip the House of Delegates and defend the Democratic majority in the State Senate to ensure abortion rights are protected. **[Will you stand up for abortion rights in the South by helping defeat the last anti-choice Democrat in the Virginia State Senate? clean_body: When reproductive rights are on the line, we can’t let anti-choice Democrats off the hook. | | | Peter — The primary election in Virginia is just over one week away — and this year, the future of reproductive rights in the Commonwealth are at stake. Anti-abortion Democrat and scandal-ridden State Senator Joe Morrissey is facing a competitive primary challenge from Lashrecse Aird — a pro-choice Black woman and former higher-ed professional who has been a fierce advocate for working families in the Virginia House of Delegates. Virginia is the only state in the South to not pass an abortion ban in the one year since Roe v. Wade was overturned. But with Republicans in control of the governor’s mansion and the state House of Delegates, the future of reproductive rights is in jeopardy. Democrats only maintain a slim 22-18 majority in the State Senate, and can’t rely on Joe Morrissey, who just last year co-sponsored an unsuccessful bill with Republicans that would have banned abortion in Virginia after 20 weeks. The contrast between Joe Morrissey and Lashrecse Aird couldn’t be any more stark. On the one hand you have Lashrecse who has increased funding for public schools, held polluters to account, and passed criminal justice reform legislation. On the other you have anti-choice Joe Morrissey, who has a long history of corruption and predatory behavior — including a conviction for "contributing to the delinquency of a minor" who he married and who now claims he abused her.1 Joe Morrissey simply has no business being in elected office and definitely should not be in the position to make a pivotal vote on reproductive rights in the Commonwealth. Next Tuesday’s primary election will be the first significant election in Virginia since new districts were drawn — including 11 new State Senate districts without incumbents. Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Younkin wants to ban abortion — and Morrissey has signaled a willingness to work with him. With only a razor-thin majority in the Senate standing in the way of an abortion ban, it’s imperative that we defeat Joe Morrissey in the primary next Tuesday, then redouble our efforts in the general to flip the House of Delegates and defend the Democratic majority in the State Senate to ensure abortion rights are protected. | [ No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df2597be49c453d9db7a36447715717&_e=xf3cP4b9xZIpHJGgXb-0_1CmCD1Awprf0n2IkQEPOCg9xKRPVAcut7RlDbqtTSO8q5sseFQmuvTyRaSnmYRQkQ2YjSOywZjidCr_4ErKx5_vGTvb9eeVPaENLzqXLD-N0dVykiyBh9fgoERQq8SLLwQLKSb9AqM83yp2rD1R5hMvIhvaNyN-S7NkK86nMW4rvA7NNoVWxAc0FapwLQYd-Q%3D%3D)

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df2597be49c453d9db7a36447715717&_e=xf3cP4b9xZIpHJGgXb-0_1CmCD1Awprf0n2IkQEPOCg9xKRPVAcut7RlDbqtTSO8CgDxAm42GCOPO_2wp0JufswtqxNmlEiO7jB4gvdYLljIe8BgU2OdmWHjsE75KEgF9XmB07-YsXwHMqBMYn5zmLqV7xbBJgiCz_dhgdkSFjUuaGcG4hTNXF29gLAL7roWY1jEa8-0-jgWCJkgaErCAw%3D%3D)

Instead of being a Fake News victim -- sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df2597be49c453d9db7a36447715717&_e=xf3cP4b9xZIpHJGgXb-0_1CmCD1Awprf0n2IkQEPOCg9xKRPVAcut7RlDbqtTSO8DQyfXdJxL3VuCiAMN69EbJBhvdtpq5BzR82U6VZDU9g2gLLypb-wr_zlw1mVnq0A9Qqdo8RnuthH_CFpa5hozSvDBZKi65S6mseZP8QF2EnAPnhDcRzSP_5w5IsFG773KzjNxBeThodOTDARh781yQ%3D%3D). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

* | _The chance to join for free is a limited time offer and once we're out of spots it may not be offered again. We are 100% committed to delivering TRUE news that is easy to read & timely, but we can't keep it free forever. Get your spot now before we run out of room!_

| | | Friend,

body:
| | |

Peter,
With a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills moving through legislatures across the country, we urgently need to replace hateful and dangerous extremists with dedicated and compassionate leaders who will work toward protecting our essential rights.

**That's why today, we're showcasing three of our trailblazing LGBTQ+ Emerge alums who are championing equality and fairness at every level!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64734760/411062104/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1227-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTBjMmQ5LTc0MDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zC6-dcRqRN5pwn16tjBCASYgnnReQ1VaHoZMOtFCg7U=)
**Councilmember Krystal Oriadha (Emerge Maryland)** won her 2022 election to become the first openly LGBTQ+ person to serve on the Prince George’s County Council. She continues her path of deep community engagement and advocacy and uplifts her constituents’ calls for affordable housing, access to quality health care, and equal rights.
When **Rep. Brianna Titone (Emerge Colorado)** won her first election, she became the first transgender lawmaker in Colorado. Now, she’s serving her third term in the Colorado State House, advocating for working families and raising the bar for protecting LGBTQ+ Coloradans.
**Judge Shannon Baldwin (Emerge Texas)** made history as the first Black and LGBTQ+ woman to run and preside over the Harris County court. Judge Baldwin holds fast to the belief that everyone deserves to have their rights protected. She is a staunch advocate for the wellbeing of those who have been harmed and is a champion for fairness in the courtroom.
**Across the country, more LGBTQ+ Emerge leaders are stepping up to run for office, unseat GOP extremists, and defend their LGBTQ+ constituents. But we urgently need your help to provide the critical training and support they need to win.[ Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge today to empower Democratic women to run for office and transform politics in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64734765/411062108/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1227-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTBjMmQ5LTc0MDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zC6-dcRqRN5pwn16tjBCASYgnnReQ1VaHoZMOtFCg7U=)**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64734766/411062115/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1227-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTBjMmQ5LTc0MDktZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zC6-dcRqRN5pwn16tjBCASYgnnReQ1VaHoZMOtFCg7U=)

body:
One of the things I love about Callie is that there’s no challenge too daunting or too intimidating to stop her. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735134/411063176/1201310784?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230612peanutbutter_mb_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkxMzE0OTctNzUwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f77HM2RhAsxD0gs4-Zy3eyTeCNeE9foJwDMW_bT346Y=&emci=b22a8b4a-6509-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c9131497-7509-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)
---
**One of the things I love about Callie is that there’s no challenge too daunting or too intimidating to stop her.** When I got back from war, Callie made it her mission to fight for me — for veterans struggling to return to normal, everyday life. She’s spent more than 15 years fighting for veterans and the care they need. When she went to U of M (with two small kids at home), she didn’t let a little peanut butter on her sweater stop her from achieving her goal. (No, seriously, have you seen how much peanut butter kids eat?) When she decided to run for Congress, Callie didn’t allow naysayers to deter her from running. People told her going up against an incumbent politician would be too tough and, two months later, she’s proving them wrong at every turn. **I’ve watched my wife time and time again refuse to back down from something others might say is too difficult. And that’s exactly the kind of leadership we need in Washington.** We need a representative with a backbone. Tenacity. Grit. We need someone fighting for us each and every day — not someone who is afraid of talking to their constituents at a town hall. And if you ask me (okay, I’m a bit biased), Callie’s the woman for the job. **I’ve been told this is one of the most important fundraising months of the entire campaign.[So, whether you’ve already made a donation or not, chipping in $5, $10, or $20 right now can go a long way to helping Callie run a winning campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735135/411063177/-384735071?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230612peanutbutter_mb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkxMzE0OTctNzUwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f77HM2RhAsxD0gs4-Zy3eyTeCNeE9foJwDMW_bT346Y=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: One of the things I love about Callie is that there’s no challenge too daunting or too intimidating to stop her. | One of the things I love about Callie is that there’s no challenge too daunting or too intimidating to stop her. When I got back from war, Callie made it her mission to fight for me — for veterans struggling to return to normal, everyday life. She’s spent more than 15 years fighting for veterans and the care they need. When she went to U of M (with two small kids at home), she didn’t let a little peanut butter on her sweater stop her from achieving her goal. (No, seriously, have you seen how much peanut butter kids eat?) When she decided to run for Congress, Callie didn’t allow naysayers to deter her from running. People told her going up against an incumbent politician would be too tough and, two months later, she’s proving them wrong at every turn. I’ve watched my wife time and time again refuse to back down from something others might say is too difficult. And that’s exactly the kind of leadership we need in Washington. We need a representative with a backbone. Tenacity. Grit. We need someone fighting for us each and every day — not someone who is afraid of talking to their constituents at a town hall. And if you ask me (okay, I’m a bit biased), Callie’s the woman for the job. I’ve been told this is one of the most important fundraising months of the entire campaign.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Matt P.S. name: Bob, me (3)
subject: 's Investment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
Dear ,
I'm making rounds tonight and asking supporters: What would motivate you to become more invested in my race? I want you to be part of the rural Democratic movement, and I am committed to answering any questions you may have about my candidacy for US Congress. We can arrange a call, or I can respond through your reply to this e-mail or connect in person.
, I have a quarterly finance deadline in just 18 days, and we need to massively ramp up aour fundraising efforts immediately. I hate asking , truly, but if you have been following my campaign, you know you can make a real difference by giving us a financial boost.
While we have many supporters because I don't believe in big money in politics, we don't ask anyone to "max out." The federal limit is $3,300 per individual per election cycle, and I would rather have 330 $100 donors [bit.ly/FundDrBob] , or thousands of individuals at smaller gifts.
Therefore, we need to reach out to a lot more people.
This is where you come in, .
With your help, we can win this election and make considerable strides in universal healthcare, childcare, public education, environmental protection, housing, infrastructure investments, and rural connectivity. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
As you know, we are running a grassroots campaign not aligned with PACs, corporations, or ultra-wealthy, agenda-driven donors. I am proud of our support so far and counting on people like you to help us build momentum.
Please consider contributing, or let me know how I can better encourage your investment. Every dollar counts, and I am genuinely grateful for any support you can provide.
Thank you for considering my request. I am confident we can make a real difference in the lives of people in Northern Michigan, the Upper Peninsula, Rural America, and across the Nation.
I need you in my corner.
Best regards,
Dr. Bob Lorinser
bob@votedrbob.com
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
CONTRIBUTE [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

| | A letter from Doug White
We have been very busy living up to our mission statement of working with communities to build political infrastructure to increase the voice and visibility of rural America. From district wide collaboration efforts to Democratic fundraising dinners to Tri-Pride 2023 to alliance building with west coast agencies to bring resources to Central Washington, we have been working for you! For all of us! What a 501(c)3?
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7dOYS0C55/c?w=lEQoJ6ArW0hXNKtqFll9GcMq6zSkCMbQlHl7wwWCYSw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI1M2Y4MTU4NS00YWFhLTQzNmMtMDU2Ni0wOWI1NDZlMTQyYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | Patsy Whitefoot: Congressional District 4 Representative to the Washington DemocratsIt is an honor to be able to join and participate in the CD4 Representative to the Washington Dems, Patricia Whitefoot's monthly meeting. Doug White's campaign was the first to unify all the legislative districts and county democratic parties for a single purpose. It is wonderful to see this continuing and the Central Washington Dems working together means that there is no limit to the possibilities.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7dOYS0C55/c?w=vVxIfytUfCSWYngfwcMb6CzT0DLI2eV8ol3ws03F9v4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuVHJpLVByaWRlLm9yZyIsInIiOiJiMmY0Nzg1OC1lNDc1LTRkY2QtNDY3MC02ODAzNmU0ODlmZjQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | Tri-Pride 2023The Tri Cities was not going to have a pride festival this year due to reorganization of the Tri Cities Pride Festival which is the events hosting organization. Rural Americans United immediately recognized that there must be a Pride Festival. The level of aggression towards to the LGBTQ+ community is escalating to the point of violence and death threats in schools, streets and local businesses. Rural Americans United served as the nexus for passionate community members to come together and organize Tri-Pride2023. It will take place on Saturday July 8th at Memorial Park in Pasco from 10am - 4pm. The line up includes a main stage of performers, kids area with bouncy houses, 9 food vendors, a parade with a 135 foot pride flag and more than 40 vendors. Please support by buying a T-shirt, giving a donation or registering to perform, be a vendor or volunteer.

From district wide collaboration efforts to Democratic fundraising dinners to Tri-Pride 2023 to alliance building with west coast agencies to bring resources to Central Washington, we have been working for you! For all of us! What a 501(c)3? | | | | | | | Patsy Whitefoot: Congressional District 4 Representative to the Washington DemocratsIt is an honor to be able to join and participate in the CD4 Representative to the Washington Dems, Patricia Whitefoot's monthly meeting. Doug White's campaign was the first to unify all the legislative districts and county democratic parties for a single purpose. It is wonderful to see this continuing and the Central Washington Dems working together means that there is no limit to the possibilities. | | | | Tri-Pride 2023The Tri Cities was not going to have a pride festival this year due to reorganization of the Tri Cities Pride Festival which is the events hosting organization. Rural Americans United immediately recognized that there must be a Pride Festival. The level of aggression towards to the LGBTQ+ community is escalating to the point of violence and death threats in schools, streets and local businesses. Rural Americans United served as the nexus for passionate community members to come together and organize Tri-Pride2023. It will take place on Saturday July 8th at Memorial Park in Pasco from 10am - 4pm. The line up includes a main stage of performers, kids area with bouncy houses, 9 food vendors, a parade with a 135 foot pride flag and more than 40 vendors. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: 7 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735234/411063709/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRhZThmNS03NjA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oA_MKJ5vI0BnEawbmbbcg0v_hmF99mV3wusy3dUErF8=)
---
Team, seven years ago today, the Orlando community was forever changed when a gunman opened fire in PULSE nightclub, one of the deadliest mass shootings in American history.

This heinous attack against the LGBTQ+ community led to the deaths of 49 people and injuries for more than 50 others. Seven years later, families continue to be completely torn apart.

This month is Gun Violence Prevention Month and Pride Month — **_a time to remind us of the need for strong allies who will protect LGBTQ+ rights and lives._**

We need to honor the memories of those lost and recommit ourselves to being an ally and take action. No one should face hatred, hostility, or violence because of who they are or who they love.

After the tragedy at Pulse, I called for a special session to pass gun safety legislation immediately. Florida Republicans refused to act. When Republicans didn’t want to fund a Pulse Memorial, I fought back and worked alongside my colleagues to secure funding.

In Congress, I’m fighting day in and day out for gun violence prevention — and not a day goes by where I won’t call out my Republican colleagues for turning a blind eye to the rise of gun violence in our country.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Taking back our U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Step one starts now: Hey Peter,

For far too long, Missouri voices have gone unheard. That's why last week, I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate to send Josh Hawley packing. Together, _I know we can defeat him_ — but I need your help to get the job done. Make no mistake: Missouri's Senate race is going to be one of the most important Senate races in 2024. We have the chance to vote out Hawley, who has spent his chaotic tenure catering to extreme special interest groups and chasing the next punchy sound-bite. **[That's not the kind of senator hardworking Missourians deserve – that's why I'm asking, Peter: Will you join this grassroots campaign as a founding donor? A donation of just $5 ensures we have the resources to build a campaign for the people in the early days of this race and sets the tone heading into our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline at the end of the **_As a proud Japanese American, would you allow me to take this time to tell you a little bit about my very personal family story?_ I know most people don’t read long emails like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you read the whole thing. **

Peter, I’ve been reflecting on the respective stories and experiences of my maternal and paternal grandparents, pictured below.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735334/411063927/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230612_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcxYzU1ZC03NzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3tV_w3kzc_rc5XIdHumRy8AbYxjyUxTTWlMTU4hQjA=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735335/411063928/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230612_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcxYzU1ZC03NzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3tV_w3kzc_rc5XIdHumRy8AbYxjyUxTTWlMTU4hQjA=)
---|---
Painfully, along with my parents,**they were all sent to Japanese American internment camps** during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything. These policies were a continuation of _a long history of Asian exclusion and discrimination in US history._

Nonetheless, we’ve persevered. My family started over and rebuilt their entire lives after the internment camps. **Asian American communities have traveled across continents** to pursue the American Dream and build a new, better life for their children.

Today, I’m feeling especially thankful for my parents, Nancy – who I miss everyday – and Willie, for everything they sacrificed for me and my brothers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735336/411063929/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230612_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcxYzU1ZC03NzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3tV_w3kzc_rc5XIdHumRy8AbYxjyUxTTWlMTU4hQjA=)
Peter, I’m proud to be Asian American. The AAPI community has persevered and thrived in the United States. And it means so much to me that our nation is collectively celebrating and acknowledging AAPI history, contributions, and culture.

**After all, Asian American history _is_ American history. **

[**Peter, as one of a small handful of Asian Americans serving in Congress, I’m proud to be a voice for Asian American communities and other underrepresented groups. If you’re with me, would you chip in $7 or any amount to help me keep up my work for the AAPI community? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735337/411063930/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230612_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjcxYzU1ZC03NzA5LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3tV_w3kzc_rc5XIdHumRy8AbYxjyUxTTWlMTU4hQjA=)

clean_body: I hope you read this. | | = | = As a proud Japanese American, would you allow me to take this time to tell you a little bit about my very personal family story? I know most people don’t read long emails like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you read the whole thing. Peter, I’ve been reflecting on the respective stories and experiences of my maternal and paternal grandparents, pictured below. = | = ---|--- Painfully, along with my parents,they were all sent to Japanese American internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything. These policies were a continuation of a long history of Asian exclusion and discrimination in US history. Nonetheless, we’ve persevered. My family started over and rebuilt their entire lives after the internment camps. Asian American communities have traveled across continents to pursue the American Dream and build a new, better life for their children. Today, I’m feeling especially thankful for my parents, Nancy – who I miss everyday – and Willie, for everything they sacrificed for me and my brothers. = Peter, I’m proud to be Asian American. The AAPI community has persevered and thrived in the United States. And it means so much to me that our nation is collectively celebrating and acknowledging AAPI history, contributions, and culture. After all, Asian American history is American history. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Learning about our stories is the best tool we have to combat current and future anti-Asian discrimination – so thank you for taking the time to read this message. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Donate to LGBTQ organizations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I’m tired of the only time religious freedom is invoked is in the name of bigotry and discrimination
#
There is a long history in this country of weaponizing and abusing religion to justify bigotry.
White supremacists have done it.
Those who justified slavery did it.
Those who fought against integration did it.
And we’re seeing it today with the unprecedented attacks on the LGBTQ community.
This month for Pride, we are launching a fundraiser to support the safety of trans, nonbinary, and intersex people in the NYC shelter system.
[Will you stand with our LGBT+ neighbors with a $3 contribution today? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230612.OWV5tP&refcode=em20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230612.OWV5tP&refcode=em20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)**
Sometimes, I feel as though if Christ himself walked through the doors of Congress, and said what he said thousands of years ago — that we should love our neighbor and our enemy, that we should welcome the stranger and fight for the least of us, that it’s easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than it is for a rich man to get into the Kingdom of Heaven — he would be maligned as a radical.
I know, and it is part of my faith, that all people are holy and all people are sacred. There is nothing holy about rejecting medical care of people, no matter who they are, on the grounds of what their identity is. There is nothing holy about rejecting a child from a family. There is nothing holy about writing discrimination into the law.
I am tired of the only time religious freedom is invoked is in the name of bigotry and discrimination. It is not up to legislators to deny medical care. It is up to us to feed the hungry, to clothe the poor, to protect children, and to love all people as ourselves.
[This pride month, will you stand with our LGBT+ neighbors with a $3 contribution today to the Bronx Defenders and Center for Urban Pedagogy? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230612.OWV5tP&refcode=em20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230612.OWV5tP&refcode=em20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230612?refcode=em20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=41&refcode2=4465_2526796_XQv5ft&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230612-4465-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=42&akid=4465%2E2526796%2EXQv5ft)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL1u8yAUhq8Gb7bgYAMeGD7pk7d0qCJ1RMdAYlr8IzhR1LuvYql79_fveT8u7oIpp-3-hmu0VMiV6vaD3BfWpfXLnkpb9-3ugINsuWoFONkE22sIUjXRCmWUgl5x3SzW3_jAb0aPN4NyHAcjvJqFFvOMwYDXTbKvHK4EgAQzmE4LwHEU0sy9gMgH1nPMsVDtaIklHo85J48bRVw7v69NtgvRUZn8x2BiMNXoHyV2z7SVGF4KBlPYN6RIe8BvBtMJcmD7iZs6eV5GOT1odeSZ_H99v7a_o5piw_FMOaeqNOv5fcWUz1766zc_AQAA__87i2pn)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL1u8yAUhq8Gb7bgYAMeGD7pk7d0qCJ1RMdAYlr8IzhR1LuvYql79_fveT8u7oIpp-3-hmu0VMiV6vaD3BfWpfXLnkpb9-3ugINsuWoFONkE22sIUjXRCmWUgl5x3SzW3_jAb0aPN4NyHAcjvJqFFvOMwYDXTbKvHK4EgAQzmE4LwHEU0sy9gMgH1nPMsVDtaIklHo85J48bRVw7v69NtgvRUZn8x2BiMNXoHyV2z7SVGF4KBlPYN6RIe8BvBtMJcmD7iZs6eV5GOT1odeSZ_H99v7a_o5piw_FMOaeqNOv5fcWUz1766zc_AQAA__87i2pn)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL1u8yAUhq8Gb7bgYAMeGD7pk7d0qCJ1RMdAYlr8IzhR1LuvYql79_fveT8u7oIpp-3-hmu0VMiV6vaD3BfWpfXLnkpb9-3ugINsuWoFONkE22sIUjXRCmWUgl5x3SzW3_jAb0aPN4NyHAcjvJqFFvOMwYDXTbKvHK4EgAQzmE4LwHEU0sy9gMgH1nPMsVDtaIklHo85J48bRVw7v69NtgvRUZn8x2BiMNXoHyV2z7SVGF4KBlPYN6RIe8BvBtMJcmD7iZs6eV5GOT1odeSZ_H99v7a_o5piw_FMOaeqNOv5fcWUz1766zc_AQAA__87i2pn)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL1u8yAUhq8Gb7bgYAMeGD7pk7d0qCJ1RMdAYlr8IzhR1LuvYql79_fveT8u7oIpp-3-hmu0VMiV6vaD3BfWpfXLnkpb9-3ugINsuWoFONkE22sIUjXRCmWUgl5x3SzW3_jAb0aPN4NyHAcjvJqFFvOMwYDXTbKvHK4EgAQzmE4LwHEU0sy9gMgH1nPMsVDtaIklHo85J48bRVw7v69NtgvRUZn8x2BiMNXoHyV2z7SVGF4KBlPYN6RIe8BvBtMJcmD7iZs6eV5GOT1odeSZ_H99v7a_o5piw_FMOaeqNOv5fcWUz1766zc_AQAA__87i2pn)

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Will you be watching tonight? 🏀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
You will not believe this story about my grandfather
#
When I am not out on the campaign trail, I try to keep up with my favorite sport: basketball. 🏀
Right now, we are in the middle of the NBA Finals. In fact, tonight could be the deciding game. So In honor of that, **I want to tell you a quick story.**
After I do that, I am going to ask you to chip in to my campaign to flip NY-03 and defeat George Santos — [**so if you are not a basketball fan or you are just short on time, will you take a moment to donate before you log off?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230612?amount=5&refcode=em20230612&refcode2=105_8507_Bo1pxH&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)
You could say that love for basketball runs in my family, starting with my grandfather, Lionel.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230612?amount=5&refcode=em20230612&refcode2=105_8507_Bo1pxH&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)
He started out playing college basketball, before being called to serve his country in World War II. There, he overcame his fear of heights by signing up to be a paramedic — jumping out of airplanes on D-Day.
Throughout the war, he held onto his love for basketball and after he returned home, he went on to become **the 13th shortest player in NBA history.**
Though I never got to meet my grandfather, the values he picked up on the basketball court and the battlefield have been passed down through my family and are an integral part of who I am: **teamwork, service, and sacrifice.**
These same values are guiding our campaign — but like any good basketball team, it will take all of us coming together to win.
[**We are up against George Santos, his MAGA cronies, and the millions of dollars they are going to spend to defend him. To be able to go toe-to-toe with them and win this race, we need the resources to out-organize and out-work them. So I'm personally asking: can you chip in $5 now to help drive our campaign forward?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230612?amount=5&refcode=em20230612&refcode2=105_8507_Bo1pxH&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230612?amount=5&refcode=em20230612&refcode2=105_8507_Bo1pxH&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)**
With gratitude,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=105%2E8507%2EBo1pxH)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

subject: PHOTOS: Dispatch from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
Laura has been out and about in CA-30 | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735524/411064775/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=) Team,

It’s been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail. Laura has been out and about, meeting folks from every corner of our district, and has been so grateful to hear everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges.

We thought we’d pass them along some important updates from the trail. Please enjoy the photos and stay tuned for more!

Thank you so much for all you do for this campaign.

– _Everyone at Laura Friedman HQ_
| [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735525/411064776/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
---

* * *

**Laura proudly marched with Equality California at the West Hollywood Pride!** As always, it’s an absolute pleasure to stand for equality and inclusivity for the LGBTQ+ community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735526/411064777/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
**Our team had so much fun at the RCPOA Association’s block party in Glendale!** It was wonderful to spend time with friends and neighbors and enjoy a weekend together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735527/411064778/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
**Laura spent Mother’s Day with Moms Demand Action to demand that Congress reinstate the assault weapons ban.** A mom of a school-aged daughter herself, Laura knows that ending the gun violence epidemic is critically important, and she’s ready to continue her work on safe gun storage and other gun safety measures in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735528/411064779/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
**Our team caught up with our friends from the California Labor Federation to chat about the latest issues facing workers.** Laura will always be a champion for labor, and we’re obsessed with the bobblehead that commemorates her commitment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735529/411064780/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735530/411064781/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
**Laura had an inspiring experience with the activists from the NARAL Pro Choice’s California chapter on their Lobby Day.** She’ll never let up in her fight for reproductive justice for everyone, especially now that reproductive freedoms are under assault.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735531/411064782/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
**While on a trip to Washington, D.C. to bring federal transportation and transit funding home to California, Laura ran into a passionate group of UCLA Students on their own advocacy trip.** They were in town to fight for funding for the Sepulveda Pass Rail and other important student needs. What a small world!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735532/411064783/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)
We know this was a long note, so thank you so much for reading it! Laura is thrilled to continue meeting as many folks as she can to listen and learn from our community.

**[If you’d like to chip in to our effort to send a progressive champion like Laura to fight for us in Congress, you can do so by clicking this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64735533/411064784/62647395?refcode=em-6.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QzMzMwZTItN2EwOS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eAJvGzmH2rDnvcWLcYoeq_ZGpEOyIe4GGoYVmal-Nqo=)**

Thanks again,

Team Laura

clean_body: Laura has been out and about in CA-30 | = Team, It’s been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail. Laura has been out and about, meeting folks from every corner of our district, and has been so grateful to hear everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges. We thought we’d pass them along some important updates from the trail. Please enjoy the photos and stay tuned for more! Thank you so much for all you do for this campaign. – Everyone at Laura Friedman HQ | = Laura proudly marched with Equality California at the West Hollywood Pride! As always, it’s an absolute pleasure to stand for equality and inclusivity for the LGBTQ+ community. = Our team had so much fun at the RCPOA Association’s block party in Glendale! It was wonderful to spend time with friends and neighbors and enjoy a weekend together. = Laura spent Mother’s Day with Moms Demand Action to demand that Congress reinstate the assault weapons ban. A mom of a school-aged daughter herself, Laura knows that ending the gun violence epidemic is critically important, and she’s ready to continue her work on safe gun storage and other gun safety measures in Congress. = Our team caught up with our friends from the California Labor Federation to chat about the latest issues facing workers. Laura will always be a champion for labor, and we’re obsessed with the bobblehead that commemorates her commitment. = = Laura had an inspiring experience with the activists from the NARAL Pro Choice’s California chapter on their Lobby Day. She’ll never let up in her fight for reproductive justice for everyone, especially now that reproductive freedoms are under assault. = While on a trip to Washington, D.C. to bring federal transportation and transit funding home to California, Laura ran into a passionate group of UCLA Students on their own advocacy trip. They were in town to fight for funding for the Sepulveda Pass Rail and other important student needs. What a small world! = We know this was a long note, so thank you so much for reading it! Laura is thrilled to continue meeting as many folks as she can to listen and learn from our community. =** Thanks again, Team Laura = | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .
